title: Web Specialist
description:
***THIS JOB POSTING IS NOT MONITORED***



APPLY HERE:  



About the Role



We’re hiring Web Specialists to join our Grow implementation team. You’ll build and maintain client websites in Webflow and execute ongoing client edit requests — the day-to-day work that keeps hundreds of gym websites running cleanly and accurately.



This role requires: strong Webflow proficiency, a good design eye, and the discipline to follow SOPs without cutting corners. This role isn’t creative design — it’s precise execution. The quality problem we’re solving is accuracy and judgment: making the right change the first time, every time.



What You’ll Do

- Execute new gym websites in Webflow using automated build tooling

- Customize each site per client brief: colors, fonts, images, copy, and section layout

- Coordinate with QA before launch to catch issues before they reach clients

- Maintain build documentation and flag automation gaps

- Interpret client feedback and translate it accurately into Webflow changes

- Work through the edit queue efficiently without sacrificing accuracy

- Identify when a request is unclear and ask for clarification rather than guessing

- Maintain low rework rates — getting it right the first time



Quality and SOP Adherence

- Follow documented SOPs for every task — no shortcuts

- Flag when SOPs are unclear or outdated rather than improvising

- Maintain clean files and naming conventions in Webflow

title: Work Order Coordinator / Dispatcher — Facilities Management
description:
Honest Fixers LLC | Remote | Full-Time



We are a U.S.-based facility maintenance and general contracting company looking for an experienced Work Order Coordinator to join our remote operations team.



This role is NOT entry-level. We need someone who can hit the ground running.



What You’ll Be Doing



 ? Receiving, dispatching, and tracking work orders from start to close

 ? Coordinating with field technicians, vendors, and clients across multiple U.S. time zones

 ? Managing priorities, scheduling, and follow-ups in real time

 ? Keeping work order management systems up to date with accurate notes and status updates

 ? Communicating clearly with clients on ETAs, updates, and completions



What We’re Looking For



 ? Minimum 2 years of experience in facilities management, property maintenance, or a related field (HVAC, janitorial, electrical, plumbing dispatch — all count)

 ? Hands-on experience with work order management systems (ServiceMax, FieldEdge, Corrigo, FSM, or similar)

 ? Strong English communication skills — written and verbal

 ? Comfortable working U.S. business hours

 ? Background with companies like CBRE, JLL, Cushman & Wakefield, or similar is a strong plus



?? Applicants with no experience in facilities or work order management systems will not be interviewed. Please do not apply if this does not describe you.



To Apply



Send your resume along with a short video introduction (2–3 minutes max) covering:



 ? Your background in facilities management

 ? The work order systems you’ve used

 ? What you can bring to a fast-moving dispatch operation



We move fast. If you’re the right fit, you’ll hear from us quickly.????????????????

title: Inside Sales Representative
description:
We are a rapidly growing U.S.-based facility maintenance and general contracting company. We operate nationwide and pride ourselves on integrity, reliability, and delivering high-quality service to major retail and commercial brands.



We are expanding our sales team and looking for a highly skilled Inside Sales Representative based in the Philippines who is comfortable with cold calling, outbound
 outreach, and managing a high-volume, fast-paced workflow.



Role Overview



This is a full-time, remote Inside Sales position. You will be responsible for generating new business opportunities, nurturing leads, and supporting account growth. Your work will directly impact our ability to expand our national footprint and secure long-term client relationships.



Key Responsibilities

- Crafting and sending professional outbound sales
s

- Qualifying prospects and booking intro calls

- Managing accounts and supporting client communication

- Updating CRM and maintaining clean records

- Assisting management with special projects, reports, and follow-ups



Requirements



- Perfect English — written and spoken (neutral accent required)

- Minimum 3+ years inside sales experience

- Strong communication and negotiation skills

- Comfortable working U.S. hours

- High attention to detail, organized, and self-directed

Applications without a video will not be reviewed.

title: Licensing and Compliance Coordinator
description:
The Licensing & Compliance Coordinator plays a critical role within the organization by providing administrative and licensing support to the Company and guaranteeing the Company’s compliance with renewing and maintaining corporate, contractor, and local-level licensing. This role will report directly to the VP of Compliance.



 



Responsibilities:



Provide professional licensing support to the company and its subsidiaries and ensure that all required professional licenses are obtained and kept in good standing.



Ensure proper and timely completion of all licensing requirements for Corporate and all Brands, including the preparation and filing of license applications.



Apply for new licenses as needed on a state and local level.



Send and upload COIs to proper licensing offices, localities, and Brand Markets.



Assist the various brands company-wide with the COI platform.



Respond to questions from company personnel regarding licensing requirements.



Maintain up-to-date knowledge of all relevant corporate, state, and federal licensing requirements.



Retain accurate and organized records of all licensing documents.



Provide administrative support to the VP of compliance.



Qualifications:



A minimum of 2 years prior experience in license management, regulatory compliance, or a related field is advantageous.



Knowledge of contractor Licensing and Permitting processes



Excellent written and verbal communication skills



Knowledge of Certificate of Insurance processes and procedures



Strong computer proficiency



Superb attention to detail.



Experience working in a fast-paced environment with changing priorities and goals.



Organized, detailed, and self-motivated.



Ability to multitask and problem-solving.



Works well in a team environment as well as independently.



Demonstrated ability to adapt to new information, research for information, and apply knowledge learned.



Ability to follow directions and complete detailed forms with accuracy.



Strong analytical and detail-oriented aptitude; a high degree of accuracy is required.

title: Nurse
description:
Remote Nurse



We’re looking for a Remote Nurse to join our virtual team! This role requires excellent communication skills, strong attention to detail, and fluency in English. You’ll be responsible for conducting scheduled patient calls, collecting and uploading health data, and coordinating with care teams.



Requirements:

Licensed nurse (RN, LPN, or international equivalent)

Fluency in English (spoken and written)

Reliable internet connection (minimum 150 Mbps)

High level of professionalism and organization



Preferred but not required:

Remote nursing or telehealth experience

Call center or care coordination background

US nursing license (RN or LPN)



Pay and Benefits:

Pay is $3.50/hour and increases to $4.00/hour after one month of satisfactory work.

120 hours of accrued PTO each year.

description:

About the Role



Our team supports multiple operational systems including CRM, project management, and accounting tools. I am looking for someone who can take ownership of system support, reporting, and integrations, helping keep our operations organized and efficient.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:

Managing AccuLynx (user setup, permissions, configurations, and locations)

Troubleshooting system and integration issues

Building and maintaining advanced Excel reports

Managing tickets and support requests through ZoHo Desk

Supporting integrations across SalesRabbit and eventually Sage Intacct

Ensuring data accuracy and consistency across systems

Documenting processes and identifying areas for improvement

Communicating clearly with leadership regarding issues and solutions



Requirements

Strong hands-on experience with AccuLynx (Admin-level preferred)

Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, formulas, reporting, data cleanup)

Analytical mindset and strong problem-solving skills

Experience working with CRM or operational systems

Strong English communication skills (verbal and written)

Comfortable speaking on camera and joining calls with leadership

Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks



Nice to Have

Experience with SalesRabbit

Experience with Sage Intacct

Experience with Smartsheet

Familiarity with Microsoft Power BI

Experience using L
 or Vizio



Working Hours

Full-time (40 hours per week)

Must be available during US Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours



What I’m Looking For

I am looking for someone who:

Is detail-oriented and highly organized

Enjoys working with systems and processes

Can solve problems independently

Communicates clearly and professionally

Takes initiative and looks for ways to improve workflows



What Success Looks Like

Success in this role means:

Confidently managing AccuLynx and related systems

Improving reporting and operational workflows

Helping streamline ticket management and integrations

Becoming a reliable systems specialist for our team

If this sounds like you, I’d love to hear about your experience with AccuLynx and Excel.

title: Spotify Playlist Placement Assistant
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented assistant to handle daily Spotify playlist placements.



We run a music promotion company, artists come to us to get their music placed in Spotify playlists.

Your role will be to review music, and get their song placed into the right playlists.



This is a structured execution role.

No marketing. No sales. No creativity required.



Your job is simply to follow a clear system and execute placements accurately.



Accuracy and consistency matter most.

This is a long-term remote position.



What You'll Do

Every day you will:

• Open new song orders in our 
 board

 • Listen to the song on Spotify

 • Identify the song’s genre / vibe

 • Select appropriate playlists from our playlist database

 • Add the song manually to the playlist

 • Place the song at the correct position in the playlist

 • Copy the playlist link

 • Paste the playlist link into the order file in 

 • Repeat until all placements are completed



You will handle approximately:

10–20 songs per day



Estimated workload:

~90 minutes per day



Work Setup:

- Remote

- Part-time

- Daily work required (including weekends)



Fixed monthly payment:

- $180/month ($4/hour)

- Long-term role if performance is good.



Tools You Will Use

• 
 

 • Spotify

 • Microsoft Edge (multiple browser profiles)

 • Excel playlist database

 • Gmail



You will receive clear step-by-step instructions and training.



Must-Haves

• Laptop or PC capable of running multiple browser tabs at once

• Reliable internet connection

• Good understanding of music genres and styles

• Able to follow structured instructions exactly

• Good written English

• Available daily



Big Plus

• Two monitors (this significantly speeds up the workflow)

• Experience with 

• Experience with data entry or order fulfillment

• Experience working with Spotify or music



Ideal Candidate

You are someone who:

• Pays attention to details

 • Works carefully with repetitive tasks

 • Follows instructions exactly

 • Is reliable and consistent



This role is not about creativity.

 It is about accuracy and consistency.



Application Questions

To apply, please answer the following:

Answer in this format:

A1, A2, A3, B1, B2, B3



A1

Are you available to work every day for 90 minutes?



A2

Do you have experience using Spotify and identifying music genres?



A3

How do you make sure you don’t make mistakes in repetitive tasks?



Short Skill Test

Please complete the short task below.

Go to Spotify and search for the song:

“No Wahala” by 1da Banton



B1

What is the main genre of this song?



B2

Which playlists would you promote this song in?

The customer ordered promotion to 50,000 playlist followers.



Stay close to the song’s genre/style.

Make sure the combined followers are at least 50,000.



Choose from the playlists below:

Afro Chill Vibes – 8,000 followers

 Afrobeats Party – 15,000 followers

 Chill R&B Nights – 12,000 followers

 Tropical House Hits – 9,000 followers

 Chill Afro Hits 2025 – 20,000 followers

 Dancehall Energy – 6,000 followers

 Afro Summer 2024 – 18,000 followers

 Urban Latin Mix – 11,000 followers

 Smooth Vibes – 7,000 followers

 TikTok Hits 2025 – 25,000 followers



B3

Briefly explain why you chose those playlists (2–3 sentences).



Applications that do not answer the questions will not be reviewed.



Thank you!



Vincent - PlaylistGrow

title: Math Tutor K-12
description:
Position Overview



Youniquely Gifted Educational Consulting & Tutoring is seeking a dedicated and knowledgeable Math Tutor (K–12) to support students with diverse learning needs. This role is ideal for an educator who is passionate about helping students build confidence, close learning gaps, and achieve academic success.



The ideal candidate is data-driven, patient, and skilled at differentiating instruction to meet students where they are.



 Key Responsibilities



• Provide 1:1 or small group math instruction for K–12 students

• Assess students’ current skill levels and identify learning gaps

• Develop and implement individualized learning plans

• Teach foundational and grade-level math concepts (including STAAR-aligned content if applicable)

• Use engaging, student-centered strategies to improve understanding

• Track and document student progress regularly

• Communicate effectively with parents regarding student performance

• Prepare students for assessments, including state testing and benchmarks



 Required Qualifications



• Bachelor’s degree in Education, Mathematics, or a related field

• Strong verbal and written English communication skills

• Experience teaching or tutoring K–12 math

• Ability to differentiate instruction for various learning levels

• Strong understanding of foundational math concepts and problem-solving strategies

• Ability to explain concepts in a clear, simple, and engaging way



 Preferred Qualifications (Strong Candidates Will Have)



• Teaching certification (preferred but not required)

• Experience working with:



Students below grade level



Students with IEPs or 504 plans



Students with ADHD or learning differences



• Familiarity with standardized testing (STAAR or similar assessments)

• Experience using data to drive instruction and track progress

• Ability to build strong relationships with students and parents

• Strong classroom or virtual classroom management skills



 Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is:



• Patient, encouraging, and student-focused

• Highly organized and reliable

• Results-driven with a passion for student growth

• Comfortable working independently and managing sessions

• Able to build confidence in students who struggle with math



Performance Expectations



• Demonstrate measurable student progress

• Maintain consistent communication with parents

• Deliver engaging and effective tutoring sessions

• Support students in improving accuracy, confidence, and test readiness



 Compensation



• Competitive hourly rate based on experience

• Opportunities for performance-based bonuses

• Flexible scheduling options



???? How to Apply



Please submit:



• Your resume

• A brief introduction of your tutoring/teaching experience

• A short video explaining why you are a strong fit for this role



???? Why Join Us?



At Youniquely Gifted, we are committed to transforming student outcomes through personalized, data-driven instruction. You’ll be part of a family that values impact, growth, and meaningful support for families. To confirm you have carefully read this job description, please include the word “education” at the beginning of your application or cover message.

title: Property Onboarding Accountant
description:
Key Responsibilities



Property Transition & Onboarding

• Lead accounting onboarding for newly acquired or managed properties.

• Review prior financials, trial balances, and supporting documentation.

• Analyze historical data for accuracy and completeness.

• Identify discrepancies and coordinate resolution with prior management.



AppFolio System Setup

• Configure property settings within AppFolio.

• Set up chart of accounts and ensure proper mapping.

• Establish bank accounts and cash management structure.

• Input beginning balances and reconcile to source documents.

• Configure units, tenants, lease data, and security deposit tracking.

• Ensure proper setup of reserve accounts and restricted cash.



Data Migration & Validation

• Import and validate tenant ledgers.

• Reconcile security deposits and escrow balances.

• Reconcile accounts payable and outstanding liabilities.

• Tie all balances to acquisition statements or management transition reports.

• Perform post-conversion trial balance reconciliation.



Internal Controls & Process Implementation

• Establish property-level cash controls.

• Ensure proper segregation of operating vs. restricted funds.

• Implement purchase order and invoice approval workflows.

• Develop onboarding checklist and documentation standards.

• Assist in drafting SOPs related to property onboarding.



Reporting & Compliance

• Ensure property is fully reporting-ready post onboarding.

• Validate financial statements for the first reporting cycle.

• Support LIHTC/HUD setup where applicable.

• Coordinate with asset management and site teams during transition.



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance.

• 3–5 years of accounting experience (property management preferred).

• Strong working knowledge of AppFolio (required).

• Experience with property transitions or acquisitions strongly preferred.

• Advanced Excel skills.

• Strong reconciliation and problem-solving abilities.

• Detail-oriented with a strong internal control mindset.



Key Competencies

• Process-oriented.

• High level of accuracy.

• Ability to manage multiple property transitions simultaneously.

• Strong communication with operations and ownership.

• Deadline-driven.



Success Metrics

• Properties fully onboarded within established timeline.

• Zero unreconciled opening balances.

• Accurate first-month financial reporting.

• No audit findings related to onboarding.

• Clean documentation trail

title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description:
We are seeking a skilled and motivated Cybersecurity Engineer to join our team. As a Cybersecurity Engineer, you will play a critical role in protecting our clients’ IT environments by identifying vulnerabilities, implementing security measures, and responding to potential threats.



This is an exciting opportunity to work in a dynamic and collaborative environment, where you’ll help safeguard businesses from cyber risks while growing your expertise in the ever-evolving field of cybersecurity.



Key Responsibilities

* Design, implement, and maintain security solutions to protect IT systems and data.

* Develop and enforce security policies, procedures, and best practices.

* Analyze security alerts, logs, and i
 to identify potential threats.

* Collaborate with IT teams to ensure systems are configured securely.

* Stay up-to-date with the latest cybersecurity trends, threats, and technologies.

* Provide training and guidance to tea
mbers and clients on cybersecurity best practices.



Technologies You’ll Work With

* Firewalls, VPNs, and intrusion detection/prevention systems.

* Cloud security tools for Microsoft 365, Azure, and AWS.

* Familiarity with vulnerability assessments and i
 response.

* Strong communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences.



Preferred but Not Required:

* Certifications such as CISSP, CEH, CompTIA Security+, or CISM.

* Experience with cloud security (Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS).

* Experience in cybersecurity or a related IT field (2+ years preferred).



Why Join Us?

* Be part of a forward-thinking team dedicated to protecting businesses from cyber threats.

* Opportunities for professional growth and paid certifications.

* Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.

* Monthly healthcare allowance.

* 13th-month pay.

title: Junior IT Engineer
description:
We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a Junior IT Engineer to join our growing remote team. This role is ideal for candidates with 0–3 years of experience who are passionate about technology and eager to grow in a supportive environment.



You’ll start by focusing on day-to-day technical support and gradually take on more project-related tasks as your skills develop. You’ll work closely with senior engineers, receive structured onboarding, and get real-world exposure to modern IT environments, tools, and best practices.



If you enjoy troubleshooting, learning new technologies, and providing great service to users, we’d love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities:

*Technical Support (Level 1–2)

- Provide remote technical support for hardware, software, and basic network issues.

- Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to desktops, laptops, printers, and peripherals.

- Escalate more complex problems to senior engineers when needed, while staying involved to learn from the resolution.

*PC Maintenance & Setup

- Perform PC maintenance, upgrades, and new workstation installations.

- Install and configure standard software and tools according to company and client standards.

*User Support & Remote Work

- Manage and support user equipment, software, and services remotely using our remote management tools.

- Guide end users through basic troubleshooting steps in a clear and professional manner.

*Documentation & Ticketing

- Document all work accurately and thoroughly in the ticketing system.

- Keep tickets updated with progress notes and resolutions to ensure transparency and team collaboration.

*Project Assistance (as you grow)

- Assist senior engineers with IT projects such as small deployments, migrations, and network changes.

- Follow implementation plans and checklists, gradually taking more ownership as your experience increases.



Technologies You’ll Work With:

You don’t need to be an expert in everything on day one, but familiarity with some of these is a strong plus, and we’ll help you grow into the rest:



*Operating Systems

- Windows desktop environments (Windows 10/11)

- Mac (basic support is a plus)

- Windows Server (exposure/interest is a plus)

*Networking

- Basic networking concepts (IP addressing, DNS, DHCP, Wi-Fi)

- Exposure to devices like Cisco, Ubiquiti, Fortinet is a plus

*Cloud Platforms

- Microsoft 365 (user management,
, basic administration)

- Basic understanding or interest in Azure is a plus



What We’re Looking For:

*Experience & Background

- 0–3 years of experience in an IT Support, Helpdesk, or related technical role.

- Experience in an MSP environment is a plus but not required.

- Recent graduates or career shifters with strong foundational knowledge are welcome to apply.

*Skills & Mindset

- Strong basic troubleshooting skills for hardware, software, and simple network issues.

- Familiarity with Microsoft 365 and Windows environments.

- Good English communication skills (spoken and written).

- Excellent customer service mindset – patient, professional, and user-focused.

- A proactive, problem-solving approach with a strong desire to learn and grow.

- Ability to work independently while being an active part of a remote team.



Preferred but Not Required:

These are nice-to-haves, not must-haves. We’re happy to help you grow into them:



* IT certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Microsoft Fundamentals, or similar.

* Exposure to firewalls, VPNs, and virtual environments (Hyper-V, VMware, etc.).

* Experience with RMM and ticketing tools used in MSPs.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (1945) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



*** The working hours for this role are 2:00 PM -11:00 PM CST with an hour of Lunch break, Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Data & Reporting Assistant  - CrucialPoint Agency | Remote | Part-Time
description:
About CrucialPoint

CrucialPoint Agency is a precision retention marketing agency trusted by 7-, 8-, and 9-figure D2C brands. We specialize in
, SMS, and lifecycle marketing. Our team is lean, fast-moving, and obsessed with accuracy.



The Role

We are looking for a Data & Reporting Assistant to serve as the backbone of our performance tracking. You will be responsible for pulling, organizing, and maintaining the data that allows our strategists to make multi-million dollar decisions.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Data Extraction: Pulling reports from Klaviyo, Shopify, and Google Analytics.

- Data Management: Transferring raw data into Google Sheets and Notion dashboards.

- Quality Control: Auditing reports to ensure numbers match across different systems.

- Reporting Cycles: Updating daily and weekly reports with 100?curacy.



Requirements

- Extreme Attention to Detail: You catch small errors that others miss.

- Spreadsheet Fluency: High comfort level with Google Sheets (formatting, basic formulas).

- Reliability: Available for at least 4 hours of overlap with US Mountain Time (MST).

- Process-Oriented: You enjoy following a checklist and ensuring data is "clean."



Compensation & Growth

- Rate: $6–$10/hour (depending on experience).

- Path: Starts part-time with a clear path to full-time based on performance.



How to Apply (The Precision Test)

To be considered for this role, please submit your application along with the answer to the following Data Accuracy Challenge.



The Challenge:

Compare the two data entries below. There are 3 specific discrepancies (errors) in the "Manual Entry" when compared to the "Raw Data."

Raw Data (Source): Order_ID: #9921 | Date: 10/12/26 | Subtotal: $142.50 | Tax: $11.40 | Total: $153.90 | Attribute:
_Klaviyo

Manual Entry (Sheet): ID: #9912 | Date: 10/12/26 | Subtotal: $142.05 | Total: $153.90 | Source: Klaviyo



Please provide your application with:

A list of the 3 errors you found in the Manual Entry.

A brief 1-sentence explanation of why a marketing platform (like Klaviyo) and a store platform (like Shopify) might show different "Total Revenue" for the same time period.

title: Web Specialist
description:
About the Role



We’re hiring Web Specialists to join our Grow implementation team. You’ll build and maintain client websites in Webflow and execute ongoing client edit requests — the day-to-day work that keeps hundreds of gym websites running cleanly and accurately.



This role requires: strong Webflow proficiency, a good design eye, and the discipline to follow SOPs without cutting corners. This role isn’t creative design — it’s precise execution. The quality problem we’re solving is accuracy and judgment: making the right change the first time, every time.



What You’ll Do

- Execute new gym websites in Webflow using automated build tooling

- Customize each site per client brief: colors, fonts, images, copy, and section layout

- Coordinate with QA before launch to catch issues before they reach clients

- Maintain build documentation and flag automation gaps

- Interpret client feedback and translate it accurately into Webflow changes

- Work through the edit queue efficiently without sacrificing accuracy

- Identify when a request is unclear and ask for clarification rather than guessing

- Maintain low rework rates — getting it right the first time



Quality and SOP Adherence

- Follow documented SOPs for every task — no shortcuts

- Flag when SOPs are unclear or outdated rather than improvising

- Maintain clean files and naming conventions in Webflow

title: Resource Specialist
description:
Role Summary

The Resource Specialist serves as the primary bridge between a client’s clinical rehabilitation plan and the practical, real-world resources they need to succeed. Reporting directly to the Rehabilitation Coordinator, this role focuses on high-touch client interaction to identify social, financial, and logistical gaps and proactively sourcing solutions to fill them.



Core Responsibilities

- Direct Client Needs Assessment: Lead intensive one-on-one consultations with clients to identify specific barriers to recovery (e.g., housing instability, lack of transportation, food insecurity, or financial strain).

- Resource Mapping & Vetting: Build and maintain a comprehensive directory of community partners, NGOs, government programs, and private charities that can provide immediate assistance.

- Case Support for the RC: Act as the "boots on the ground" for the Rehab Coordinator by managing the non-clinical logistics of a client’s recovery plan.

- Application Assistance: Guide clients through the technical process of applying for social security, disability benefits, healthcare subsidies, or vocational training grants.

- Advocacy & Liaison: Contact external agencies on behalf of the client to expedite services and ensure they are receiving the full scope of available support.

- Goal Tracking: Regularly interview clients to monitor the effectiveness of provided resources and pivot strategies if a particular resource is no longer a fit.



Required Skills & Qualifications

- Communication: Exceptional active listening and interviewing skills; ability to explain complex social service systems to clients clearly.

- Empathy & Professionalism: Ability to build rapport with diverse populations while maintaining clear professional boundaries.

- Organization: Strong multitasking skills to manage a high volume of client requests and resource tracking.

- Problem-Solving: Proactive approach to finding creative solutions for clients with limited access to traditional support systems.

title: NDIS Scheduler / Operations Coordinator
description:
About the Business



We are an Australian based group operating multiple service businesses including disability support and home services.



Our focus is delivering high quality care to NDIS participants while keeping operations organised, efficient, and running smoothly behind the scenes.



We are a growing and systems focused business that values structure, reliability, and continuous improvement.



?



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly organised and proactive NDIS Scheduler and Operations Coordinator to support day to day operations.



You will be responsible for coordinating support worker schedules, ensuring participants receive consistent care, and making sure every shift is filled and running smoothly.



You will act as the central point between clients, support workers, and internal systems.



If you enjoy organising moving parts, solving problems quickly, and making operations run smoother, this role will suit you well.



?



Key Responsibilities



Scheduling and Rostering



Build and manage weekly or fortnightly rosters

Allocate staff based on availability, skillset, and client needs

Fill last minute shifts due to cancellations or absences

Ensure minimal gaps in schedules and maximise billable hours



Client Coordination



Communicate with clients and families regarding schedules

Adjust services based on changing needs

Maintain consistency in staff assignments where possible



Workforce Management



Track staff availability, leave, and hours

Coordinate replacements when needed

Ensure schedules align with working conditions



Systems and Admin



Manage scheduling tools such as ShiftCare, Brevity, or similar

Keep client and staff records accurate and up to date

Maintain organised workflows and documentation



Compliance and Billing Support



Ensure services align with plans and allocated hours

Monitor utilisation to avoid under or over servicing

Support accurate invoicing and reporting



Problem Solving



Respond quickly to roster gaps and urgent issues

Reallocate staff efficiently

Escalate ongoing issues when needed



?



What We Are Looking For



Essential



Strong organisational and time management skills

Excellent English communication both written and verbal

High attention to detail

Experience in scheduling, admin, or operations support

Comfortable using multiple systems and tools



Preferred but not required



Experience in NDIS, disability support, or home care

Familiarity with tools like ShiftCare, Brevity, or similar

Experience working with Australian businesses



?



Key Attributes



Process driven and structured

Calm under pressure

Strong problem solving ability

Reliable and accountable

Able to work independently



?



KPIs or Success Metrics



Maintain 95 to 100 percent shift coverage

Fast response time to scheduling issues

High staff utilisation

Reduced missed or cancelled shifts

Accurate scheduling and data entry



?



Why Join Us



Work directly with a growing Australian business

Long term opportunity with room to grow

Be part of a structured and systems focused team

Flexible remote working environment

Clear path to a Senior Coordinator or Operations Manager role



?



How to Apply



Please include the following:

 1. A short introduction about yourself

 2. Your experience with scheduling or operations

 3. Tools or systems you have used

 4. Your availability in hours per week

 5. Your updated resume which is required and applications without this will not be considered



?



Important



We are looking for someone who takes ownership, not just someone who completes tasks.



If you enjoy organising, improving systems, and making things run smoother, we would love to hear from you.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
About Us



Virtue Health has been transforming how mid-size employers self-fund through group purchasing for over 8 years, with our flagship Private Stop Loss Consortium helping them share risk, reduce volatility, and enhance benefits seamlessly. Our mission is to bring transparency and control to employers’ healthcare spending.







As Virtue Health continues to grow, we know our success depends on the talent we bring in.



That’s why we’re looking for the best, people like you, who act with integrity, reliability, responsibility, dedication, and a commitment to continuous improvement. Here, you’ll be immersed in a diverse, supportive environment where everyone is inspired to do their best work.







So, If you live by these values—Be Virtuous, Accountable, Do Whatever It Takes, Be consistent, have a growth mindset—you’ll thrive here.





Role Overview



The SDR plays in managing and overseeing the lead conversion process. You will act as a bridge between the marketing and sales teams, qualifying and converting leads to support our growth objectives







Key Responsibilities



Include but not limited too



Handle both outbound and inbound customer calls.

Set appointments between brokerages and our sales team.

Maintain accurate and up-to-date client profiles in the CRM system.

Demonstrate high-quality customer service by addressing brokerage needs and concerns.

Meet or exceed individual lead conversion and appointment-setting targets.

Develop an in-depth understanding of the US insurance industry to engage in meaningful conversations with potential clients.



Key Skills and Qualifications



At least 2 years of experience in a similar SDR role.

Proven success in client engagement and lead conversion.

Experience with CRM systems, preferably Hubspot

Strong communication skills in English (C1 level minimum).

title: Creative Strategist DTC
description:
About the Role



We are a fast-scaling DTC beauty and skincare brand doing 6 figures per month, and we’re looking for a Creative Strategist to lead the development of high-performing ad concepts for Meta 
 & Instagram).



You will research, ideate, and create ad concepts that convert — using storytelling, emotional triggers, and proven direct-response principles.

Your goal is to turn insights into creative strategies that drive real sales and help scale the brand to the next level.



You’ll work directly with the founder and marketing team, with full creative freedom and support to test, learn, and grow.



Key Responsibilities



- Research the target audience and understand their emotions, desires, and motivations.

- Develop creative ad angles, hooks, and scripts that connect emotionally and convert.

- Write clear creative briefs for video editors and UGC creators.

- Review ad performance results and identify ideas for new tests or iterations.

- Collaborate with the team during weekly creative planning and performance calls.

- Keep creative assets organized and maintain a structured testing system.



What We’re Looking For



- Experience in creative strategy, ad scripting, or direct-response copywriting (beauty, skincare, or eCommerce is a plus).

- Strong understanding of direct-response advertising and emotional storytelling.

- Ability to interpret performance data and turn insights into actionable ideas.

- Skilled in writing hooks, short scripts, and creative briefs.

- Highly organized, consistent, and willing to improve through feedback.

- Excellent English communication skills.



Day-to-Day Tasks

- Create 4–6 new ad concepts per week (scripts, briefs, or iterations).

- Research audience insights and new emotional angles.

- Communicate with the founder and editors on upcoming creatives.

- Review ad performance and update creative documentation.

- Attend weekly strategy meetings via Zoom.



What Success Looks Like

- You consistently create ad concepts that generate profitable sales.

- You bring fresh ideas and emotional storylines that resonate with the audience.

- You turn data and feedback into new creative concepts.

- You take ownership of the creative system and help improve it over time.



How to Apply



Please send:

- A short introduction about your experience in creative strategy.

- 2–3 examples of ads, scripts, or campaigns you’ve created (Google Drive or portfolio link).

- Your expected monthly salary (USD).

- A short explanation of your process for coming up with new ad ideas.

title: Entry-Level Healthcare Virtual Assistant (full/part-time)
description:
APPLICATION PROCESS:

1
 us your resume in PDF format only. Include all of the jobs you've worked at and the month + year. Do not leave anything off. Do not leave anything off.  You must provide an explanation of any gaps in your work history. Include the compensation you received for each job. Do not give us your hourly pay, only your annual compensation or total compensation.  If there is any gap in your resume without an explanation of the gap, you will be disqualified.  Do not send us a traditional resume or you'll automatically be disqualified.  Your resume should contain all of the above info we requested in order and easy for us to understand.  



2.
 us a 60-second video of yourself answering the following question:

What are the 3 most important things that the company you work for MUST do to show you that they care about you? For example, if they don’t give me these 3 things then that means they don’t care about me. The video CANNOT EXCEED 60 seconds, or you will automatically be disqualified.



3. IMPORTANT: Please
 us at 
 to follow the above instructions will result in automatic disqualifications.  Do not DM us or call us or contact us in any other way these will also automatically disqualify you.



ABOUT OUR COMPANY:

Achieve Integrative Health is the #1 rated Acupuncture & Wellness Clinic in the United States with over 760 five star google reviews. Our Mission is to help people restore their body’s God given ability to heal itself so that they can do what they love. Our vision is to equip and inspire one million people around the world to do what they love, when they want, with whom they want. 



WHY JOIN US?

• You’ll Achieve your Goals = our team provides all of the resources (information, training, opportunities) you’ll need to achieve all of your Professional, Financial and Personal Goals, as long as you are willing to put in the work and deliver results.



• Peace and Joy Team = we have a phenomenal culture of care for our patients and our tea
mbers. We are very strict with our rules, policies and core values in order to protect our culture of peace and joy.  Imagine being on a team where you don’t have to deal with people who talk behind your back and end up back stabbing you.  Imagine a team where all of your teammates want you to succeed in Life and they will do their best to help you achieve that.



• Be Highly Rewarded as a Side Benefit = imagine being able to do your Passion everyday and make a phenomenal living as a side benefit. The average "experienced" VAs in the Philippines/Indonesia make $5-$7 USD/hr, our entry-level VAs start off making $5/hr. We have a quarterly bonus program, where some of our tea
mbers have earned $500-$1,000USD per quarter, and this year 2025, because the team has performed so well, some tea
mbers were paid an 'additional' year end bonus of $2000-$3000 USD.



BENEFITS

• Competitive Total Compensation = $5-$12 USD/hr for graveyard shift only.

• Unlimited Opportunities for Growth = as long as you can generate more results for the company we will never limit your ability to grow within our company. Every tea
mber can also become a partner of the business if they desire.

• Other Benefits for qualified tea
mbers = paid-time off, premiu
dical insurance, Employee Savings Matching Program

• Work from Home = no more 2-4 hour commutes to work

• Wellness Initiatives = benefit from complimentary virtual health services from our medical providers, ensuring your well-being and your family’s well-being is always a priority.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

• Receive all inbound calls to close Leads wanting to receive treatments at our clinic

• Call,
, and use various communication forms to identify the validity and potential of the lead

• Receive all inbound calls to answer questions – fact find and qualify lead/route to appropriate tea
mbers

• Work with patients to ensure they are satisfied with the services provided

• Encourage happy patients to send us their success stories

• Share patient success stories during daily company meeting

• Implement our CARE system to follow-up with our patients to provide 5 star service

• Check-in and checkout patients

• Verify Insurance Benefits

• Other additional tasks may be added based on your strengths…



CHARACTER REQUIREMENTS & QUALIFICATIONS

• You must truly have a caring heart and truly want to help people improve their health, if you are mainly focused on how much money you can make, we are not the team for you

• You must speak Fluent English (ie. someone on the phone can understand what you're saying w/o straining)

• You must be organized and be able to handle multiple tasks and responsibilities everyday. If you’re looking to only do one or two tasks per day, we are the wrong team for you.

• You must be able to follow instructions exactly as written, if you don’t like reading scripts or following instructions, we are not the right team for you

• You must have a good heart. If you like to gossip behind peoples back, please don’t apply.

• You must value Results over effort. If you like to be paid based on how many tasks you completed or how much responsibilities you have, we are not the team for you. We pay ONLY based on you meeting your KPIs, metrics, quotas.

• You must sleep the same schedule 7 days a week, as this is a graveyard shift, you cannot switch back to the Philippines/Indonesian time zone on the weekends as this destroys your health. Your Health is our priority, and if you don’t value your own health we don’t want you on our team.

* if you are seeking recognition for your effort instead of recognition for exceeding your KPIs, then we are not the right team for you.

• You must be honest and have integrity. If you are caught lying, you will be immediately terminated.

• You must want to EARN your pay (ie. base salary + bonuses) instead of being given a pay (ie. focused only on base salary) that you didn’t earn.

* we are not looking for experience, we prefer candidates who have no medical VA experience, as having experience hinders your success on our team.  We are looking for character, who you are as a person. 



WORKSTATION REQUIREMENTS

• You must have a separate quiet room to work in. You can not have your children or anybody else in the room that you work as your screen will be displaying confidential information, no exceptions.

• There can not be any background noise in your room when you are making phone calls.

• You will be required to provide photos of your workspace

• We will also randomly ask you to show your workspace via your webcam, and if you are caught lying you will be fired immediately.



COMPUTER AND INTERNET REQUIREMENTS:

• Fast and reliable wired internet connection of not less than 100 Mbps

• Secondary and Tertiary Back up Internet of not less than 10 Mbps

• At least one Power Station Backup

• Dual Monitor

• Intel Core i3 or higher Operating System with at least 8gb RAM

• Excellent quality headset with microphone, and a working webcam



WORK SCHEDULE:

OPTION 1 > Full-time 8:00 - 18:00 (M-Th) 8:00-16:00 (F) U.S. Central Standard Time, 2-hr lunch breaks 

OPTION 2 > Part-time 7:00-13:00 (M-F) U.S. Central Standard Time 

OPTION 3 > Part-time 13:00-18:30 (M-F) U.S. Central Standard Time

title: Instagram Video Editor & Content Creator – AI Model Brand
description:
HIRING: Instagram Reels Editor – AI Model Brand

Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term | $200/month



?????????????????????????????????????

ABOUT THE ROLE

?????????????????????????????????????



We are building an Instagram page for an AI model brand and need a skilled video editor who specializes in retention-based Reels — videos that hook viewers instantly and keep them watching all the way through.



This is a full-time, long-term position. The output is high. The standard is higher. Every video you deliver must be genuinely great — not average, not decent. Great.



If you understand what makes people watch a video twice, this role is for you.



?????????????????????????????????????

EXACT DAILY DELIVERABLES

?????????????????????????????????????



5 days per week you will deliver:



RETENTION REELS (main output)

- 10 to 15 retention-focused Reels per day

- Every single video must be built to keep viewers watching from first second to last

- Strong hook in the opening 2–3 seconds — this is mandatory, not optional

- Tight pacing, no dead seconds, no filler

- Pattern interrupts, captions, and sound used strategically to hold attention

- Mix of styles — some feel realistic and native to Instagram, others are more creative and concept-driven

- All delivered in 9:16 format, 1080x1920, ready to post with zero revisions needed



EDITED HIGHLIGHT REEL (1 per day)

- 1 nicely edited, visually impressive video per day

- This is the "wow" video — polished, creative, cinematic if needed

- Can use transitions, effects, sound design, color grading, text overlays

- Must stand out and look premium



STORIES

- 1 to 3 Stories per day posted at different times (morning, midday, evening)

- Keeps the page active and the audience engaged throughout the day



MAIN FEED POST

- 1 polished main feed post every 2–3 days

- Highest quality content on the entire page

- Must be approved before going live



?????????????????????????????????????

TRIAL PROJECT (PAID)

?????????????????????????????????????



Shortlisted candidates will complete a paid trial before being hired full-time.



For the trial you will deliver:



10 RETENTION REELS

- These must be pure retention videos — built from the ground up to hold attention

- Every video needs a scroll-stopping hook, tight pacing, and a reason to keep watching

- Show us you understand retention, not just editing



1 NICELY EDITED VIDEO

- Your best creative edit — polished, impressive, visually cool

- This is where you show your editing skills and style



All files delivered in 9:16 format, 1080x1920, ready to post. No exceptions.



The trial is your one chance to show us what you can do. Average work will not move forward. We want to be genuinely impressed.



?????????????????????????????????????

REQUIREMENTS

?????????????????????????????????????



- Proven experience editing short-form video (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

- You must understand retention editing — hooks, pacing, pattern interrupts, rewatch loops

- Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects, or equivalent

- High creative output — you can produce 10 to 15 videos per day without sacrificing quality

- Experience with AI model, digital persona, or lifestyle content is a strong plus

- Reliable and able to meet daily deadlines without needing to be followed up with

- Good written English for captions and daily communication

- Stable internet connection and your own equipment

- Portfolio of real Reels or short-form work is REQUIRED — no portfolio = no review



?????????????????????????????????????

TO APPLY

?????????????????????????????????????



Send all of the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



1. 2–3 links to Reels or TikToks you personally edited (required)

2. Answer in 2–3 sentences: how do you build a Reel that keeps people watching until the end?

3. Confirm you can produce 10–15 Reels per day, 5 days a week

4. Confirm you are available full-time for long-term work

5. Confirm your rate is $200/month



We are looking for someone who takes real pride in their work and can deliver at a high volume without dropping quality. If that is you, we want to hear from you.



We respond to serious applicants within 1–2 business days.

title: Business Operations Specialist
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Position: Business Operations Specialist

Work Schedule: US Hours (EST)

Employment Set-up: Remote (Independent Contractor)  

Employment Type: Full-Time / Long Term

Salary Range: USD 1,500 - 2,000 / Month

Benefit: Unlimited PTO and HMO after the probationary period

Pay-out Frequency: Semi-monthly

Equipment: Self-Provide



Job Summary:



Wingz are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Business Operations Specialist to support daily operations and key initiatives within our growing healthcare transportation company. This role works closely with leadership to help ensure operational efficiency, support strategic initiatives, and assist with managing business contracts and vendor agreements.



The ideal candidate has experience working with business contracts, service agreements, and vendor partnerships, and is comfortable coordinating across teams to ensure contractual obligations and operational requirements are met.



Key Responsibilities:



Operations Support

• Assist leadership with daily operational coordination and business priorities.

• Monitor workflows and support improvements to operational processes.

• Maintain operational documentation, reports, and internal procedures.



Contract & Vendor Coordination

• Assist in reviewing and tracking business contracts, vendor agreements, and service-level commitments.

• Coordinate with internal teams and external partners to ensure contract terms and deliverables are met.

• Maintain organized records of contracts, agreements, and related documentation.

• Support leadership in preparing or updating operational agreements and vendor arrangements.



Client & Partner Relations

• Support communication with partners and clients regarding operational matters tied to service agreements.

• Help address operational issues while ensuring alignment with contract terms.

• Maintain strong working relationships with vendors, partners, and internal teams.



Strategic & Business Support

• Assist leadership with operational reporting and performance tracking.

• Support projects related to business growth, partnerships, and operational improvements.

• Help identify operational risks or inefficiencies related to contracts and service delivery.



Process Improvement

• Recommend improvements to operational workflows related to contract management and vendor coordination.

• Assist with implementing tools or processes that improve contract tracking and operational transparency.



Requirements:

• At least 3 years of experience in operations, business support, contract coordination, or a similar role.

• Experience working with business contracts, service agreements, or vendor contracts.

• Strong organizational and documentation management skills.

• Excellent written and verbal English communication.

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.

• High attention to detail when handling agreements and operational requirements.



Preferred Experience

• Experience supporting operations, partnerships, or vendor management.

• Background in logistics, transportation, healthcare operations, or service-based businesses.

• Familiarity with contract documentation, service-level agreements (SLAs), and vendor coordination.

• Experience working with remote teams and operational tools such as Slack, Google Workspace, CRM, or project management systems.

mbers and stakeholders.

• Build and enhance mobile application features using React Native for iOS and Android.

• Write clean, efficient, and reusable code following industry best practices.

Collaborate with Cross-Functional Teams:

• Collaborate with DevOps engineers to optimize deployment processes and infrastructure.



Database Management:

• Ensure data integrity and security.



Testing and Debugging:

• Write unit tests and perform debugging to ensure the reliability of applications.

• Troubleshoot and resolve issues in a timely manner.

• Conduct regular performance testing and optimize code for better performance.



Documentation and Technical Support:

• Maintain comprehensive documentation of the codebase and technical processes.

• Provide technical support and guidance to tea
mbers and stakeholders.

• Stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends and technologies to continuously improve skills and knowledge.



Requirements:

• Minimum of 5 years of professional experience in web development using Django and Django REST framework.

• Proficiency in Python, Django, and Django REST framework.

• At least 1 year of hands-on experience in React Native mobile development (mandatory requirement).

• Strong understanding of front-end technologies, such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

• Experience with RESTful APIs and web services.

• Familiarity with database systems (PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc.).

• Knowledge of version control systems, particularly Git.

• Experience with Docker and containerization is a plus.

• Understanding of cloud services (AWS, GCP, etc.) is advantageous.

• Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

• Strong communication and collaboration skills.

• Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

• Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies and methodologies.



Nice to have:

• Experience with front-end frameworks such as Vue.js or React (web)

• Experience with additional mobile frameworks (e.g., Flutter)

title: NEMT Routing Specialist
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Job Summary:



The NEMT Routing Specialist plays a critical role in the day-to-day operations of our transportation services. This role involves planning efficient routes, assigning trips to drivers, negotiating trip acceptance, and ensuring schedules run smoothly. Strong presentation and negotiation skills are key to motivating drivers to accept assigned trips and maintaining operational efficiency.



You will work closely with U.S.-based operations staff and drivers to optimize scheduling, improve trip efficiency, and maintain a high standard of service for patients.



 Work Schedule:  US Hours (EST)

 Work Setup:  Remote | Independent Contractor

 Employment Type:  Full-Time | Long-Term Opportunity

 Fixed Salary: USD 900/ Month

 Perks:  10 PTO days + HMO (after probation)

 Payout:  Semi-Monthly

 Equipment:  Self-Provided



Key Responsibilities:



• Plan, schedule, and optimize daily transportation routes for NEMT drivers.

• Assign trips to drivers and ensure acceptance through effective communication, presentation, and negotiation.

• Monitor driver schedules and adjust routes as needed for delays, cancellations, or emergencies.

• Communicate with drivers proactively to resolve concerns, provide support, and encourage timely trip acceptance.

• Ensure all trips comply with NEMT regulatory requirements and company policies.

• Maintain accurate records of trips, drivers, and route changes using company software.

• Collaborate with dispatch, operations, and customer support teams to resolve scheduling conflicts.

• Identify opportunities to improve routing efficiency and reduce operational costs.

• Generate reports on route performance, on-time metrics, and driver engagement.

• Provide insights and recommendations to management to enhance overall transportation operations.



Qualifications:



• At least 2 years of experience in routing, dispatch, logistics coordination, or transportation planning (experience with NEMT or U.S.-based operations is a plus).

• Background in sales, customer service, or client engagement is highly preferred to leverage presentation and negotiation skills with drivers.

• Strong English communication skills (verbal and written).

• Ability to motivate and influence drivers to accept trips while maintaining positive relationships.

• Familiarity with routing and mapping software (e.g., Google Maps, Waze, or route optimization tools).

• Excellent organizational, problem-solving, and time management skills.

• Ability to multitask and manage last-minute changes effectively.

• High attention to detail and accuracy in record-keeping.

• Comfortable working with U.S. time zones (EST).

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet workspace suitable for remote work.



Preferred Skills (Optional but Advantageous):



• Prior experience in Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT) operations.

• Familiarity with NEMT software platforms.

• Knowledge of U.S. transportation regulations and compliance requirements.

• Experience in data analysis or route optimization strategies.



What We Offer:



• Competitive monthly compensation in USD 

• Performance-based monthly bonus ($
per month)

• Paid training and onboarding

• Long-term and stable remote opportunity

• Opportunity for career growth in operations

title: Marketing Manager
description:
About Christlie G. Consulting LLC



Christlie G. Consulting LLC (CGC) is a full-service fractional HR firm headquartered in the United States, providing “boots-on-the-ground” HR support to clients across industries such as hospitality, logistics, healthcare, education, and professional services. We help organizations transform their HR operations through compliance, automation, and culture alignment.



As we continue to scale, we are seeking a dynamic Marketing Manager who can lead our marketing and growth strategy—combining creativity, analytics, and business insight to position CGC as a premier HR consulting firm in the U.S.



Role Overview



The Marketing Manager will lead all aspects of marketing, branding, and business development initiatives for Christlie G. Consulting LLC. This role is ideal for a strategic, self-driven professional who understands HubSpot, can build a marketing plan from the ground up, and drive measurable results in client acquisition and retention.



You’ll work directly with the CEO to design campaigns, recommend events and sponsorships, and lead the firm’s national rebranding initiative. This is a strategic leadership position that blends creative marketing with data-driven execution.



Key Responsibilities

Marketing Strategy & Planning



Develop and execute a comprehensive marketing plan that aligns with CGC’s business objectives.



Define marketing goals, KPIs, and budgets to measure campaign success and ROI.



Build marketing workflows,
 campaigns, and automation within HubSpot.



Lead quarterly and annual marketing strategy reviews with the CEO.



Client Acquisition & Retention



Design digital campaigns targeting small to mid-sized businesses in hospitality, logistics, healthcare, and education sectors.



Identify key customer segments and create tailored lead-generation funnels.



Implement nurture campaigns to retain and upsell existing clients.



Optimize client communications and touchpoints for improved satisfaction and brand loyalty.



Events, Sponsorships & Networking Strategy



Research and recommend U.S.-based industry events, conferences, and sponsorship opportunities that align with CGC’s client base.



Advise the CEO on which events to attend or sponsor to enhance visibility and credibility.



Develop pre-event and post-event marketing campaigns (e.g., landing pages, follow-ups, digital ads).



Coordinate webinars, speaking engagements, and community partnerships to expand brand reach.



Branding & Content Development



Lead CGC’s rebranding launch, including visual identity refresh, tone of voice, and website optimization.



Collaborate with designers to create marketing assets (case studies, presentations, newsletters, social content).



Develop thought-leadership content showcasing CGC’s expertise in HR consulting.



Manage brand consistency across all digital and print platforms.



Leadership & Collaboration



Act as a strategic advisor to the CEO on growth opportunities, new markets, and partnerships.



Work cross-functionally with HR leaders, sales, and operations teams to align marketing with service delivery.



Provide insights and forecasts on market trends, competitive positioning, and audience behavior.



Qualifications



5–8 years of experience in marketing, preferably in consulting, professional services, or B2B sectors.



Proven experience building and executing marketing campaigns using HubSpot.



Strong understanding of digital marketing, automation, analytics, and lead generation.



Experience creating marketing budgets, campaign strategies, and ROI analyses.



Excellent communication, storytelling, and project management skills.



Experience with event planning, sponsorship management, and vendor coordination.



Strategic thinker with an entrepreneurial mindset and the ability to work independently.



Preferred Skills



Knowledge of U.S. HR or professional services market trends.



Familiarity with CRM integration, paid ads, and SEO strategies.



Experience managing a small marketing team or freelancers.



Ability to create clear and engaging visual or written marketing content.



What We Offer



100% remote, flexible work environment.



Competitive compensation aligned with experience.



Opportunity to lead a nationwide marketing transformation.



Direct collaboration with the CEO and senior leadership.



A chance to define and grow the brand identity of a rapidly scaling HR consulting firm.



Join Christlie G. Consulting LLC and help shape the next chapter of our brand—driving growth, visibility, and innovation in HR consulting.

title: HRIS Implementation Project Manager
description:
Christlie G. Consulting LLC is a full-service fractional HR firm providing “boots-on-the-ground” human resources solutions to clients across the United States and abroad. We support organizations in every stage of growth—from HR audits and compliance reform to payroll transitions, benefits setup, and system implementations.



As we expand internationally, we are seeking an experienced HRIS Implementation Project Manager to lead and manage HR technology projects for our clients using platforms such as UKG, ADP, Paycor, and Paylocity.



Role Overview



This is a fully remote role responsible for managing end-to-end HRIS implementation projects. The ideal candidate is a hands-on project manager who can work independently, coordinate with cross-functional teams, and ensure successful system configuration, testing, and go-live for each client engagement.



You will partner directly with client HR teams, software vendors, and internal CGC consultants to deliver efficient, compliant, and fully functional HRIS environments.



Key Responsibilities



Project Management & Implementation



Lead full-cycle HRIS implementation projects across multiple platforms (UKG, ADP, Paycor, Paylocity, etc.).



Develop project plans, timelines, and milestones to ensure on-time, accurate delivery.



Manage all phases—discovery, design, configuration, testing, and deployment.



Translate business requirements into functional and technical specifications.



Coordinate with client leadership and vendor support teams to resolve issues quickly.



Maintain documentation, change logs, and implementation playbooks for each client.



Client & Vendor Coordination



Serve as the primary point of contact for clients during HRIS projects.



Conduct discovery sessions and requirement-gathering workshops with stakeholders.



Partner with HR, payroll, benefits, and IT departments to align workflows.



Liaise with software vendors to ensure system alignment with client needs.



Testing & Quality Assurance



Develop and execute test scripts for payroll, timekeeping, benefits, and data imports.



Validate data integrity and troubleshoot configuration errors.



Support user acceptance testing (UAT) and provide training documentation.



Post-Implementation Support



Oversee transition to client HR teams post-go-live, including handover documentation.



Provide stabilization support and ensure issue resolution within SLA.



Conduct lessons-learned sessions to improve future implementations.



Qualifications



5+ years of experience managing HRIS or payroll implementations.



Proven hands-on experience with UKG (Pro/WFM), ADP (Workforce Now/Run), Paycor, or Paylocity implementations.



Deep understanding of HR, payroll, benefits, and compliance workflows.



Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple clients simultaneously.



Excellent communication, documentation, and stakeholder-management skills.



Experience working in a consulting or multi-client environment preferred.



PMP, HRIP, or HRIS-related certification a plus.



What We Offer



100% remote work environment with international flexibility.



Competitive pay aligned with global markets.



Exposure to diverse clients across multiple industries.



Professional growth through leadership of full-scale HRIS implementations.



Join Christlie G. Consulting LLC and lead the future of HR technology transformation for clients across the globe.

title: Human Resource Business Partner
description:
Christlie G. Consulting LLC is a full-service fractional HR firm that provides “boots-on-the-ground” HR support for clients across industries including hospitality, food service, education, healthcare, logistics, and professional services. We partner with businesses that require compliance, workforce planning, payroll, and HRIS/LMS integration solutions while building strong people-centric cultures.



We are expanding our global HR team and seeking an experienced Human Resource Business Partner (HRBP) to manage a portfolio of clients and serve as a trusted advisor.



Role Summary



The HR Business Partner will oversee 3–5 client accounts, acting as the main point of contact for all HR operations. This role requires a strategic thinker and hands-on practitioner who can balance compliance, employee relations, recruiting, and organizational development while ensuring exceptional client satisfaction.



Key Responsibilities



Client Management



Serve as the dedicated HR partner for 3–5 assigned clients.



Build strong client relationships and deliver tailored HR solutions aligned with client goals.



Conduct regular check-ins, reviews, and strategy sessions with client leadership teams.



Talent Acquisition & Workforce Planning

Advise clients on workforce planning, staffing models, and talent pipeline development.

Compensation, Benefits & Payroll
