Organizational Development



Partner with leadership teams to design training, engagement, and retention strategies.



Implement programs for leadership development, employee culture initiatives, and succession planning.



Compliance & Risk Management



Conduct HR audits for clients and identify compliance risks.



Develop and implement corrective action plans and proactive compliance frameworks.



Qualifications



7+ years of progressive HR experience, including experience as an HR Business Partner, HR Manager, or HR Director.



Proven ability to manage multiple client accounts or business units simultaneously.



Strong knowledge of HR practices: recruiting, payroll, benefits, performance management, organizational development, and compliance.



Experience working across industries and/or in a consulting or multi-client environment is highly preferred.



Excellent communication, presentation, and client-facing skills.



Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial, and global consulting environment.



HR certifications (SHRM-CP, SHRM-SCP, PHR, CIPD, etc.) preferred.



What We Offer



Opportunity to work with diverse industries and client portfolios.



Flexible, remote work environment with international tea
mbers.



Competitive compensation aligned with global markets.



Professional growth through exposure to complex HR challenges across multiple clients.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist - Full Time, Remote
description:
We're a fast-growing marketing agency helping medical spas across the US get more patients through done-for-you acquisition systems. We have 27+ active clients and a tight-knit remote team that genuinely enjoys working together.



We're looking for a GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist to join us full-time. This is NOT an advanced automation or developer role. We need someone reliable who can execute our SOPs, manage client subaccounts, handle calendar integrations, and support client onboarding inside GHL.



What you'll be doing:

- Managing and maintaining client GHL subaccounts

- Setting up and troubleshooting calendar integrations

- Supporting client onboarding (following our step-by-step SOPs)

- Keeping subaccounts organized and running smoothly

- Communicating with the team via Slack



What we're looking for:

- At least 1 year of hands-on GHL experience (2+ years preferred)

- You know your way around workflows, calendars, pipelines, funnels, and contacts

- You follow SOPs well and pay attention to detail

- You're reliable, trustworthy, and love learning new things

- Available to work EST hours (10 AM - 6 PM EST), Monday to Friday



What we offer:

- $800 - $1,200/month depending on experience

- Stable, long-term position with a growing company

- Supportive team culture where you'll actually enjoy working

- Room to grow as we scale



Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week, 10 AM - 6 PM EST



HOW TO APPLY:

Please fill out our application form here: 



Important: Applications submitted only through OnlineJobs.ph messaging will NOT be reviewed. You must complete the form above to be considered.



We also ask that you record a short Loom video (under 5 minutes) showing us your GHL experience. Tips for a great video:

1. Show, don't tell - screen-share your actual work. Walk us through real projects or tasks you've completed.

2. Explain your thinking - don't just click through screens. Tell us why you made the decisions you did.

3. Keep it under 5 minutes - pick 2-3 things you're most proud of and go deep on those.

title: VA Interior Design Assistant
description:
About Us

We are a dynamic and growing interior design firm looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant (VA) to support our design team remotely. This role is perfect for someone with experience in interior design and a passion for supporting creative teams. You’ll work closely with designers to bring their vision to life through 3D modeling, project coordination, and procurement logistics. If you’re a detail-oriented professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities

- 3D Modeling & Rendering: Collaborate with designers to create high-quality 3D models and photorealistic renderings using design tools such as SketchUp, Revit, or similar software.

- Construction & Planning Documentation: Assist in preparing floor plans, elevations, sections, and other technical drawings for design development and construction.

- Materials & Product Research: Research materials, finishes, and furnishings that meet the project’s needs; compile detailed product specifications and comparisons.

- Vendor Communication & Procurement Support: Coordinate with vendors and suppliers to request samples, pricing, and lead times. Help prepare procurement schedules and manage order tracking.

- Project Coordination: Keep digital files organized, maintain project documentation, and ensure designers are updated on outstanding tasks and product delivery timelines.

- Administrative Support: Provide general administrative assistance, including scheduling meetings, updating client presentations, and entering data for project tracking.

Qualifications

- Proven experience in interior design support or a related Virtual Assistant role.

- Proficiency in design software: Revit (Priority), Enscape for SketchUp, Enscape for Rhino, or other rendering software. Familiarity with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, InDesign) is a plus.

- Strong research, organizational, and multitasking skills.

- Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

- Self-motivated, dependable, and able to manage tasks independently in a remote setting.

- Must be available to work during PST business hours.

Why Join Us?

- Work with a creative and collaborative design team that values innovation and attention to detail.

- Flexible, remote work environment that promotes work-life balance.

- Opportunity to grow and gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced interior design setting.

Ready to be part of an innovative design team?

If you’re passionate about interior design, tech-savvy, and thrive in a remote role, we’d love to have you onboard. Apply today!

title: Virtual Administrative Assistant (Real Estate Team)
description:
We are a fast-paced real estate team based in North Carolina looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized Virtual Administrative Assistant to support our daily operations.

This role is critical to keeping our systems, transactions, and client experience running smoothly. You will work closely with our team to manage backend processes so our agents can stay focused on serving clients and generating business.



Key Responsibilities:

* Maintain and update our CRM/database (contacts, tags, notes, lead status)

* Track and manage incoming leads, including routing and follow-up coordination

* Organize and maintain digital files, folders, and transaction documents

* Assist with transaction coordination from contract to close (checklists, deadlines, client communication)

* Track lead sources and help maintain reporting accuracy

* Ensure all systems are clean, up-to-date, and consistent across platforms

* Support the team with administrative tasks and process improvements



Top 3 Skills Needed

1. Extreme Attention to Detail

This role touches contracts, client data, and timelines, accuracy is everything. Small mistakes can have big consequences, so precision is non-negotiable.

2. Systems & Organization Mindset

You naturally think in processes, checklists, and workflows. You enjoy keeping things clean, structured, and efficient (CRMs, folders, tracking sheets, etc.).

3. Reliability & Proactive Communication

We need someone we can trust to follow through, meet deadlines, and communicate clearly. You raise your hand when something needs attention, not after it becomes a problem.



Bonus (Nice-to-Have)

* Experience with real estate transactions or CRMs (KV Core, Follow Up Boss, etc.)

* Familiarity with Google Workspace (Sheets, Drive, Docs)

* Experience working with U.S.-based teams



Hours & Availability

* Full-time (40 hours/week), Monday-Friday 

* Must have some overlap with U.S. Eastern Time

* 8am-12pm U.S. EST. The other 4 hours will depend on candidate.



When applying, please put “I’m Ready - Virtual Administrative Assistant  ” in the subject heading.

title: YouTube Creative Assistant (Scriptwriting + Editing + Strategy)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a high-level YouTube Creative Assistant to help launch and grow a YouTube channel from the ground up.



This is not just a video editing role.



You will be responsible for the full lifecycle of content from idea to final video. This includes researching topics, writing engaging scripts, and editing videos that keep viewers watching from start to finish.



If you understand what makes people click, stay, and engage on YouTube, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



1. Content Strategy and Ideation

You will research what content is currently working and identify opportunities we can capitalize on.



You will analyze competitors, trending topics, and keyword gaps using tools like TubeBuddy, VidIQ, or YouTube itself.



Before filming, you will create 3 to 5 strong video ideas including titles and thumbnail directions that are designed to get clicks.



2. Scriptwriting and Storytelling

You will write engaging scripts for 10 to 20 minute videos that feel natural and conversational.



You will structure each video to maximize retention by using strong hooks in the first 30 seconds, open loops throughout the video, and clear calls to action.



You will also include visual direction inside the script such as B roll ideas, on screen text, and pattern interrupts for the editor.



3. Video Editing and Repurposing

You will edit high quality YouTube videos with strong pacing, clean transitions, and engaging storytelling.



You will also identify key 
nts from long form videos and turn them into short form content for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.



You will use sound effects, music, and proper audio balancing to elevate the quality of each video.



4. Uploading and Optimization

You will handle the YouTube upload process including writing optimized titles, descriptions, tags, and pinned comments.



You will use SEO strategies to improve reach and performance.



You will also leverage AI tools like ChatGPT or Descript to improve speed and efficiency while maintaining quality.



What We’re Looking For



You have strong scriptwriting skills and can write content that sounds natural, not robotic.



You are experienced with editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro.



You understand YouTube retention, pacing, and how to keep viewers engaged.



You have a portfolio of past work that shows strong storytelling and editing ability.



You have strong English communication skills and are comfortable working remotely.



You stay up to date with YouTube trends and constantly look for ways to improve.



Compensation and Structure



Weekly or monthly payments via Wise or another mutually agreed payment method



Long term and stable position



Opportunity for growth as the business expands



Bonuses available for strong performance and reliability



How to Apply



Please send the following:



1 Your resume or CV

2 A short introduction about yourself and why you believe you are a good fit for this role

3 A screenshot of your internet speed test

4 An example of a simple Excel or Google Sheets project you have created



Important Application Test



When applying, include the number 101 at the end of your name in the subject line.



Example

YouTube Creative Assistant VA John Dough 101



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered. This helps ensure the full job description has been read.

Do you love working inside GoHighLevel and want to grow with a company that actually invests in its team?



We're MedSpa Marketing Masters, a US-based marketing agency that helps medical spas fill their schedules with new patients. We've got 27+ clients, a team that actually likes each other, and we're growing fast.



We need a GHL Specialist who knows the platform and can take ownership of day-to-day client account management. You'll follow clear SOPs, but we also want someone curious who loves figuring things out and learning as we grow.



Your day-to-day:

- Set up and manage client subaccounts in GHL

- Configure and troubleshoot calendar integrations

- Run client onboarding from start to finish using our SOPs

- Keep things clean, organized, and running smoothly

- Collaborate with the team on Slack daily



You're a great fit if:

- You have 1+ years working inside GoHighLevel (2+ preferred)

- You're comfortable with workflows, calendars, pipelines, contacts, and funnels

- You're detail-oriented and take pride in doing clean work

- You're someone who asks "why" and wants to understand the bigger picture

- You're honest, reliable, and the kind of person your team can count on

- You can work EST hours: 10 AM - 6 PM, Monday through Friday



What's in it for you:

- $800 - $1,200/month based on experience

- Long-term, stable position (we don't hire to fire)

- A team that values learning and personal growth

- Real ownership of your work, not just task completion

- Room to grow into more responsibility as we scale



Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week, 10 AM - 6 PM EST



HOW TO APPLY:

Fill out our application form: 



Do NOT apply through OnlineJobs.ph messaging only. You must complete the form to be considered.



Include a Loom video (under 5 minutes) showing your GHL experience:

1. Show, don't tell - screen-share real work you've done inside GHL

2. Explain your thinking - tell us why you built things the way you did

3. Keep it focused - pick 2-3 things you're most proud of

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
We are a growing real estate team looking for a highly motivated, independent, creative, organized Virtual Assistant. The ideal candidate will be professional, able to take initiative, works well with clients, suppliers and other agents and able to focus on the priorities of a rapidly changing day. This position performs a wide variety of administrative support services, ranging from complex to routine, all of which contribute to the efficient and professional operation of our real estate business.  



This role provides a lot of flexibility as you will have the ability to work virtually from home,  This is a great opportunity to learn and grow as an administrator.



The list below covers most of the tasks and responsibilities that will be required, but as the industry changes so will the role and expectations. 

Administrative & Executive Assistant Functions 



Assist in the preparation of listings, MLS drafts and open houses and coordinating with various vendors and suppliers 



Arrange showings and prepare showing materials Scheduling and booking appointments for showings and printing and organizing documents for showings and presentations  



Filing, manage files (digital and hard copy systems) and completing and compiling documents for trade records  



Answer phone calls when required and take messages, manage requests for information from clients and agents and calling agents for feedback on listings  



Arrange couriers, deliveries and pick-ups such as pick up new cheques or keys from tenants 



Data entry & Uploading Expenses - light bookkeeping 



Organize client events and help with event planning throughout the year 



Technology & Software 



Understanding and marketing listings on Social media - LinkedIn,
,
, Instagram, Youtube, etc. 



MS Office proficiency - Excel, Word and PowerPoint, Adobe PDF , Capcut



Manage client database CRM &
 systems  - followup boss



Toronto TREB Stratus MLS, Broker Bay, Webforms, Docusign/Authentisign, Quickbooks, Adobe Photoshop, Canva would be an asset 



 



Qualifications and Skills 



Preferred Skill Sets:  



Pleasant personality and strong interpersonal skills 



Excellent proofreading, written, verbal skills and professional phone etiquette 



Administrative experience would be an asset 



Computer literate; ability to use, learn and understand various software programs very well 



Flexible schedule of weekdays, some evenings and weekends (rare, but if needed) 



Must have Drivers License and access to a car  



Most of the work can be done from home, but may need to go to the office  



Required Behavioural Traits, Attitudes and Skills: 



Organized by nature, ability to create filing systems 



Self motivated, excellent time management and ability to work under pressure and tight deadlines if needed, ability to multitask  



Enjoys helping people and providing positive, friendly client services 



Honest, trustworthy, reliable and punctual 



Compensation 



Based on experience.  



We would like to thank all candidates for their interest in this opportunity. Due to the volume of resumes we may receive, we may only be able to respond directly to those candidates being selected for an interview. 



Job Type: Full-time

title: High Ticket E commerce Sales Position
description:
**High-Ticket Sales Representative (E-commerce)**



We are seeking a results-driven High-Ticket Sales Representative to join our growing e-commerce team. This role is ideal for someone who excels in consultative selling, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and can confidently handle premium customer interactions from inquiry to close.



**Key Responsibilities:**



* Manage inbound and outbound leads, guiding prospects through the full sales cycle

* Conduct consultative sales calls and close high-value deals

* Respond to customer inquiries via phone,
, and chat with professionalism and speed

* Maintain accurate records and pipeline management within CRM systems

* Collaborate with marketing and operations teams to improve conversion rates and customer experience

* Follow up consistently with leads to maximize close rates



**Requirements:**



* Immaculate spoken English with a confident, professional phone presence

* Strong written communication skills with attention to detail

* Proven experience in high-ticket sales (phone-based preferred)

* Experience in e-commerce customer service environments

* Familiarity with Shopify (asset)

* Experience using CRM platforms (e.g., GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce)

* Comfortable using AI tools to improve efficiency and communication



**Key Skills & Traits:**



* Strong closing ability with a consultative sales approach

* Excellent objection handling and active listening skills

* Highly organized with strong follow-up discipline

* Self-motivated, coachable, and performance-driven

* Ability to build trust and rapport quickly with customers

* Tech-savvy and adaptable to new tools and systems



**Bonus:**



* Experience selling high-ticket physical products (e.g., home improvement, outdoor structures, luxury goods)

* Background in remote sales or distributed teams



---

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Marketing Manager

Immigration Support Services (ISS)



Full-Time | Remote | Independent Contractor



Independent Contractor Notice

This is a full-time independent contractor position, not an employee position.

The selected candidate will operate as an independent contractor and will be responsible for managing their own taxes, compliance obligations, and business registrations as required by their jurisdiction.

No employer-employee relationship is intended or created by this engagement.



About Immigration Support Services (ISS)

Immigration Support Services (ISS) is a U.S.-based company that provides non-legal immigration support services, including business plan preparation, entity formation support, franchise opportunity sourcing, and related services for individuals pursuing U.S. immigration benefits.

We work alongside immigration attorneys and law firms across the United States and internationally to support individuals navigating the immigration process.

We are seeking a highly capable Marketing Manager to oversee and execute the company’s marketing efforts and drive measurable growth.



Position Overview

The Marketing Manager will be responsible for managing and optimizing ISS’s marketing systems, lead generation funnels, and performance tracking.

This role requires both strategic thinking and hands-on execution.

You will work directly with company leadership and coordinate with paid media specialists, developers, designers, and contractors.



Core Responsibilities:

-Paid Advertising Oversight

-Oversee and optimize paid advertising campaigns (Google, Meta, YouTube, etc.)

-Improve cost per lead and cost per booked consultation

-Monitor campaign performance and ROI

-Coordinate with external media buyers and vendors as needed

-Funnel & Conversion Optimization



-Improve landing page conversion rates

-Optimize intake forms and consultation booking flows

-Identify and fix funnel bottlenecks

-Increase overall conversion efficiency

-HubSpot CRM Management

-Build and optimize automated
 sequences

-Implement workflows and follow-up systems

-Track and manage lead lifecycle stages

-Improve consultation booking rates through automation and follow-up optimization



Website Optimization

-Identify opportunities to improve performance and user experience

-Coordinate implementation with developers

-Ensure site performance, speed, and usability are optimized

-Content & Marketing Strategy

-Coordinate content creation efforts

-Plan marketing initiatives aligned with company growth goals

-Ensure consistent and effective messaging



Reporting & Analytics

-Track key performance metrics, including:

-Lead volume

-Cost per lead

-Consultation booking rate

-Conversion rates

-Revenue attribution

-Provide regular performance updates and recommendations



Required Qualifications:

-3+ years of digital marketing experience

-Strong experience managing paid advertising campaigns

-Experience using HubSpot CRM

-Strong understanding of marketing funnels and conversion optimization

-Analytical and data-driven mindset

-Strong communication skills

-Highly organized and execution-focused

-Reliable and responsive



Preferred Qualifications:

-Experience marketing professional services

-Experience working with U.S.-based companies

-Experience managing paid media vendors or agencies

-Familiarity with compliance-sensitive industries



Performance-based bonuses may be offered based on measurable growth and performance.



Please include your expected monthly compensation when applying.

title: Public Relations (PR) Manager – Full-Time/Remote
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled and proactive Public Relations (PR) Manager to lead our firm’s media, publicity, and brand visibility efforts. This role is essential in strengthening our reputation, securing media opportunities, and supporting our attorneys and leadership team with interviews, speaking engagements, and public-facing initiatives. Candidates with experience in legal PR or professional services are strongly preferred.



Key Responsibilities:

Media & Thought Leadership

Identify and secure opportunities for podcasts, webinars, interviews, and speaking engagements

Prepare talking points, briefing documents, and professional bios

Build and maintain relationships with podcast hosts, journalists, and event organizers

Conference & Event Coordination

Research and recommend industry conferences and speaking opportunities

Handle logistics: registrations, booth materials, schedules, and coordination

Work with designers to create handouts, brochures, and branded marketing materials

Press & Publicity

Draft and distribute press releases for events, milestones, and announcements

Maintain press and media lists, track placements, and monitor PR activity

Serve as the primary contact for media inquiries

Testimonial Collection & Promotion

Collect written and video testimonials across all brands

Coordinate with the content team to edit and publish testimonials

Ensure all testimonials comply with legal marketing and ethical guidelines



Qualifications:



Bachelor’s degree in PR, Communications, Marketing, or a related field

3–5 years of PR experience (law firm or professional services experience is a plus)

Strong writing, editing, and media communication skills

Excellent organizational and project management abilities

Comfortable working directly with attorneys, executives, and media contacts

Familiarity with PR tools, press release platforms, and analytics/reporting

Knowledge of legal industry marketing standards is a plus



What We Offer:



Competitive salary + performance bonuses

Supportive and mission-driven team culture

Professional growth and development opportunities

Access to events, conferences, and networking platforms



Interested in Applying?

Please complete the application form:

title: PR Manager
description:
Position Summary

We are seeking an experienced and proactive Public Relations (PR) Manager to lead our firm's media and public relations efforts. This role plays a key part in enhancing brand reputation, increasing public visibility, and supporting our attorneys and leadership team with speaking, press, and media opportunities. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in PR strategy, event coordination, and media outreach—ideally within a legal or professional services environment.



Key Responsibilities

Media & Thought Leadership

Source and secure high-impact opportunities for podcasts, webinars, speaking engagements, and interviews

Conference & Event Participation

title: Admin Assistant for High-Level Clients
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time Administrative Assistant. This role is responsible for overseeing Mike Barron’s high-level clients. The Administrative Assistant will work directly with the owner of the company and the supervisors, who will play a vital role in supporting our high-level students, ensuring their success when it comes to building a company. Your primary responsibility will be to manage high level accounts, keep these accounts organized, work with the owner of the company when it comes to scheduling, ensure that these clients are completing the program and utilizing all inside personnel to get tasks completed.



Responsibilities:

Work directly with founder Mike Barron and his supervisors to manage and support high-level client accounts.

Schedule meetings between Mike Barron, supervisors, and partners to ensure alignment and progress.

Equip partners with the essential tools they need for success.

Serve as the primary point of contact for partners, handling communication across various channels with professionalism and efficiency.

Manage invitations to partner events featuring Mike Barron, confirming attendance and ensuring seamless coordination.

Oversee client progress in programs, ensuring they are meeting milestones and utilizing all available resources and personnel.

Keep accounts and schedules organized to streamline operations and enhance client satisfaction.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Proven experience as an Administrative Assistant or in a similar role.

Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills.

Strong written and verbal communication abilities.

Proficiency with scheduling tools.

Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines.

A proactive, problem-solving mindset with a client-focused approach.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.



About Mike Barron & Limelight Media LLC:

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. Many of our students are seeking career change and or looking to acquire high-ticket skill sets so as to achieve career advancement and financial freedom. We are leaders in the online coaching industry and have receipts of multiple “Two Comma Club” Awards.



I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and 
 and "influence" is a cornerstone of our operation. We create daily content, record coaching calls, case studies, short films, etc... The culture is fast-paced, raw, and fun... I was a former school President in my last job in 2013, and let's just say I'm Far (far) removed from that corporate-type environment. You can learn more about our community here: 
/watch?v=LdqINft4osw&t=75s.





A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!



Limelight Media offers many packages that teach personal awareness, sales techniques, skills to become a master closer, and how to become the best version of yourself!



Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.

title: Assistant Contract Analyst
description:
Position Summary



The Assistant Contract Analyst supports the Vice President of Compliance in managing the lifecycle of company contracts and agreements. This role focuses on contract preparation, review, tracking, and compliance oversight to reduce operational and legal risk. The position coordinates across departments to ensure contracts are accurate, compliant, and executed efficiently.



 



Essential Duties and Responsibilities



Assist with drafting, formatting, proofreading, and redlining company contracts and agreements.



Review contracts for accuracy, completeness, and consistency with company standards.



Prepare contract packages using Adobe tools and standardized templates.



Support the VP of Compliance and legal counsel with contract revisions and execution.



Identify missing documentation or contract risks and escalate appropriately.



Ensure contracts comply with applicable state regulations, licensing requirements, and company standards.



 



Technical Skills



Strong proficiency in Adobe Acrobat editing and redlining required.



Proficiency in Microsoft Word contract formatting required.



Excel proficiency required, including the ability to create, manage, and analyze tracking spreadsheets.



Experience with Smartsheet or similar project tracking systems preferred.



Comfort working with digital document management systems.



 



Experience



3 to 5 years of experience in contract administration, compliance, or the construction industry required. Roofing industry experience is strongly preferred.



Education



Bachelor’s degree preferred or equivalent relevant experience.



 



This position description is not intended to be an exhaustive list of duties. Responsibilities may change based on business needs.

title: UX UI 2D Animator
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a creative and technical Interactive 2D Animator to bring our cartoon characters to life through short, engaging micro-interactions. In this role, you will be bridging the gap between animation and user experience, creating 5-10 second interactive animations designed for digital platforms (TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Youtube Shorts.



If you know how to make audiences stop scrolling and actually interact with a video—like moving their thumb in a circle to pat a lucky black cat—we want you on our team.



What You’ll Do

• Animate Interactive Concepts: Conceptualize and animate cute, short (5-10 second) interactive loops featuring our established characters. Examples include:

"Put your finger on the screen to protect Gary Bee from the rain."

"Move your hand up and down to play ping pong with Heart Trooper."

Another reference example we always take inspiration from is an account called "Chimpers" on TikTok 

• Rig & Prep Assets: Take our existing static character files (Adobe Illustrator files) and transform them into fully animatable assets.

• Pipeline Management: Own the pipeline from ideation to animation for UX UI content.



What We’re Looking For



Strong Rigging Skills: You must be proficient in Character Rigging and Asset Preparation. You need the specific ability to transform our Adobe Illustrator (.ai) character files into functional rigs in Adobe Animate or Toon boom harmony.

Software Proficiency: Expertise in Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Animate, or Toon boom harmony.

Toon Boom Harmony Experience (Bonus): We currently have some existing rigs in Toon Boom Harmony. Experience animating and rigging in Toon Boom is a massive plus, though the ability to build new rigs from our Illustrator assets remains the core requirement.

Understanding of Social/Interactive UX: A strong grasp of timing, creativity, and how users interact with screens on mobile devices.





To Apply

Please submit your portfolio or showreel. Important: Your reel must include specific examples of character rigging (ideally showing the breakdown from vector asset to rigged character) and short-form or interactive animations.

title: AI Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
Role Summary

We are seeking an AI Implementation Specialist to help drive our internal APEX initiative, focused on bringing practical AI into the business to improve speed, accuracy, reporting, process consistency, and operational execution.

This is a full-time role for someone who is highly organized, resourceful, detail-oriented, and excited about using AI tools to solve real business problems. This person does not need to be a traditional software engineer, but they do need to be highly capable with modern AI tools and able to use them to build workflows, improve processes, create useful outputs, and move projects forward quickly.

You will start by supporting quality control and execution inside our APEX roadmap, helping validate outputs, improve workflows, organize information, and assist in implementation. Over time, this role will expand into building and improving AI-enabled systems across multiple departments.

This is a role for a builder. We are not looking for someone who only talks about AI. We are looking for someone who can use it to produce real results inside a real business.

What You Will Be Working On

Examples of projects in this role may include:

• AI-assisted SOP creation, refinement, and maintenance

• KPI dashboards, scorecards, and reporting support

• Workflow automations

• Process mapping and documentation

• Data cleanup and structuring for AI use

• Internal knowledge organization

• Quality control of AI-generated outputs

• Building practical tools and workflows that improve team performance

• Supporting implementation of our APEX roadmap across departments

Primary Duties

• Help execute and support our internal APEX initiative for AI adoption and business improvement

• Review, validate, and improve AI-generated work for accuracy, usefulness, and consistency

• Build and refine workflows using AI tools to improve business processes

• Assist in documenting SOPs, workflows, standards, and process maps

• Help create reporting tools, metrics tracking systems, and operational scorecards

• Organize business information so it can be used more effectively by AI systems

• Collaborate with leadership and internal tea
mbers to identify high-value opportunities for AI implementation

• Test ideas quickly, improve them, and turn them into repeatable systems

• Use good judgment to distinguish between useful output and low-quality AI-generated noise

• Support implementation projects across operations, admin, finance, customer service, and other business functions

• Maintain clear documentation of what is being built, why it matters, and how it should be used

• Continuously look for ways to improve efficiency, leverage, and execution

Tools and Systems You May Work With

Experience with all of these is not required, but comfort learning and working with tools like these is important:

• Claude Code

• Google Sheets / Excel

• ClickUp

• n8n

• Metabase

• SQL / Postgres / Supabase

• QuickBooks

• Other internal systems and operational tools

We will provide access to Claude Code for the person hired for this role.

Ideal Candidate Profile

We are looking for someone who is:

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Strong in written English

• Naturally proactive and resourceful

• Fast at learning new tools and systems

• Good at following structure while still thinking independently

• Comfortable working with ambiguity and figuring things out

• Process-minded and improvement-oriented

• Able to turn messy ideas into clean outputs

• Interested in business operations, not just technology

• Focused on usefulness, execution, and real-world results

• Curious, persistent, and capable of self-management

Essential Qualifications and Competencies

• Experience using AI tools in a practical business setting

• Ability to use AI to help create workflows, documentation, reports, or automations

• Strong written communication skills in English

• High attention to detail and strong quality-control instincts

• Ability to learn systems quickly and work across different business functions

• Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple tasks

• Good judgment and problem-solving ability

• Reliable follow-through and professional work habits

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with workflow automation tools such as n8n 

• Experience with spreadsheets, reporting, and KPI tracking

• Experience supporting SOPs, QA, process improvement, or operations

• Basic familiarity with APIs, SQL, databases, or structured business data (nice to have)

• Experience using AI to support implementation rather than just content generation

• Experience working with U.S.-based companies or remote teams (nice to have)

This Role Is Not For You If

• You only have theoretical interest in AI and no real examples of using it to improve work

• You rely on AI outputs without checking them for quality or accuracy

• Your written English is weak

• You struggle to follow structure, naming conventions, or process discipline

• You are not comfortable learning new software and systems quickly

• You need constant direction for every task

• You cannot work the required schedule consistently

• You are looking for a side job rather than a serious full-time role

Employment Details

Position Type: Full-time

This role requires full availability during assigned hours and cannot be combined with other employment.

Schedule: Monday through Friday, U.S. Central Time, 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM with a 1-hour break

Philippines equivalent timing will vary seasonally.

Compensation: PHP 45,000 - 75,000 monthly, paid weekly

Paid leave provided for recognized U.S. holidays when operations are suspended.

About Our Organization

Join Tri-State Tree Service, an industry leader with three decades of exceptional service throughout Pensacola, Florida and surrounding areas. Our TCIA accreditation places us among an exclusive group, with fewer than 1% of tree care companies achieving this distinction.

We believe in operational excellence, continuous improvement, and using technology to create real competitive advantage. We invest heavily in systems, equipment, process improvement, and innovation. This role is part of a larger initiative to build practical AI into the business in a way that creates real leverage and long-term value.

If you want to help build something meaningful, improve the way a real business operates, and grow with a company that is serious about execution, this is an excellent opportunity.

Application Requirements

To be considered, please complete all of the following:

1. Use AI Implementer as the subject line of your application

2. Submit your current resume

3. Provide a link to a video introduction of no more than 3 minutes explaining:

o your experience using AI tools in real work

o the most useful thing you have built or improved using AI

o why you are a strong fit for this position

4. Complete the short screening task below

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

Candidates must have a reliable computer, stable internet connectivity.

Screening Task

Please complete the following short task as part of your application:

Choose one business process that could be improved using AI. Examples:

• SOP creation or maintenance

• Quality control of team outputs

• KPI reporting

• Workflow documentation

• Customer service responses

• Task follow-up or internal accountability

Submit a short response that includes:

1. A brief description of the business problem

2. How you would use AI to improve it

3. What tools you would use

4. A simple example of the workflow

5. One risk or limitation of your approach and how you would handle it

Keep your answer practical and concise. We are not looking for the most technical answer. We are looking for clear thinking, good judgment, and real business usefulness.

title: Content Specialist & Video Editor
description:
Do you love video editing and want to grow your career in content creation?



We're looking for talented video editors who are ready to take on a bigger role as a Content Specialist.



In this role, you'll do more than just edit. You’ll be trained on our internal systems to create short-form captions using AI, schedule social media posts through our platform, and manage content workflows for your assigned client.



We are a content agency, and we often repurpose longer-form videos for YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikToks, as well as audiograms and graphics for social media. We also edit their raw videos for YouTube and edit podcast episodes as well.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Edit short-form and long-form content (YouTube, Reels, TikTok, podcasts)

Use our AI captioning system to create short-form captions

Schedule content to automatically post inside our proprietary platform

Follow creative direction and provide consistent, high-quality execution

Participate in weekly training sessions to continually improve your skills



Who We’re Looking For:



Professional experience with Adobe Premiere, After Effects, or similar tools

Strong eye for motion design and storytelling

Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage your time independently

Positive attitude and willingness to receive feedback

title: Video Editor for Ecommerce Ad Creatives
description:
About Us



We run multiple e-commerce brands selling physical products through Meta 
/Instagram) ads. Our business is built on high-converting video ad creatives — and we need a skilled video editor to become a core part of our creative team.



This is not a one-off project. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term, take ownership of the creative output, and eventually become our go-to person for all things video.



What You'll Be Doing



- Edit video ads (1–5 minutes) optimized for Meta platforms 
, Instagram, Reels)

- Create multiple hook variations for each ad concept (different openings, different angles)

- Source and curate stock footage, UGC clips, and B-roll to build compelling ad creatives

- Add text overlays, captions, transitions, sound design, and music to maximize engagement and watch time

- Adapt and localize winning international ad creatives for our target market

- Work from scripts and briefs we provide — but also bring your own creative eye and suggestions

- Deliver fast turnarounds with clean, organized project files



Requirements



Must Have



- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro or CapCut (or both)

- Strong understanding of video ad pacing, hooks, and retention techniques

- Experience editing direct-response or e-commerce video ads (not just vlogs or YouTube content)

- Ability to source and work with stock footage, UGC content, and product clips

- Good eye for typography, color grading, and visual hierarchy in ad creatives

- Reliable internet connection and able to work during overlapping business hours

- Strong communication skills — you ask questions when the brief is unclear, not after delivery



 Nice to Have



- Experience with After Effects for motion graphics and animated text

- Familiarity with what makes ads perform on Meta (thumb-stop rate, hold rate, CTR)

- Experience working with product-based businesses or dropshipping/e-commerce brands

- Ability to create simple product mockups or lifestyle composites



Why Work With Us



- Stable, long-term position — not a one-time gig

- Clear feedback loop: you deliver ? we give feedback ? you improve ? repeat until we're fully aligned

- Room to grow into a lead creative role as we scale

- Performance bonuses for ads that scale well (we reward results, not just hours)

- We respect your craft — you may know more than us about certain things and we're happy to learn from you too

- We pay properly and on time, every time



 How to Apply — Paid Test Task



**Important:** Do NOT just send your resume. We use a short paid test task to find the right person. Here's how it works:



1. We'll send you a product and a script for a 1–2 minute video ad

2. You'll create 1–2 edited versions of the video, each with 3 different hooks (openings)

3. We provide the script only — you source the footage, choose the music, handle the pacing and editing

4. We'll evaluate: edit quality, pacing, content sourcing, creativity, turnaround time, and how well you follow the brief

5. You'll be paid for the test task regardless of the outcome



This tells us more than any portfolio ever could. We want to see how you work, how you think, and how fast you move — not just your highlight reel.



To Apply, Please Include:



- A short introduction about yourself and your experience with video editing for ads

- Links to 2–3 examples of video ads you've edited (e-commerce preferred, but any direct-response work is fine)

- Your editing software of choice

- Your availability (hours per day / timezone)

- Confirm that you're ready to complete the paid test task





*We're not looking for perfection on day one. We're looking for someone who cares about the craft, takes feedback well, and wants to get better every single week. If that's you, apply now.*

title: Instagram Reels Video Editor (CapCut Only)
description:
Simple Editing | $4/hr | Long-Term Opportunity



Job Description



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Video Editor to help prepare Instagram Reels for posting.



This role involves very simple editing only. The main task is adding auto captions to videos using CapCut.



There is no creative editing required — you will simply follow our step-by-step process to ensure on-screen captions are added correctly and the videos are placed back into the correct folders.



Training will be provided, but basic familiarity with CapCut is important.



The most important qualities we are looking for are:



• Attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions carefully

• Good organisation

• Reliability and consistency

• Ability to work quickly and accurately



If you enjoy structured tasks and simple editing workflows, this role will be a great fit.



We value long-term tea
mbers, and for the right person this role can grow with increased hours and responsibilities.





Your Responsibilities



• Download video files from Google Drive

• Import the videos into CapCut

• Generate auto captions using CapCut

• Ensure captions are clear and properly synced

• Export the video

• Upload the finished video back to the correct Google Drive folder



All tasks will be taught through clear step-by-step training materials.





Software Used



You will only need to use:



• CapCut (required)

• Google Drive



No other editing software will be required for this role.





Requirements



We are looking for someone who:



• Has basic familiarity with CapCut

• Is very detail-oriented

• Can follow instructions exactly

• Works efficiently and consistently

• Communicates clearly with the team

• Has a stable internet connection



Bonus (not required):



• Previous experience editing Instagram Reels or TikTok videos

• Experience adding captions to videos





Pay & Hours



• Starting rate: $4 per hour

• Minimum 24 hours per week



This role may grow into more hours for the right candidate.



Tea
mbers who perform well typically receive pay increases after 3–6 months, along with opportunities for additional responsibilities.



We are looking for someone who wants a stable long-term position.





How to Apply



Please read carefully and follow the instructions below.

Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.





Step 1:



At the top of your application, write the word:



CAPCUT





Step 2:



Use this format for the subject line of your application:



Video Editor – Your Name – CapCut



Example:



Video Editor – Maria Santos – CapCut





Step 3



Answer the following questions:



1 - How familiar are you with CapCut? Briefly describe your experience.



2 -  Have you ever added captions to videos before? If yes, explain briefly.



3 - Imagine you finish editing a video but a
 upload it to the wrong Google Drive folder. What would you do?







Step 4 (Quick Editing Test):



What is the fastest way to generate on-screen captions in CapCut?

(Briefly explain the steps)





Step 5:



Please include your WhatsApp number so we can add you to our team communication group if you are shortlisted.





IMPORTANT TASK:



Please record a short Loom video (30–60 seconds) answering the following question:



“Why is attention to detail important when editing and adding on-screen captions to Instagram talking reels?”



Upload your Loom link with your application.





Lastly:



At the very end of your application, include the sentence:



I pay attention to small details.





IMPORTANT: Applications sent within the first 10 minutes of posting will be reviewed first.





If you are reliable, organised, and comfortable using CapCut, we would love to hear from you.

title: Social Worker
description:
Job Summary

The Social Worker (Resource Specialist) serves as the primary point of contact for clients navigating their rehabilitation journey. In support of the Rehabilitation Coordinator, this role focuses on identifying individual client needs, sourcing community resources, and ensuring that social, financial, and logistical barriers to recovery are addressed.



Key Responsibilities

- Client Intake & Assessment: Conduct comprehensive interviews with clients to identify psychosocial needs, housing stability, financial constraints, and vocational goals.

- Resource Coordination: Research, maintain, and update a database of community resources, including government assistance programs, non-profits, support groups, and vocational training.

- Client Advocacy: Act as a liaison between the client and external agencies to ensure the delivery of necessary services (e.g., insurance claims, housing applications).

- Case Support: Assist the Rehab Coordinator in developing individualized service plans; monitor client progress and adjust resource allocation as needs evolve.

- Crisis Intervention: Provide immediate support and referral services for clients experiencing acute social or emotional distress during their rehab process.

- Documentation: Maintain accurate, confidential, and up-to-date case notes and resource logs in compliance with healthcare privacy standards.



Required Skills & Qualifications

- Communication: Exceptional active listening and interviewing skills; ability to explain complex social service systems to clients clearly.

- Empathy & Professionalism: Ability to build rapport with diverse populations while maintaining clear professional boundaries.

- Organization: Strong multitasking skills to manage a high volume of client requests and resource tracking.

- Problem-Solving: Proactive approach to finding creative solutions for clients with limited access to traditional support systems.

title: Digital Patient Acquisition Manager
description:
Role Overview



This role is responsible for building and executing a comprehensive digital marketing strategy to attract new patients to our clinics. You’ll oversee performance across paid ads, SEO, and digital campaigns, using both proven methods and emerging tools like AI to maximize results.



Your success will be measured on one clear KPI: new patient growth.



Key Responsibilities



Patient Growth Campaigns: Develop and manage digital campaigns across Google Ads,
/Instagram Ads, and other platforms with the goal of generating new patient appointments.



SEO + AI Integration: Improve organic search rankings and visibility using SEO best practices, enhanced with AI-driven tools and strategies to maximize efficiency and content quality.



Performance Marketing: Continuously analyze ad performance, cost per lead, and conversion rates to optimize return on ad spend (ROAS).



Landing Pages & Funnels: Create and test patient acquisition funnels, optimizing booking flows and landing pages for conversion.



Data & Reporting: Track, measure, and report weekly on performance metrics including leads, cost per acquisition, conversion rates, and—most importantly—new patient appointments.



Competitive Analysis: Research competitors and industry trends to ensure Corrective Chiropractic maintains a leading digital presence in every market.



Collaboration: Work closely with the CEO and local clinic teams to ensure marketing aligns with overall business goals and patient experience.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Number of new patient appointments generated per clinic per month.



Cost per lead (CPL) and cost per new patient acquisition (CPA).



SEO rankings for high-value chiropractic keywords in each local market.



Growth in website traffic and conversion rates from digital campaigns.



Qualifications



3+ years experience in digital marketing with a proven track record in lead generation or patient acquisition.



Hands-on experience with Google Ads,
/Instagram Ads, and SEO strategies.



Familiarity with AI-driven tools for SEO, copywriting, and campaign optimization.



Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and make decisions.



Excellent communication and project management skills.



Experience working with healthcare or multi-location businesses is a plus.



What We Offer



Opportunity to work directly with the CEO of a fast-growing, multi-location healthcare company.



Remote role with flexible working hours.



Growth-oriented culture with clear performance metrics.



Chance to make a measurable impact on patient lives and community health.

title: WordPress Implementation & Website QA Specialist
description:
Marriage Helper is a marriage crisis education company based in Tennessee. We help thousands of couples and individuals save their marriages each year through intensive workshops, coaching, and online programs. We’re looking for a skilled WordPress specialist to support our marketing team with website implementation, technical QA, and site performance.



This is a remote contract role. All strategy and creative decisions are made upstream — your job is accurate implementation and catching what’s broken before it costs us.



What You’ll Do



WordPress & Elementor Implementation



- Implement AI-generated HTML and code into WordPress pages using Elementor HTML widgets — accurately and without modifying the code

- Build and edit pages in Elementor Pro using provided designs and copy

- Publish and format blog posts with correct headings, meta descriptions, tags, categories, and internal links

- Update CTAs, copy, images, and button links across the site as directed

- QA every page implementation on desktop and mobile before marking complete



Technical QA & Site Health



- Identify and flag JavaScript errors, broken links, and non-functioning buttons or forms

- Verify that website forms are correctly connected to GoHighLevel — confirm contacts are being created, tags are populating, and lead sources are recording correctly

- Test form submissions and trace data through to the CRM to confirm nothing is falling through

- Monitor and flag page speed issues, dead clicks, and broken elements

- Communicate findings clearly so fixes can be deployed quickly



WordPress Site Optimization



- Comfortable across all WordPress features: plugins, menus, redirects, user roles, media library, page settings

- Image optimization for web (WebP format preferred)

- Basic plugin management — installing, updating, and troubleshooting conflicts

- Support site speed improvements: image compression, caching plugin configuration, eliminating unnecessary scripts

- Support SEO implementation: meta titles, descriptions, schema markup, and internal linking as directed



What You Won’t Do



- Design pages from scratch

- Make creative or strategic decisions

- Write copy or marketing content

- Architect CRM automations



What We’re Looking For



- 2+ years of hands-on WordPress experience across all core features

- Strong Elementor Pro experience — specifically placing and troubleshooting HTML widgets without breaking layouts

- Comfortable reading and placing AI-generated HTML and CSS code accurately and QA-ing the result

- Experience with GoHighLevel at a form and contact level — confirming data is flowing correctly, not building automations

- Strong attention to detail — you find your own errors before flagging done

- Clear written English communication

- Reliable internet with availability overlap during US Central Time

- Familiarity with Google Analytics or Microsoft Clarity is a plus

- Basic understanding of page speed factors and Core Web Vitals is a plus

description:
We are a growing medical software platform looking for a highly motivated and professional Appointment Setter to connect with medical practices across the United States.



In this remote role, your primary objective will be calling medical offices, navigating gatekeepers (front desk staff and Office Managers), and scheduling 20 minute introductory Zoo
etings for our sales team. You will be provided with a targeted lead list, proven scripts, and ongoing support to help you succeed.



Responsibilities:



Make outbound cold calls to medical practices to generate interest in our software platform.



Professionally navigate gatekeepers and identify the correct decision-makers (Office Managers or Doctors).



Schedule qualified 20-minute introductory meetings on our calendar.



Send follow-up and reminder
s to ensure the prospect attends the meeting.



Accurately record all call activities, notes, and outcomes in Zoho CRM in real-time.



Requirements:



Availability: Must be able to work 25 hours per week during standard daytime business hours in the US Pacific Time Zone (PT).



Experience: Proven B2B cold calling and appointment setting experience. Experience calling into US medical or dental offices is a massive plus.



Communication: Excellent, clear English with a friendly, professional, and confident phone presence.



Tech-Savvy: Comfortable using Zoho CRM to log all activities and manage your pipeline.



Mindset: Resilience to handle rejection, politely bypass gatekeepers, and keep a positive attitude.



Compensation:

This role offers a reliable base rate with highly motivating performance incentives. You will earn a $5.00/hour base rate PLUS a $20.00 bonus for every qualified appointment that successfully attends the Zoo
eting. High earning potential for proven closers who can consistently put decision-makers on the calendar.



Wage/Salary

$5.00 / hour + $20.00 Bonus per qualified, attended appointment
