title: Virtual Assistant - Real Estate Experience is a Bonus
description:
We are a growing real estate team looking for a highly motivated, independent, creative, organized Virtual Assistant. The ideal candidate will be professional, able to take initiative, works well with clients, suppliers and other agents and able to focus on the priorities of a rapidly changing day. This position performs a wide variety of administrative support services, ranging from complex to routine, all of which contribute to the efficient and professional operation of our real estate business.



This role provides a lot of flexibility as you will have the ability to work virtually from home, This is a great opportunity to learn and grow as an administrator.



The list below covers most of the tasks and responsibilities that will be required, but as the industry changes so will the role and expectations.

Administrative & Executive Assistant Functions



Assist in the preparation of listings, MLS drafts and open houses and coordinating with various vendors and suppliers



Arrange showings and prepare showing materials Scheduling and booking appointments for showings and printing and organizing documents for showings and presentations



Filing, manage files (digital and hard copy systems) and completing and compiling documents for trade records



Answer phone calls when required and take messages, manage requests for information from clients and agents and calling agents for feedback on listings



Arrange couriers, deliveries and pick-ups such as pick up new cheques or keys from tenants



Data entry & Uploading Expenses - light bookkeeping



Organize client events and help with event planning throughout the year



Technology & Software



Understanding and marketing listings on Social media - LinkedIn,
,
, Instagram, Youtube, etc.



MS Office proficiency - Excel, Word and PowerPoint, Adobe PDF , Capcut



Manage client database CRM &
 systems - lofty



Toronto TREB Stratus MLS, Broker Bay, Webforms, Docusign/Authentisign, Quickbooks, Adobe Photoshop, Canva would be an asset







Qualifications and Skills



Preferred Skill Sets:



Pleasant personality and strong interpersonal skills



Excellent proofreading, written, verbal skills and professional phone etiquette



Administrative experience would be an asset



Computer literate; ability to use, learn and understand various software programs very well



Flexible schedule of weekdays, some evenings and weekends (rare, but if needed)



Required Behavioural Traits, Attitudes and Skills:



Organized by nature, ability to create filing systems



Self motivated, excellent time management and ability to work under pressure and tight deadlines if needed, ability to multitask



Enjoys helping people and providing positive, friendly client services



Honest, trustworthy, reliable and punctual



Compensation



Based on experience.



We would like to thank all candidates for their interest in this opportunity. Due to the volume of resumes we may receive, we may only be able to respond directly to those candidates being selected for an interview.



Job Type: Full-time

title: Personal Executive Assistant (2+ years experience required)
description:
We're hiring a Personal Executive Assistant for a multi-brand ecom founder based in Dubai.



We DON'T consider you if you send an AI response!



Details: Remote, full-time (100% reliable person)

• $500–$3500/month depending on experience 

• A+ player team across multiple brands 

• Work directly with the founder 

• GMT+4 timezone hours (Dubai) 

• Long-term role that grows with the business



I'm an entrepreneur running multiple e-commerce brands. I'm based in Dubai, travel frequently between Europe and the Middle East, and manage several business entities. 



I need one exceptional person to take everything off my plate that isn't high-level strategy or creative direction. If you're the type of person who figures things out before being asked, keep reading.



What you'll do: 

• Book all flights, hotels, and transportation, research the best options, know my preferences, and handle everything from departure times to visa requirements without me having to think about it 



• Manage my calendar across multiple time zones, schedule meetings, block focus time, flag conflicts, and never let anything fall through the cracks 



• Think 3 months ahead at all times, track deadlines, renewals, visa expirations, lease end dates, upcoming trips, and send me weekly briefings so I'm never surprised 



• Conduct research on anything I need, apartment comparisons, wealth management firms, office furniture, service providers, and present the top 2-3 options with a recommendation, not a data dump 



• Manage communications with brokers, accountants, service providers, and legal contacts, draft
s, follow up, keep everything moving 



• Handle admin for a secondary business (small e-commerce site), product updates, supplier coordination, small operational tasks 



• Handle personal logistics, SIM registrations, bank appointments, sourcing purchases, coordinating local services in Dubai • Manage my inbox when needed, flag urgent items, draft responses, archive noise



What I'm looking for: 

• Highly intelligent and resourceful, you figure things out on your own before escalating (if not we won't work with you!) 



• Obsessively punctual and detail-oriented, you triple-check dates, times, and details because mistakes cost real money (if not we won't work with you!) 



• Direct communicator, no fluff, no sugarcoating, you say what needs to be said clearly and immediately (if not we won't work with you!) 



• Proactive and forward-thinking, you anticipate what's needed before being asked



• Exceptional written and spoken English (if not we won't work with you!) 



• 2+ years experience as an EA, PA, or Chief of Staff, ideally for a founder, CEO, or HNW individual (if not we won't work with you!) 



• Expert in Google Workspace, Slack, and project management tools (if not we won't work with you!) 



• Trustworthy and discreet, you'll have access to sensitive business and personal information 



After 30 days, I should never have to: 

• Book my own flights or accommodation 

• Chase anyone for a response 

• Remember a deadline or renewal 

• Research options for a decision, you present them ready for approval



Fill in this form to apply: (don't waste your time filling this in if you don't match the previous criteria)

title: Bilingual Administrative Assistant (Cantonese/Mandarin)
description:
We're looking for a bilingual Admin Assistant who is fluent in English and Cantonese or Mandarin to support a boutique law firm based in California, serving clients throughout the San Francisco Bay Area. The firm practices family law, employment law, and civil rights, and roughly half of its clients are Chinese-speaking. This role exists to make sure those clients are never left without clear, accurate communication at any point in their experience with the firm.



The split is approximately 30% live interpretation and translation, 70?ministrative support. You do not need a legal background. You do need to be sharp, dependable, and comfortable switching between languages in real client-facing situations.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Up to **14 days** of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you’re most productive

- Direct involvement in meaningful legal matters that affect real people

- Small team environment where your work has immediate visibility and impact



## What You'll Work On



**Interpretation and Translation**



- Provide live interpretation between English and Cantonese or Mandarin during client calls, consultations, and case discussions

- Translate written documents,
s, and client-facing materials as needed

- Ensure accuracy and tone are preserved across both languages in sensitive legal contexts

- Serve as a communication bridge between the legal team and Chinese-speaking clients

- Step in for interpretation support on short notice when client needs arise



**Administrative Support**



- Handle data entry, document management, and file organization across firm systems

- Assist with basic bookkeeping tasks including expense tracking and invoice logging

- Draft, review, and respond to
s on behalf of the team as directed

- Support day-to-day operations across scheduling, client follow-ups, and internal coordination

- Maintain organized records with attention to detail and confidentiality



**Marketing Support (Nice to Have)**



- Assist with social media posting, content scheduling, or basic digital marketing tasks

- Help draft client-facing communications or update website copy when needed

- Support any outreach or visibility initiatives the firm pursues



## What You Bring



- Full professional fluency in English and Cantonese or Mandarin, written and spoken

- Cantonese fluency is strongly preferred, as most Cantonese speakers also speak Mandarin

- Prior experience in an administrative, legal, or client-facing support role

- Comfort handling live interpretation in professional or high-stakes conversations

- Strong written communication skills in both English and Chinese

- Proficiency in standard productivity tools including
, spreadsheets, and document management platforms

- High attention to detail and a strong sense of confidentiality

- Ability to manage shifting priorities in a small, fast-moving team



## Nice to Have



- Background in legal, paralegal, or professional services environments

- Basic bookkeeping or accounting experience

- Experience with any legal practice management software

- Social media or digital marketing skills



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes)** introducing yourself in both English and Cantonese or Mandarin, and briefly describing a situation where you had to communicate clearly across a language barrier in a professional setting



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.**



If you are fluent in both worlds, can hold a room in two languages, and take pride in making every client feel understood, this role puts you at the center of work that genuinely matters.

title: Executive Assistant – Funding Operations
description:
Job Title: Executive Assistant – Funding Operations

Location: Remote

Working Hours: U.S. Eastern Standard Time (Full-Time | 40 hours/week)



Job Title: Executive Assistant – Funding Operations

Location: Remote

Working Hours: U.S. Eastern Standard Time (Full-Time | 40 hours/week)



Position Overview



We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to support a U.S.-based funding business specializing in credit card stacking and financing solutions for clients with high-interest debt and limited credit access.



This role is heavily focused on operations, requiring the ability to manage funding applications, coordinate with brokers, review credit-related information, and ensure that deals move efficiently through the pipeline. You will play a critical role in maintaining speed, accuracy, and organization in a fast-paced, deal-driven environment.



The Executive Assistant will primarily support backend operations and broker communications, while the business owner manages direct relationships with clients and financial institutions.



Key Responsibilities



Deal Processing and Broker Communication



Manage incoming funding applications submitted by brokers



Communicate with brokers via
 to request missing documentation and provide status updates



Send pre-approvals, declines, and contract documents



Ensure contract requests are processed and sent within 30 minutes



Maintain fast and professional communication to help secure deals in a competitive environment



Client File Management



Organize and maintain client funding files and documentation



Track each deal throughout the approval and funding lifecycle



Ensure all required documents are complete before funding proceeds



Maintain accurate and well-structured records for each client file



Credit Review Support



Conduct soft credit checks for potential clients



Review credit reports and identify key financial indicators such as debt obligations, credit utilization, and overall credit profile strength



Assist in preparing internal deal summaries for review



Administrative and Operational Support



Input and maintain deal data in Excel and internal tracking systems



Assist with onboarding processes and documentation collection



Support day-to-day operational workflows to keep deals moving efficiently



Assist leadership in maintaining an organized and structured deal pipeline



Process and Workflow Coordination



Ensure applications move efficiently through each stage of the funding process



Identify and flag incomplete files or missing documentation



Maintain organized internal systems for tracking deals and client information



Assist in improving workflows and documenting processes for scalability



Potential Future Responsibilities



Access client bank accounts through secure systems to verify balances and statements



Assist with underwriting preparation and deeper financial review



Support advanced deal tracking, reporting, and operational analysis



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is fast, detail-oriented, and highly responsive, with the ability to manage multiple deals at once while maintaining accuracy. You should be comfortable working in a high-volume, deadline-driven environment and able to anticipate next steps without constant supervision.



You are someone who takes ownership of your work, communicates clearly, and thrives in structured, process-driven roles.



Required Skills



Strong written English communication skills, particularly in
 correspondence



Ability to review and interpret credit reports



Proficiency in Excel or spreadsheet tools



Strong organizational and multitasking abilities



Ability to follow structured processes while maintaining speed and accuracy



High attention to detail, especially when handling financial data



Preferred Experience



Experience as an Executive Assistant or Operations Assistant



Background in financial services, lending, or credit-related industries



Experience reviewing credit reports or financial documentation



Experience working with U.S.-based clients or brokers



Exposure to loan processing, underwriting support, or funding operations



How to apply: Please send us your CV , Intro video & Whatsapp number

title: Inside Sales Associate | Growth Path to Appointment Setter and Closer ( $4/Hour + Commission )
description:
Inside Sales Associate | Growth Path to Appointment Setter and Closer



Job Type:

Remote | Part-Time or Full-Time

Base Pay + Commission + Growth Opportunity



About the Role



We are looking for an Inside Sales Associate to join our growing U.S.-based team, focused primarily on our Fire Alarm and Safety business.



This role is a strong fit for someone who wants to build a real future in sales. You will start by supporting lead generation, prospect research, lead organization, and follow-up coordination. As you gain experience, improve your communication, and prove your performance, you will be trained into Appointment Setting and may eventually grow into a Closer role.



This is not just a basic support position. It is a long-term opportunity for someone who is coachable, organized, strong in English, and serious about growing in sales.



Growth Path



This role is designed to develop over time:



>>Stage 1: Inside Sales Associate



>>Stage 2: Appointment Setter



>>Stage 3: Closer



We are looking for someone who is willing to learn step by step and grow with the company.



What You’ll Do



Your responsibilities will include:



>>>Researching potential clients online

>>>Building targeted lead lists

>>>Finding key decision-makers and accurate contact details

>>>Organizing and updating lead data in spreadsheets or CRM

>>>Supporting lead qualification based on company criteria

>>>Assisting with outreach preparation and follow-up tracking

>>>Helping maintain a clean and organized sales pipeline

>>>Supporting appointment-setting efforts as training progresses



As You Grow, You May Also Be Trained On



>Lead qualification

>Outreach follow-up

>Appointment setting

>Warm lead handling

>Early-stage sales conversations

>Supporting or eventually taking on closing responsibilities



Who We’re Looking For



We want someone who is:



>>Strong in written English

>>Good in spoken English

>>Organized and detail-oriented

>>Good at online research

>>Reliable and consistent

>>Able to follow systems and instructions

>>Coachable and willing to improve

>>Interested in building a long-term career in sales



Preferred but Not Required



>>Experience in lead generation

>>Experience in inside sales

>>Experience in appointment setting

>>Experience in B2B sales

>>Background in fire alarm, low voltage, construction, engineering, or technical services

>>Experience using CRM tools or lead tracking systems



Compensation



>>Base pay to start, depending on experience

>>Commission opportunities

>>Increased earning potential as responsibilities grow

>>Performance-based advancement



********Why Join Us*******



>Clear path for growth in sales

>Hands-on training and development

>Opportunity to work in a specialized U.S. service industry

>Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

Responsive and dependable

title: Commercial Property Operations Coordinator
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.****** 



Commercial Property Operations Coordinator



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Pacific Time, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1100 per month



Job Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Commercial Property Operations Coordinator to support a commercial real estate portfolio of retail and office properties by overseeing maintenance tracking, vendor coordination, compliance monitoring, lease administration support, and day-to-day operational follow-ups. This role works closely with the onshore property management team to ensure tasks are properly tracked, vendors are consistently followed up with, timelines are met, and nothing falls through the cracks during high-volume periods. Spanish-speaking ability is required to effectively communicate with Spanish-speaking vendors.



Key Responsibilities:



* Maintenance & Work Order Tracking

Maintain a master log of maintenance and repair items across commercial properties

Track work orders from scheduling through completion and invoicing

Follow up with vendors and onsite staff to confirm timelines and status

Flag delays, non-responses, or repeat issues for escalation

Maintain clear status categories (requested, scheduled, in progress, completed, invoiced)



* Vendor Coordination & Follow-Up

Send bid requests and RFPs using approved templates

Track incoming proposals and follow up on outstanding bids

Coordinate vendor scheduling and access after vendor selection

Collect close-out documentation (photos, completion confirmation, invoices)

Assist with vendor onboarding documentation (W-9s, COIs, licenses)



* Administrative & Compliance Support

Answer office phone

Track routine inspections, testing, and compliance items (fire/life safety, elevator, backflow, etc.)

Assist with COI tracking for tenants and vendors

Support documentation requests from tenants, vendors, lenders, and internal team

Maintain organized digital files and trackers for commercial properties

Assist with utility account transfers and service changes as directed



* Lease & Property Administration (Non-Legal)

Maintain lease abstract summaries (critical dates, options, notice deadlines)

Track upcoming renewals, options, and notice requirements

Prepare routine notices using approved templates for review

Maintain updated tenant contact lists and
 distribution lists.



* Task Tracking & Operational Support

Track open items and ensure follow-up

Send reminders and status updates to keep projects moving

Support multiple concurrent projects by maintaining timelines and next steps

Provide weekly status summaries of open items and priorities



Required Skills & Qualifications:



2–4 years of experience supporting commercial property management or real estate operations

Spanish language proficiency (spoken) is preferred to support vendor coordination

Familiarity with maintenance workflows, vendor coordination, and property documentation

Strong organizational and follow-up skills

Excellent written English and professional communication skills

Comfortable working with spreadsheets, trackers, and task management tools

Detail-oriented, reliable, and comfortable working behind the scenes

Able to manage multiple tasks and follow up consistently without dropping items



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Post Production Specialist
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.******



Post Production Specialist



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1000 per month



Job Overview: 



We are seeking a detail-oriented Post Production Specialist to support our growing production team, with a strong focus on quality control and the review of already edited images. This role blends technical post-production knowledge with light administrative support to ensure high-quality deliverables and efficient workflows. It is well suited for someone with experience in real estate photography and a strong appreciation for producing visually compelling content.



This position is ideal for a candidate with a solid understanding of the post-production workflow, a sharp eye for detail, and a genuine passion for quality assurance. As a collaborative, team-facing role, excellent English communication skills and the ability to build strong, professional working relationships are essential.



Key Responsibilities:

Review and quality-check edited images to ensure accuracy, consistency, and adherence to production standards.

Identify errors, inconsistencies, or areas for improvement and provide clear, constructive feedback.

Ensure final outputs meet established quality benchmarks before delivery.

Collaborate closely with editors and internal tea
mbers to maintain workflow efficiency.

Communicate clearly and professionally to support alignment across the team.

Maintain organized records of revisions, feedback, and approvals.

Contribute ideas and suggestions to improve post-production and QC processes.



Qualifications: 

Solid understanding of the image editing and post-production process.

Strong attention to detail and a passion for quality control.

Ability to collaborate effectively in a remote, team-based environment.

Confident in providing feedback in a professional and constructive manner.

Highly organized, reliable, and responsible.

Prior experience in post-production, image review, or quality assurance is strongly preferred.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

title: Amazon International Marketplace Specialist
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED AS AN APPLICANT, PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR MOST UP-TO-DATE RESUME AND A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TAILORED TO THIS JOB POSTING!******



Amazon International Marketplace Specialist



Job Type: Full-Time 

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 7:00 AM - 4:00 PM PST, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1000 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking an experienced Amazon International Marketplace Specialist to oversee and grow our presence across Amazon’s global marketplaces. This role requires hands-on experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts, driving sales growth, and optimizing operations across multiple regions. The ideal candidate is analytical, detail-oriented, and has a proven track record of successfully navigating international e-commerce environments.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage day-to-day operations of Amazon accounts across international marketplaces (e.g., US, UK, Germany, Japan, Canada, etc.).

Develop and execute strategies to increase sales, improve conversion rates, and enhance product visibility internationally.

Optimize product listings for SEO, content, and localized messaging in different markets.

Monitor inventory levels, forecast demand, and coordinate with supply chain and fulfillment partners.

Analyze sales performance, customer reviews, and competitor activity to inform strategy.

Implement Amazon advertising campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, etc.) to maximize ROI.

Ensure compliance with Amazon policies, international trade regulations, and local laws.

Collaborate with marketing, logistics, and product teams to execute promotions and launches.



Qualifications:

3-5 years of proven experience managing Amazon accounts in one or more international marketplaces.

Strong knowledge of Amazon Seller Central, Vendor Central, and related tools.

Demonstrated experience with Amazon SEO, advertising, and account optimization strategies.

Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and make informed decisions.

Strong project management skills and attention to detail.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

Experience with cross-border e-commerce, international shipping, and tax considerations is a plus.





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Online Nursing Tutor (PMHNP, Leadership, and Academic Writing Tracks - Nursing Grads)
description:
Job Description:

We are seeking qualified nurses for a remote tutoring role under a developing academic support initiative. This opportunity is ideal for nurses who are strong in teaching, writing, and guiding aspiring healthcare workers in academic and professional development.



Tutors will provide structured support across three tutoring tracks:



1) Psychiatric Nursing / PMHNP Track

Support learners in psychiatric nursing and mental health-related topics such as assessment, psychopathology, psychopharmacology, therapeutic communication, case analysis, treatment planning, and clinical documentation.



2) Nursing Leadership Track

Support learners in leadership, decision-making, communication, professionalism, healthcare systems, team coordination, quality improvement, and related nursing leadership topics.



3) Academic Writing and Clinical Documentation Track

Support learners in source-based writing, care plans, case summaries, reflection papers, discussion responses, documentation structure, grammar, organization, and professional written communication.



This role involves tutoring, academic coaching, writing support, and helping learners build stronger professional habits. We are looking for applicants who can explain concepts clearly, write well, and guide others in a responsible and academically honest way.



Requirements:

 • Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) required

 • Active RN license required

 • Strong written English skills

 • Strong academic and professional communication skills

 • Organized, responsible, and detail-oriented

 • Able to tutor, explain concepts clearly, and provide constructive feedback

 • Interest or experience in psychiatric nursing, leadership, documentation, or academic support is an advantage



Important Academic Integrity Standard:

This role requires strong writing ability and respect for original work. Tutors must be comfortable guiding learners using credible sources, proper citation, and clear academic writing.



No AI-generated academic work is allowed.

Tutors must not use AI to write assignments, case analyses, discussion posts, reflection papers, or other academic submissions for learners. All work must be original, source-based, and completed with academic integrity.



Compensation:

Gig-based and performance-based. Further details will be discussed with selected applicants.



Application Requirements:

Please submit the following in clear PDF format:

 1. Updated resume

 2. BSN diploma

 3. Transcript of Records

 4. Active RN license copy

 5. Short written introduction explaining:

 • which track(s) you are applying for

 • your strongest subject areas

 • your experience in tutoring, writing, or documentation support



Send your application to:





Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Paid Social & Performance Content Specialist
description:
Role Overview

The Paid Social & Performance Content Specialist creates, adapts and deploys high-quality creative that performs across TikTok Paid, Meta Paid, YouTube, Google (Demand Gen/YouTube/Display), Yelp 1P, DTC,
/SMS and third-party marketplaces.

We’re looking for a self-governing, fast, commercially minded creator who understands that creative is a core performance lever. You should be comfortable operating with minimal direction while staying aligned to brand guardrails, campaign priorities and performance feedback.

AI is central to the workflow, but human judgment, brand sensibility and final creative control always sit on top. This role sits inside the paid performance engine, where speed, consistency and quality matter as much as ideas.



What You’ll Do

Paid Strategy & Planning

Support execution of performance-driven paid creative strategy.

Maintain weekly/monthly creative calendars aligned to campaigns and launches.

Translate briefs from Paid Media, Ecommerce and Marketing into platform-ready creative for TikTok, Meta, YouTube, Google, Yelp 1P, DTC,
/SMS and marketplaces.

Propose creative angles, formats and tests based on performance trends.

Paid Creative Production

Produce platform-native assets including:

Short-form vertical video (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

Mid-form YouTube creative

Static images and carousels

UGC-style performance video

Write conversion-oriented hooks, captions and CTAs.

Optimize creative for pacing, framing, text density and platform best practices.

Ensure all work meets brand standards while feeling native to each channel.

AI-Powered Workflow

Use AI tools for hook generation, A/B testing, video editing, thumbnail/caption variants and rapid iteration at scale.

Balance efficiency with brand integrity, treating AI as a production amplifier, not the decision maker.

Publishing, QA & Alignment

Prepare assets to exact specs for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Yelp and marketplaces.

Partner closely with Paid Media teams/agencies for smooth implementation.

Maintain organized asset libraries and clear naming conventions.

Ecommerce & Marketplace Integration

Design creative that supports conversion and product discovery.

Align timing and messaging with DTC promotions, paid campaigns,
/SMS and marketplace initiatives.

Ensure marketplace assets meet platform requirements while preserving brand consistency.

Performance & Learning

Review results including CTR, CPC, CPA, CPV, hook rate, watch time and view-through signals.

Refine storytelling, structure and hooks based on data.

Share concise creative learnings with stakeholders.

Collaboration & Trends

Work cross-functionally with Paid Media, Ecommerce, Marketing and Creative teams.

Stay current on platform updates and ad best practices across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google and Yelp.



You Bring

2–5 years experience in paid social creative, performance content, or ecommerce marketing.

Proven track record of high-performing short-form video and static paid assets.

Experience working with paid teams or agencies preferred.

Familiarity with YouTube and Google ad formats a strong plus.

Comfort owning workflows and deliverables with minimal supervision.

Working knowledge of CTR, CPC, CPA, CPV and hook rate.

Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

A portfolio demonstrating TikTok, Meta, YouTube and ecommerce-oriented paid creative is required.

Tools

Native ad tools across Meta, TikTok, Google, YouTube and Yelp.

Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or equivalent.

Hands-on experience with AI creative tools for variation and testing.

Ability to build scalable, repeatable creative workflows.

What Success Looks Like

Consistent delivery of high-quality, campaign-ready creative.

Reliable, on-time handoffs to Paid Media teams.

Improving creative efficiency and performance over time.

Clear contribution to paid-driven traffic and revenue across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, Google and Yelp 1P.

title: Shopify User Experience Specialist
description:
About Us:

At 4ocean, our mission is to save the world's oceans, and we are looking for passionate individuals to help us achieve this goal. We are more than just a company, we are a global movement committed to making a tangible difference in the health of our planet. We achieve this by removing plastic waste from the ocean and coastlines, while also advocating for sustainable change. If you are driven by purpose, motivated to contribute to a cause that truly matters, and eager to make a lasting impact on the environment, we want you on our team.



Role Overview

Own the daily performance of the Shopify storefront as a revenue-producing environment. Treat the site like a live retail floor that requires constant monitoring, adjustment, testing, and reporting based on real customer behavior. Software Development maintains platform stability; this role ensures the storefront stays fast, accurate, and converting through disciplined execution tied directly to revenue outcomes.



Key Responsibilities

Daily Operations

Audit homepage, collections, product pages, and cart flow for errors or friction

Validate mobile experience across devices

Confirm navigation, search, filtering, and add-to-cart functionality

Verify promotions, pricing, bundles, and messaging accuracy

Update homepage features, merchandising, and campaign landing pages

Optimize product placement based on inventory and demand

Improve product page clarity, hierarchy, and usability

Optimize images and assets for speed

Execute changes safely, test, publish, and maintain rollback readiness

 

Optimization & Reporting

Analyze funnel metrics, conversion rate, AOV, and abandonment points

Prioritize UX improvements that increase revenue per session

Plan and execute controlled experiments

Review page speed and Core Web Vitals

Refresh homepage aligned to marketing calendar

Maintain change logs with impact analysis



Testing & Monitoring

Validate navigation, cart, and checkout entry

Confirm promotions, tracking, and pixels function correctly

Use heatmaps and session recordings to identify friction

Monitor broken links, errors, crawl issues, and site health

Analyze behavior by device, traffic source, and segment



Required Qualifications

Hands-on Shopify storefront management experience

Strong conversion-focused UX/UI instincts

Familiarity with analytics and behavior tools

Mobile-first ecommerce understanding

Ability to implement changes without degrading performance

Detail-oriented with disciplined testing habits



Software & Utilities Familiarity

Storefront & Page Building: Shopify Admin, PageFly, Shogun, Gempages

Subscriptions: Recharge, Skio, Loop

Analytics & Behavior: GA4, Shopify Analytics, Microsoft Clarity, Hotjar

Testing & Optimization: Intelligems, Shoplift

Performance: PageSpeed Insights, GTmetrix, Lighthouse

Site Audit & SEO Health: Screaming Frog, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Search Console

Cross-Device Testing: BrowserStack, LambdaTest



Ideal Candidate

Treats the storefront as a live revenue environment, moves quickly but tests thoroughly,

focuses on removing customer friction, anticipates issues before they impact shoppers,

and understands ecommerce metrics beyond surface-level design

title: Product Analytics Manager (Amplitude)
description:
We’re a growing digital business looking for an experienced Amplitude analytics specialist to take day-to-day ownership of our product analytics. We already have a structured tracking setup and dedicated CRO team. Your role will be to maintain, improve, and monitor our Amplitude implementation - ensuring experiments are set up correctly, data is accurate, and performance issues are identified early. This is a long-term, stable remote role with real ownership.



What You’ll Do

- Own and manage our Amplitude workspace

- Maintain and enforce tracking plans

- Set up and validate A/B tests designed by our CRO team

- Ensure experiments are tracking correctly before and after launch

- Build and maintain dashboards used across the business

- Monitor traffic and conversion performance across global markets

- Analyse performance by country, device, browser and user type

- Spot anomalies, tracking issues or revenue-impacting problems

- Work closely with product and developers to maintain clean event data



What We’re Looking For

- Minimum 1 year hands-on experience using Amplitude

- Experience setting up Amplitude for websites or products

- Experience creating dashboards and reports

- Experience supporting or implementing A/B tests

- Strong attention to detail

- Comfortable working independently

- Fluent English (written and spoken)

- Available to work full UK business hours



About Us

- Fully remote team

- Small, fast-moving digital business

- Multiple global websites and products



What We Offer

- Competitive salary including 13th month pay

- Paid holiday including all local holidays

- Stable long-term job

- Opportunity to grow with the company



How to Apply

Alongside your CV, please include:

- A brief example of an Amplitude project you’ve worked on

- A dashboard you’ve created (screenshots welcome)

title: Remote Sales Assistant
description:
Role Overview



The primary objective of this role is to support Steve Cane by taking ownership of administrative and sales support tasks, enabling him to spend the majority of his time in front of customers (target: 4 days per week).



This role is critical in ensuring that customer enquiries, internal coordination, and sales processes are handled efficiently and proactively, allowing Steve to focus on generating new business.



Key Responsibilities

Inbox & Communication Management

Manage and oversee Steve Cane’s
 inbox daily

Respond to or action
s promptly and proactively

Ensure no customer enquiry is missed or delayed

Coordinate responses where input is required from other tea
mbers



Customer Support

Provide timely support to customers, including:

Quotations

Technical information

Product images

Sample requests

Ensure customers receive accurate information quickly and professionally

Maintain a high standard of customer service at all times



Diary & Admin Support

Assist in managing Steve’s diary and scheduling

Handle general administrative tasks to reduce Steve’s desk workload

Ensure Steve is fully prepared for meetings and follow-ups



CRM & Pipeline Management (Pipedrive)

Maintain and update all deals within Pipedrive CRM

Ensure deal values, stages, and expected close dates are accurate

Prepare clear, structured call lists for Steve daily

Track follow-ups and ensure deadlines are met

Indirectly hold Steve accountable to pipeline activity and follow-ups



Internal Coordination

Liaise with internal teams to gather information and progress tasks

Ensure requests (quotes, samples, information) are delivered efficiently

Act as a central coordination point between Steve, customers, and the wider team



Key Objectives

Free up Steve Cane to spend the majority of his time in front of customers

Ensure all incoming enquiries are handled quickly and professionally

Maintain a highly organised and accurate sales pipeline

Improve responsiveness and overall customer experience

Support increased enquiry generation through effective back-end support



Required Experience & Skills

Experience

Minimum 5 years’ experience in a remote sales support or sales assistant role

Proven experience supporting a sales professional or account manager



Skills & Competencies

Excellent written and spoken English

Strong organisational and time management skills

Highly proactive with a “get it done” mindset

Customer-focused with a professional and responsive approach

Ability to work independently in a remote environment



Technical Skills

Strong IT literacy

Experience with CRM systems (Pipedrive preferred)

Comfortable using
, spreadsheets, and business software efficiently



Knowledge Requirements

Ability to quickly develop an understanding of:

Company products

Customer base

Market and sector

Capable of handling technical and product-related queries with confidence over time



Personal Attributes

Proactive and self-driven

Detail-oriented and highly organised

Strong communicator

Reliable and accountable

Comfortable managing and prioritising multiple tasks



Success in the Role Looks Like

Steve Cane is consistently out meeting customers 4 days per week

Inbox is fully managed with no backlog

Customers receive fast, accurate, and professional responses

CRM is always up to date and actionable

Follow-ups and opportunities are never missed

title: Account Manager
description:
Benefits:



Work From Home

Guaranteed $500 USD per week

Additional available if you perform well

Unlimited potential through residual because you earn as long as your customers say with Fleetsmarts



What we do as a company:



We give a fuel card away for free to truckers in the US that have discounts on diesel fuel. We have add-on products that make the sale more attractive to the customer. Customers can get weekly credit lines for their fuel card if they use our factoring service, which is akin to a pay-day loan service for businesses, but we provide this service for free. We also have a service to help reduce the down payment on their insurance. We market to new trucking companies that are just starting out and all our products are designed to help them get going faster than they would be able to on their own.



What you do:



You call warm appointments for truckers who have already expressed interest

You explain how we can help them

95% of people say yes

The key is following up until they actually start using our services







We set up 4 interviews per day in between the hours of 4:00 and 6:00pm

We will choose one new Cat 3 Re-Engager per week.

After one week, if they don’t hit 60% patch rate, they are out.

For 5 weeks, if they hit high patch rate, we rotate them between Hannah and Cat 1s

We promote one each week to Cat 3 leads and replace our worst AM.











Key Responsibilities:

Proactively follow up on abandoned or inactive leads assigned to account managers.

Present and promote fuel card programs, factoring services, and insurance solutions to potential clients.

Assist customers with the activation of fuel cards and ensure a preferred payment method is added.

Offer factoring services and guide customers through the contract signing process to ensure completion and compliance

Qualifications:

Proven experience in sales, customer retention, or outbound calling (required)

Strong communication and negotiation skills

Confident handling high-volume outbound calls

Goal-oriented, persistent, and able to work independently

Organized and comfortable using CRM tools and office software

Positive attitude and ability to build rapport quickly.

title: Senior Amazon Wholesale Sourcing VA (Philippines Only | 3–5+ Years REQUIRED)
description:
READ BEFORE APPLYING



This is NOT an entry-level position.



If you do not have real, hands-on experience securing wholesale accounts and sourcing profitable products for Amazon, do not apply.



We are only hiring proven professionals who can demonstrate results.



About Us



We are a US Based E-Commerce Business, a rapidly scaling Amazon business focused on wholesale and strategic sourcing, currently at ~$10K/month and aggressively growing toward $100K/month+.



We operate with strict performance standards, data-driven decisions, and zero tolerance for low-quality work.



Position Overview



You will be responsible for:



Finding and securing legitimate wholesale accounts



Identifying high-profit, high-velocity products



Supporting brand ungating through compliant suppliers



This role requires someone who already understands how to:



Navigate supplier ecosystems



Identify real vs fake distributors



Find profitable products consistently



Core Responsibilities



Identify and apply to U.S.-based wholesale distributors and brands



Secure accounts that:



Allow Amazon sellers



Provide valid invoices for ungating



Source profitable products using:



Keepa



SellerAmp (SAS)



Submit high-quality leads ONLY meeting:



ROI  30%



Profit  $3 per unit



Monthly sales  50–10000 units



Track:



Supplier outreach



Approval status



Product pipelines



 STRICT REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Based in the Philippines



3–5+ YEARS of Amazon wholesale or online arbitrage experience



Proven track record of:



Getting wholesale accounts approved



Finding profitable leads consistently



Deep understanding of:



Keepa (must be able to read charts fluently)



Buy Box dynamics



Sales rank & competition analysis



Hands-on experience with:



SellerAmp (SAS)



Amazon Seller Central



Google Sheets



 DO NOT APPLY IF YOU:



Have only watched training courses but lack real experience



Cannot clearly explain your sourcing process



Submit recycled, copied, or low-quality leads



Do not understand wholesale vs retail sourcing



Need constant supervision



HIGH-VALUE SKILLS (PREFERRED)



Experience with brand ungating



Knowledge of top U.S. distributors



Experience calling or negotiating with suppliers



Ability to identify hidden wholesale opportunities



Experience working with scaling Amazon sellers



Compensation



$3 – $6/hour (based on proven experience)



Performance bonuses:



Per approved wholesale account



Per qualified profitable lead



Long-term growth opportunity with pay increases



TRIAL PROCESS (MANDATORY)



You will complete a paid trial.



You must deliver:



2–3 legitimate wholesale supplier leads



3–5 profitable product leads that meet our criteria



Failure to meet standards = no continuation.



 APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (MANDATORY)



If you do not include ALL of the below, your application will be ignored.



Years of Amazon wholesale experience



List of wholesale accounts you have successfully opened



Tools you use (Keepa, SAS, etc.)



A detailed explanation of:



How you find wholesale suppliers



How you verify they accept Amazon sellers



1–2 real product leads you sourced (with breakdown)



Internet speed + availability



Short Loom/video introduction (strongly preferred)



 What We’re Actually Looking For



Someone who:



Produces results without hand-holding



Understands how to find real opportunities, not guesswork



Takes ownership and moves fast



Thinks like a partner, not just an employee



Final Note



We are building a serious operation.



If you are highly experienced and confident in your ability to deliver results, apply.



If not — this role is not for you.

title: Creative Strategist (TikTok & Instagram)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Creative Strategist who specializes in identifying and analyzing viral creatives on TikTok and Instagram worldwide.



Your main responsibility is to source high-performing content and translate insights into  actionable strategies for our team.

You will work closely with our Social Media Manager and Affiliate Manager, providing weekly reports and creative direction that help us go viral and scale content performance.



Your Responsibilities

Source and identify top-performing viral creatives (UGC & ads) globally on: TikTok & Instagram



Focus specifically on:

- Hair styling tools niche (must-have experience)

- Viral ad creatives from brands

- Organic UGC content that performs exceptionally well



Deliver a weekly weekend report, including:

- Best performing creatives (with links/examples)

- Key patterns and trends

- Why these creatives perform (hooks, angles, formats)

- Recommendations for replication



Provide strategic insights, including:

- How to adapt creatives to our brand

- Improvements based on awareness stages & target persona

- Ideas for new viral concepts



Advise on:

- What we are currently doing wrong (if applicable)

- How to improve creative performance

- Opportunities to go viral



Work independently and take full ownership of your role



What You Are NOT Responsible For

> Contacting creators

> Managing partnerships

> Outreach



???? Your role is purely focused on sourcing, analysis, and strategy



Our Goals

1. Get as many videos as possible into the algorithm

2. Consistently create viral-performing content

3. Scale winning creative angles globally



Requirements

The ideal candidate:

1. Has proven experience in finding viral content on TikTok & Instagram

2. Has experience within the hair styling tools niche (required)

3. Understands UGC, paid ads, and viral content mechanics

4. Can translate insights into clear, actionable strategies

5. Strong understanding of:

Hooks & retention

Creative angles

Awareness stages & personas

6. Is highly communicative and structured

7. Works independently and takes ownership

8. Uses tools/platforms to identify trending & viral content

9. Shows initiative and thinks proactively

10. Is motivated for a long-term collaboration



Exclusivity Requirement (non-negotiable)

> You are not currently working with, or planning to work with, competing e-commerce brands within the hair styling tools niche

> Full discretion and confidentiality are expected



Compensation

- Fixed hourly rate and minimum weekly hour planning

- Performance-based pay increases

- Bonuses for exceptional results

- Long-term collaboration opportunity



What We Offer

Full flexibility — work when it suits you (weekend reporting required), we care

about the reults.

No micromanagement — we focus on results

Freedom and ownership in your role

Opportunity to grow within a fast-scaling team

Direct impact on brand growth and viral success

To Apply

Send us:

> A short introduction

> Examples of viral creatives you’ve found (preferably in our niche)

> Case studies or insights you've generated before

> Tools you use to find viral content

> Your availability



Add the word “VIRAL” in the subject line to confirm you’ve read the full job description

title: Google Ads Media Buyer (E-commerce | High Budget Accounts)
description:
GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company scaling online brands across international markets. We’re looking for an experienced Google Ads Media Buyer to help optimize and scale our main revenue channel.



Google Ads drives ~90% of our revenue, so this role has a direct impact on company growth.



Please DO NOT Apply If:

- You have never managed $300K+ per month in Google Ads spend

- You have not worked with Google Shopping catalogs of 10,000+ SKUs

- Your experience is mainly lead generation or small-budget accounts

- You rely on basic campaign setups without deep feed optimization



We respect your time — and ours.



What You’ll Do

- Own and manage Google Ads accounts end-to-end

- Optimize and scale Google Shopping & Performance Max campaigns

- Improve campaign structure, bidding strategies, and feed optimization

- Drive measurable revenue growth

- Build automation systems, scripts, or workflows to improve efficiency

- Use data to continuously optimize performance



Requirements

- 3+ years Google Ads experience in eCommerce

- Experience managing large product catalogs (10,000+ SKUs)

- Experience managing $300K+ monthly ad spend

- Strong knowledge of Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, and Google Analytics

- Analytical mindset and accountability for revenue performance

- Nice to have: Experience with Google CSS Labelizer



Hiring Process

Shortlisted candidates will complete a 19-minute Google Ads assessment before the HR interview.



If you’re an experienced eCommerce performance marketer who wants real ownership and measurable impact — we’d love to hear from you.

title: HIRING ASAP! Google Media Buyer (eCommerce)
description:
Help scale brands. Own performance. Drive real revenue.



GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where great ideas don’t sit in slides — they turn into real, measurable growth. We build and scale online brands across international markets, and our tea
mbers take real ownership, grow fast, and help shape the future of the company.



We’re now looking for a performance-driven Google Ads Media Buyer to help take our main revenue channel to the next level.



Why This Role Matters



Google Ads drives around 90% of our total company revenue. That means your work won’t just “support marketing”, it will directly influence the growth of the entire business.



This role is perfect for someone who loves improving systems, scaling performance, and turning data into smarter decisions. You won’t just manage campaigns, you’ll help evolve the way we run Google Ads.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

From day one, you’ll have real ownership. Within your first 90 days, success in this role will mean:

- Developing and rolling out a new or significantly improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping campaigns for stronger scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements, targeting a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Using performance data to continuously refine bidding strategies, campaign structure, and product feed performance

- Your goal is simple: turn ad spend into scalable, profitable growth.



We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has at least 3 years of hands-on experience in performance marketing or media buying

- Has direct experience running Google Shopping campaigns for large eCommerce catalogs (10,000+ products)

- Has managed high-budget ad accounts ($300K+ per month)

- Is highly proficient in Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, and Google Analytics

- Ideally has experience with Google CSS Labelizer

- Thinks analytically and uses data to drive decisions, not guesswork

- Enjoys testing, optimizing, and uncovering performance opportunities others might miss

- Is comfortable taking full ownership of results and being accountable for revenue impact



Hiring Process

As part of our process, shortlisted candidates will complete a 19-minute Google Ads knowledge assessment. This helps us understand your hands-on expertise before moving forward to the HR interview stage.

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

- Timeliness and deadlines are your jam. When we have a team call at 10:00am, you show up at 9:55am. When the deadline is Tuesday at 5:30pm, you have it done Monday.

- You overcommunicate clearly and confidently. If you agree/disagree with something, you communicate that without hesitation or overthinking. You’re no stranger to asking why we do things a certain way to ensure we’re intentional with our resources.

- You’re a leader and team player. Ego? What ego? If something needs to be done, you dive in to make sure all critical tasks are accounted and cared for.



If you’re nodding your head “Yes” to the above, proceed below to apply.



PERKS:

I'm committed to setting our staff up for success with access to trainings that will certify your skills in:

- Task & Calendar Management

- Launch/Sales Strategy Planning

- Sales Funnel Tech Setup (For E-Commerce or Service Based Businesses)

- Social Media Management

- Digital Media Marketing (Including
 and SMS Marketing)

- Lead Generation



After one week of training and assessment, you're officially certified under our internal training program, which means hitting the ground running with your new skills. Perks include:

- Part time work hours

- Work from anywhere in the world (as long as your internet signal is strong and computer is fast)

- Starting Salary at $500 USD a month ($6000 USD annual)

- Internal certification program to enhance your professional skills in your career (I have helped clients amass at least $10M from the same digital growth marketing strategies I will require you to learn)



Interested? Please reply to this post with the secret keyword "APPLES" so I know you can pay attention to detail - from there, I'll let you know next steps if you qualify.

description:
We’re looking for a highly skilled video editor who understands modern, fast-paced, viral-style content. This role is perfect for someone who lives and breathes YouTube and short-form platforms like Instagram Reels and TikTok—and knows exactly what keeps viewers watching.



You’ll be editing both long-form YouTube content and short-form clips designed to stop the scroll, drive engagement, and build audience growth.



What You’ll Be Editing:



2–3 YouTube videos per week (10–20 minutes each)

4–5 short-form videos per week (Reels/TikTok style)

Edit long-form YouTube videos with strong pacing, storytelling, and retention in mind

Create short-form videos optimized for high engagement and virality



Add:

Captions/subtitles (burned-in, styled for social)

B-roll, overlays, and visual storytelling elements

Sound effects, music, and transitions that enhance energy



-Identify and pull strong hooks or 
nts for short-form content

-Stay current on trends, formats, and editing styles across platforms

-Deliver content on a consistent weekly schedule

Experience with tools like CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar



Strong instincts for pacing, storytelling, and visual engagement



Ability to take direction but also bring creative ideas to the table

title: Virtual Assistant & Video Editor (TikTok Content Operations, QA & Growth Coordinator)
description:
Overview



We are looking for a highly efficient and detail-driven Virtual Assistant & Video Editor to oversee the end-to-end TikTok content production and growth process across multiple accounts.



This role combines video editing, workflow management, quality control, and organic account growth, ensuring that content is consistently produced, uploaded, and optimised for performance.



You will act as the bridge between the head of marketing and video creator(s), maintaining structure, speed, and quality across all operations while also contributing to scaling account performance.



Key Responsibilities



Video Editing & Content Execution

 • Edit short-form TikTok videos using provided raw footage

 • Recreate trending formats and adapt to multiple content styles

 • Work at a target pace of ~20 edits per hour

 • Prepare and upload content via TikTok / TikTok Studio



Production Management

 • Oversee the daily content pipeline across 4 TikTok accounts

 • Ensure all scheduled content is:

 • Uploaded on time

 • Not missed

 • Free from duplicate postings

 • Manage a total output of ~80 videos per day (20 per account)

 • Coordinate with creators to ensure consistent content delivery



Quality Control (QA)

 • Review raw footage before editing begins

 • Ensure all required components are present (hooks, structure, captions, etc.)

 • Check for:

 • Duplicate videos

 • Missing uploads

 • Incomplete or unusable footage

 • Maintain a consistent, high-quality standard across all content



Data Entry & Workflow Tracking

 • Track content status and uploads via Excel / Google Sheets / Notion

 • Maintain organised records of:

 • Video progress

 • Upload status

 • Account activity

 • Use Google Drive to manage and organise raw and edited files



Organic Growth & Account Scaling

 • Grow TikTok accounts organically using a proprietary method (training provided)

 • Apply learned strategies to improve:

 • Reach

 • Engagement

 • Consistency of performance

 • Monitor content performance and iterate based on results

 • Identify trends and adapt content accordingly



Communication & Coordination

 • Liaise between head of marketing and video creator(s)

 • Provide updates on production, issues, and performance

 • Ensure deadlines are met daily

 • Proactively resolve workflow bottlenecks



Requirements

 • Experience with video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

 • Familiarity with TikTok / TikTok Studio workflows

 • Strong understanding of short-form viral content

 • Proficiency in:

 • Excel / Google Sheets

 • Notion

 • Google Drive

 • Strong attention to detail (critical for QA and duplication checks)

 • Ability to work quickly, accurately, and independently

 • Good understanding of content performance and growth principles (preferred but not required)



Working Hours & Output Expectations



Working Hours

 • Part-time: 4–5 hours per day

 • Flexible schedule, aligned with daily posting deadlines



Daily Output Targets

 • Manage 4 TikTok accounts

 • ~20 videos per account per day

 • Total: ~80 videos/day

 • Editing speed expectation: ~20 videos/hour



Compensation



Hourly Rate

 • £2.00 – £3.50 per hour



Estimated Monthly Salary

 • £300 – £500/month (depending on hours & experience)

 • £50 monthly bonus (depending on results & consistency)



Onboarding Process

 • Candidates will be required to:

 1. Complete a training programme (including growth methodology)

 2. Perform a video recreation task

 • Final selection will be based on:

 • Editing quality

 • Speed

 • Attention to detail

 • Ability to follow systems



Ideal Candidate Profile

 • Experienced in fast-paced content environments

 • Highly reliable and deadline-driven

 • Strong eye for detail and quality control

 • Able to manage multiple workflows simultaneously

 • Quick learner who can replicate styles and apply growth strategies



Bonus Skills (Preferred)

 • Experience managing multiple TikTok accounts

 • Familiarity with TikTok Shop / UGC content

 • Basic understanding of analytics and scaling content

title: Funnelish funnel builder
description:
Hey there,



We are looking for a new tea
mber to join our fast-growing 6-figure eCommerce business.



We run multiple online stores in the EU and are scaling fast. Because of this, we need to expand our team.



We are looking for someone responsible for one of the most important tasks in our business:

building complete, high-converting sales funnels.



You will turn products into full branded offers.



This includes:



- Product naming



- Logo creation



- Improving the copy



- Creating images that fit the copywriting



- Delivering a funnel that is ready to launch and convert



- This role requires speed, creativity, and attention to detail.



You will receive competitor funnels and ready-made templates as a base, which you will adapt, improve, and finalize into branded, high-converting funnels.



Meeting deadlines is extremely important.



We are looking for someone who is hardworking, smart, dedicated, detail-oriented, and able to work with minimal supervision.



Pay is excellent and this will become a full-time role with bonuses.



Please read the 4R model below for full details.



4R MODEL - FUNNEL BUILDER



ROLE



- You are responsible for building complete, branded sales funnels.



- You receive competitor funnels as inspiration and ready-made templates, then:



- Adapt them to our structure



- Improve and refine the copy where needed



- Create branding and visuals



- Deliver a polished, ready-to-launch funnel



Your work directly supports our testing and scaling process.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Analyze competitor funnels and use them as inspiration



- Adapt competitor structure and copy to fit our templates and brand style



- Improve copywriting where needed



- Create a unique brand name and logo for each product



- Create images that fit and support the copywriting



- Think of unique selling points and angles when needed



- Communicate proactively with the team and flag any blockers



- Meet agreed deadlines



- Track working hours using our time tracking tool



RESULTS



- Funnels that meet our quality standards and KPIs



- Funnels inspired by competitors but clearly improved and adapted



- Clean, professional branding that builds trust



- Clear, effective copy that supports conversions



- Consistent and reliable delivery



- Smooth collaboration with the team



REQUIREMENTS



- Experience with Funnelish or other page builder tools



- Basic graphic design skills such as logo creation and image editing



- Ability to analyze and adapt existing content



- Fluent in English



- Able to work independently with minimal supervision



- Organized, reliable, and deadline-driven



- Proactive communicator who asks questions when needed



- Plus: Previous experience in eCommerce or direct-response environments



WHAT WE OFFER



- Full-time position, Monday to Friday, weekends off



- Excellent hourly pay with performance-based raises



- Bonus system linked to KPIs



- Time tracking for accurate payment



- Long-term role with growth opportunities as we scale from 6 to 7-8 figures



- Clear SOPs, templates, and competitor examples



- Fast-paced environment with strong learning opportunities



Ready to grow with us?



If you are a fast learner, enjoy structured creative work, and want to be part of a growing eCommerce team, we want to hear from you.



Please send:



- Your resume



- Samples of your work



- A short cover letter explaining why you think you are a good fit

title: Documentation Specialist (Fully Remote)
description:
Please Read the Whole Job Description Before Applying.



Meadow is transforming end-of-life care, one of the largest and most overlooked industries in America. In under two years, we became the largest independent funeral home in California and have since expanded to multiple states, with more markets on the way. We’ve earned an 80+ NPS, glowing reviews, and the trust of hundreds of families every month.



We believe great people live everywhere. Our team works across continents and time zones, grounded by shared values: high standards, deep empathy, and a drive to do work that matters.



Why join:

- Remote-first, global team: work from anywhere, be trusted to deliver

- Fair, transparent compensation: competitive pay, benchmarked globally.

- High expectations, high support: we invest in training and growth

- Respect and humanity: no burnout culture, no hero worship

- Real-world impact: your work supports families when it matters most.





About the Role:

Death certificates are one of the most consequential documents a family will ever deal with and getting them right, on time, is something they shouldn't have to worry about. As a Documentation Specialist, you'll make sure they don't.



You'll work directly with physicians and medical facilities to obtain accurate cause-of-death information, secure required signatures, and ensure all documentation meets state requirements. You'll own key steps in the filing process, collaborate with our Filing Specialist and operations team, and keep families informed throughout.



This role calls for persistence, precision, and genuine care. You'll often be navigating busy medical offices and sensitive family situations at the same time and doing it with calm professionalism is what makes the difference.



A quick note, because many candidates wonder about it:

People often assume this work is emotionally heavy, but our team consistently finds it deeply meaningful and surprisingly uplifting. The role is rooted in hospitality, clarity, and human connection, not sadness. Rather than feeling heavy, the work offers a unique sense of purpose as part of a modern, compassionate company transforming an outdated industry and bringing dignity, transparency, and warmth to families across the country.



What You’ll Do:

- Contact physicians and medical facilities - primarily by phone - to obtain accurate cause-of-death information and required signatures, with professionalism and persistence.

- Review, verify, and document medical information in accordance with state regulations, keeping precise records at every step.

- Manage multiple cases simultaneously - proactively identifying delays, coordinating with the Filing Specialist, and ensuring deadlines are met.

- Keep families updated with clear, empathetic communication — translating complex requirements into language that's easy to understand during a difficult time.

- Work across HubSpot, Aircall, Slack, and our internal case management system to stay organized and keep the team aligned.



Requirements & Qualifications:

- 2+ years in office administration, healthcare, deathcare, or a role involving persistent follow-up and detailed documentation..

- Comfortable making consistent follow-up calls and navigating busy medical offices — courteous and solution-oriented even when doors are slow to open.

- Strong case management instincts - able to juggle multiple open files, meet strict deadlines, and keep records airtight..

- Able to communicate with empathy and clarity - whether explaining next steps to a grieving family or following up with a physician's office for the third time.

- Quick to learn and use modern tools like Notion, Slack, and Aircall to stay connected and organized.

- Motivated by work that matters - you want to look back and know you made a hard 
nt easier for real people.



Details:

- Remote, full-time

- Compensation: $4.50-$7.00/hr USD

- Tools: HubSpot (CRM), Aircall (phone), Slack, and our case management system

- Shift: Monday-Friday, US Business hours 



Why You’ll Love Working With Us:

- Benefits: PTO, 10 Paid Holidays, Paid Training, Fully remote

- Global collaboration: Work with teammates around the world.

- Learn more about our Global teams here: 

- Career Growth in Sales & Tech: A chance to grow your career in sales and tech while helping build something meaningful

- Purpose-driven work: Make a real difference during one of life’s most meaningful transitions

- Supportive, growth-minded team – Bring your sales drive and eagerness to learn; we’ll support you every step of the way



Apply here:

title: Cold Calling Sales Closer
description:
We are growing our dog accessories division by bringing handcrafted Maasai leather beaded collars to pet lovers and retailers around the world. These collars are made by skilled Maasai artisans in Kenya, combining cultural heritage, premium leather and durable, water-resistant construction. The result is a unique, story-driven product that helps stores stand out and delight their customers.



As a Cold Calling Sales Closer, you own the entire sales cycle on the phone: from first contact with qualified leads to closing initial orders and repeat purchases. You will speak directly with pet retailers, groomers, boarding facilities and importers, present our product, handle objections and secure sales. Your income grows with your results through a monthly salary plus a commission-based structure.



What you will do

- Filter & Call qualified leads from our database and introduce our products.

- Identify quickly if the prospect is a retailer, groomer, boarding facility, vet clinic or importer, and adapt your pitch.

- Present the product clearly: benefits, premium look and in-store positioning.

- Ask targeted questions to understand their business.

- Handle objections and turn them into opportunities.

- Close sales directly on the call.

- Follow up with warm prospects and turn interest into paid orders.

- Keep accurate notes in the CRM so nothing falls through the cracks.

- Share patterns and feedback with the team to improve scripts, offers and targeting.



We’re not looking for someone who

- Only books meetings and avoids asking for the order.

- Is uncomfortable discussing price or negotiating on the phone.

- Needs a large fixed salary and dislikes performance-based pay.

- Reads scripts word-for-word without listening or adapting.

- Avoids high outbound activity or takes rejection personally.



What’s in it for you

High earning potential through a commission-based model with uncapped upside.

A differentiated, easy-to-love product with a real story behind it.

Direct, visible impact on company growth with clear revenue attribution.

Remote-friendly setup and flexibility to organize your calling blocks.

Growth opportunities into Senior Closer, Key Account or Sales Team Lead.

Preferred experience



Must have

1–3+ years of experience in phone-based sales (telesales, outbound closing, SDR/BDR with closing responsibilities, etc.).

Proven track record of selling directly on calls, not just setting appointments.

Strong bias for action and comfort with daily activity and revenue targets.

Excellent spoken English and a clear, confident phone presence.

Strong listening and objection-handling skills; you are comfortable asking for the sale.

Comfortable with a fixed salary plus commission-based or commission-heavy pay structures.

Solid discipline in using CRM tools and following up.

Good, stable internet connection suitable for VoIP calls and remote work.

Resilience, persistence and a genuine growth mindset.



Nice to have

Experience selling to small businesses in the pet industry (retailers, groomers, vet clinics, distributors).

Experience in international sales or working across time zones.

High tech literacy with sales tools and AI assistants.
