title: Tiktok Shop Account Specialist
description:
Job Description

We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and results-driven TikTok Account Brand Manager to lead the day-to-day management and growth of our brand presence on TikTok Shop and related social commerce channels. This role will be responsible for overseeing platform operations, optimizing product visibility, coordinating campaigns, managing account health, and driving sales performance. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with TikTok account management, social commerce strategy, and marketplace operations, with added value given to candidates familiar with Amazon Multi-Channel Fulfillment (MCF) and Buy with Prime integration.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and maintain the brand’s TikTok Shop account, ensuring smooth day-to-day operations



Oversee product listings, catalog accuracy, pricing, promotions, and merchandising within TikTok Shop



Coordinate campaign calendars, seasonal activations, flash sales, affiliate opportunities, and creator-driven promotions



Monitor account performance, traffic, conversion, and sales trends; provide regular reporting and actionable insights



Ensure account health by staying compliant with TikTok Shop policies, operational requirements, and service standards



Partner with internal teams and external stakeholders on content alignment, inventory readiness, fulfillment planning, and promotional execution



Identify opportunities to improve conversion, customer experience, and operational efficiency across the TikTok channel



Troubleshoot operational issues related to listings, fulfillment, returns, order flow, and account support cases

Support the integration and management of fulfillment solutions that connect TikTok Shop orders with backend systems

Collaborate on expansion opportunities involving Amazon Multi-Channel Fulfillment (MCF) and Buy with Prime to improve shipping speed, reliability, and customer experience



Preferred Qualifications:

Proven experience in TikTok account management. 

Direct experience managing TikTok Shop or TikTok commerce-related accounts

Strong understanding of TikTok Shop operations, promotions, creator/affiliate ecosystems, and account performance metrics

Experience with product catalog management, order operations, and platform troubleshooting

Familiarity with Amazon Multi-Channel Fulfillment (MCF) and how it can support external sales channels

Experience with Buy with Prime and/or ecommerce integrations connecting Amazon fulfillment to third-party storefronts or social commerce platforms

Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and make performance-driven recommendations

Excellent communication, organization, and project management skills

Ability to work cross-functionally in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities simultaneously

Experience with Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, or other marketplace/admin platforms

Understanding of social commerce trends, livestream sales, influencer campaigns, and affiliate performance

Experience launching or scaling emerging marketplace or social selling channels



What Success Looks Like in This Role:

TikTok Shop account is well-managed, compliant, and operationally stable

Product assortment is optimized for discoverability and conversion

Promotions and campaigns are executed accurately and on time

Sales growth is supported through improved channel strategy and execution

Fulfillment workflows, including any MCF or Buy with Prime-related processes, operate efficiently and support a strong customer experience

title: Book Keeper

• Proficiency in ERP accounting software (e.g., ERP Next, QuickBooks, Zoho, or similar).

3 - You understand that this is a part time position only.

title: Product Research Specialist
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a detail-oriented Amazon Product Research Specialist to support branded product research and related e-commerce operations. This role focuses on Keepa-based product research on existing Amazon listings only — no private label research.



You will analyze ASINs using Amazon and Walmart data, along with tools such as Keepa, Helium 10, Seller Central, and other pricing or analytics platforms, to evaluate demand, competition, pricing, fees, and profitability based on client rules. This is a data-heavy and repetitive role that requires strong accuracy, consistency, and sound judgment in making rule-based decisions.



In addition to product research, the role may also support inventory monitoring, pricing and competitiveness checks, system updates, appeals tracking, and light data entry across tools like Google Sheets, Sellerboard, SellerSnap, and pricing systems.



When applying, please include the word “Seller” in the subject line of your
 or application.



Key Responsibilities



- Conduct Keepa-based product research on existing Amazon listings

- Research and evaluate ASINs using Amazon, Walmart, and other relevant sources

- Analyze products for:

     - Sales rank and demand

     - Pricing and listing competitiveness

     - Number of sellers and competition level

     - Profitability, including Amazon fees and margin calculations

- Apply client-provided rules and criteria to approve or reject products

- Prepare and maintain accurate research reports in Google Sheets

- Document products checked, including those that do not meet criteria

-Monitor inventory-related data and update systems as needed

- Assist with appeals tracking and light operational updates

- Perform light data entry in tools such as Sellerboard, SellerSnap, repricers, and Google Sheets



Required Skills & Qualifications

- Strong proficiency in Amazon product research

- Proficiency in Walmart research and understanding of cross-checking product data

- Strong working knowledge of Keepa

- Clear understanding of ASINs, product listings, and variation structures

- Strong profitability analysis skills, including Amazon fees and rule-based decision-making

- Proficiency in Google Sheets

- Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in repetitive, data-heavy tasks

- Ability to follow detailed workflows and apply client criteria consistently

- Good written and verbal English communication skills

- Reliable, organized, and easy to train on client-specific processes



Nice to Have

- Familiarity with Helium 10 and SellerScout

- Experience using Sellerboard, SellerSnap, and pricing/repricing tools



Basic exposure to:

- Shipment reconciliation

- Reimbursements and case handling

- QuickBooks



What We’re Looking For

- A dependable and organized tea
mber

- Someone comfortable with repetitive research and data validation work

- A person who can make accurate, rule-based decisions without losing attention to detail

- Someone open to learning and following a structured client workflow

title: Graphic Designer for KDP Book Cover (Photoshop – Final Edits & Variations)
description:
Hello,



I’m looking for a skilled and detail-oriented graphic designer to help finalize a book cover for Amazon KDP.



The cover is already designed in Photoshop, and I need someone who can work on the existing files to refine and complete the design.



What’s provided:



-Fully editable Photoshop (PSD) file



-Separate front, back, and spine files



-All fonts and images (license-free)



Scope of work:



-Finalize the back cover, adding a few design elements to improve layout and presentation (currently text-based)



-Test a new illustration for the front cover, keeping the existing title and text unchanged



-Make small adjustments to improve overall balance and consistency



-Ensure the final file remains suitable for KDP print (7 x 10 inches)



Requirements:



-Strong Photoshop skills



-Experience with book covers (KDP experience preferred)



-Good sense of layout, typography, and visual balance



Budget:



Fixed project: $50–$75 USD, depending on experience and quality of work



Quick Test (1–2 minutes):

Please answer this question in your application:



When preparing a KDP paperback cover in Photoshop, what are the key elements you check to make sure the spine and bleed are correctly set?



To apply, it will be great if you could include:



-Examples of book covers you’ve worked on



-A brief explanation of your KDP cover preparation process



-Confirmation that you work comfortably with PSD files



Start your message with: “KDP Ready”



This is a one-time project for now. I am currently working on multiple books, so there is strong potential for additional projects if the collaboration goes well.



Thank you—I look forward to your application.



Best regards,

Francesco

•Proven experience as a Graphic Designer with a strong portfolio focused on print materials.

•Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign) or equivalent tools.

•Excellent English communication skills — both written and verbal.

•Confident and comfortable in client-facing discussions.

•Highly detail-oriented — an absolute must for print work.

•Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.

•Knowledge of large-format printing is an advantage.

•Willingness to work the graveyard shift, demonstrating dependability and the ability to maintain exceptional performance during these hours.

title: Production and AR Specialist- Roofing
description:
Offer

Standard Legal Philippine Employment

43,000 basic salary + all Government mandated benefits

Various company initiated incentive programs

Division bonuses 



About the Role:

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, process-driven, and resourceful professional to support our production operations in the roofing industry.



This role plays a critical part in ensuring projects move from contract to completion without costly delays, compliance issues, or revenue gaps. You will be responsible for material ordering, work orders, roof drawings, inspection scheduling, permit verification and processing, and accounts receivable follow-up, particularly insurance-related collections.



This position requires laser-sharp attention to detail. A single oversight, such as failing to secure a required permit, can result in fines, penalties, or project delays. Accuracy, ownership, and consistent follow-through are absolutely essential.



If you thrive in structured processes, enjoy verifying information thoroughly, and take pride in operational excellence, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Production Coordination

Create and manage work orders for roofing projects

Order materials accurately and on time based on project specifications

Coordinate with suppliers to confirm availability and delivery schedules

Prepare and review roof drawings and measurements (EagleView, Hover, or similar tools preferred)

Schedule city and final inspections

Maintain accurate production timelines and internal documentation

Communicate with project managers and field teams to ensure alignment



2. Permitting & Compliance

Identify whether permits are required for each project

Contact city offices or municipal departments to verify requirements

Submit and process permit applications accurately

Track permit approvals and inspection schedules

Maintain documentation for compliance records

Ensure no project begins without required approvals

Monitor changes in city requirements and update internal processes



Note: Failure to secure required permits can result in fines or fees — this role demands precision and accountability.



3. Accounts Receivable & Insurance Follow-Up

Track all outstanding balances for roofing projects

Follow up with insurance companies to ensure depreciation checks are released on time

Monitor claim status and document communications

Contact homeowners regarding payment schedules

Follow proper cadence for collections on insurance jobs

Maintain detailed and organized tracking systems

Coordinate with internal accounting team to reconcile payments

Escalate payment delays appropriately



4. Communication & Cross-Department Coordination

Communicate clearly with:

- Insurance adjusters

- City permit offices

- Suppliers

- Homeowners

- Project managers

- Accounts team

Provide accurate updates internally and externally

Escalate potential compliance or payment risks early

Maintain professionalism when discussing collections



Requirements:

Experience in roofing, construction operations, or production coordination

Strong understanding of permit processes (city-level preferred)

Experience handling accounts receivable or collections

Familiarity with insurance claim processes (especially depreciation recovery)

Exceptional attention to detail and documentation accuracy

Highly organized and process-oriented

Strong follow-up discipline, nothing falls through the cracks

Confident and professional phone communication skills

Ability to verify information independently (resourceful and proactive)

Comfortable tracking multiple projects simultaneously



Preferred:

Experience in the roofing industry (highly preferred)

Familiarity with homeowner’s  insurance restoration jobs

Experience working with U.S. municipalities (if applicable)

Knowledge of CRM systems and production tracking software

Experience using roof measurement tools (EagleView, Hover, etc.)

Basic understanding of construction timelines and workflows



What Success Looks Like:

Zero missed permits

No compliance-related fines or preventable delays

Materials ordered accurately and on schedule

Inspections scheduled without bottlenecks

Consistent and documented insurance follow-up

Timely release of depreciation checks

Minimal outstanding receivables beyond expected timelines

Clear, organized tracking systems

Strong internal communication with production and accounting teams

Homeowners feel informed and professionally handled





Interested applicants please fill out application form:

title: Social Media Assistant
description:
Position: Social Media Assistant

Start Date: As soon as possible



The Role:



This is a hands-on coordination role for someone who wants to own the day-to-day running of our social media channels. You’ll be responsible for making sure content is scheduled, posted, and managed seamlessly across platforms. You’ll work closely with our creative and strategy teams, who develop the content direction and ideas — your role is to execute, coordinate, and ensure everything goes live correctly and on time. This is about being the person who keeps the social media engine running smoothly.



What You’ll Do:



• Manage and maintain the social media calendar across Instagram, TikTok,
, and Pinterest

• Schedule and publish content, ensuring all posts go out accurately and on time

• Write and refine captions in line with brand tone of voice

• Coordinate with internal teams to ensure all assets and copy are ready ahead of schedule

• Handle community management — responding to comments, DMs, and engaging with our audience

• Monitor social channels and flag relevant trends, feedback, or opportunities to the team

• Ensure consistency and quality across all social platforms

• Support with light ideation — feeding in content ideas, inspiration, and observations

• Track basic performance metrics and maintain reporting documentation



Non-Negotiables:



• Have experience in social media, marketing, or a similar role

• Have managed brand social media accounts before

• Highly organised with strong attention to detail

• Excellent written communication skills

• Proactive and reliable — someone who takes ownership of execution

• Comfortable working at pace and managing multiple deadlines

• Strong understanding of social media platforms and best practices

• Team player who communicates clearly and consistently



Strong Preference If You…



• Understand content formats and trends across TikTok and Instagram

• Have an interest in wellness, fitness, or lifestyle brands

• Have worked in fast-paced, high-growth environments



What Success Looks Like:



• Content is always posted on time, without errors

• Social channels are active, responsive, and well-managed

• The content calendar is consistently up to date and organised

• Communication between teams is smooth and proactive

• You become the go-to person for anything social execution-related



About Innermost:

A wellness brand on a mission to help people take control of their health. We combine science and nature to create nutrition products that work. We’re growing fast across Asia, the US, and the Middle East. We’re ambitious. We move quickly. We’re building something that matters. Learn more at

And then please answer these questions in your application:

We get many applications from people who don't fulfil these requests or answer those questions, and who are not considered as a result. Don't let that be you. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a Zoom interview. Thank you.

title: VSL Video Editor - Ecommerce
description:
Dropshipping VSL Editor



Hey VSL editors!



We need a skilled video editor to create VSL videos from scratch in a full-time position in our fast-scaling dropshipping business.



The VSL videos that we're going to create are health and beauty products, as well as gadgets. 2-5 minutes is the length of a typical VSL video in our style.



What you’ll work on:

Create VSLs (2–5 minutes) from raw materials or written script for health/beauty products and gadgets

Follow (our) proven formulas and structures to increase CTR and CVR

Translate, voiceover, subtitle, and localize videos to market-specific formats

Take rough ideas and scripts and turn them into persuasive visual stories



Requirements:

You MUST have experience in creating VSL videos for dropshipping/e-commerce

Strong understanding of direct response video structure (hook -> problem -> solution -> CTA)

Ability to translate and localize content fast with tools and AI

Detail-obsessed: no subtitle misalignments, no poor syncing, no off-looking visuals



Must know how to:



•?  ?Use ElevenLabs

•?  ?Edit with any video editing software

•?  ?Use MidJourney for AI image generation

•?  ?Create AI voiceovers (ARC ads style)

•?  ?Find viral clips on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube



What we offer you:

Full-time work

Long-term relationship and stability

Options to higher paid roles within the company

Market-leading performance bonuses

Amazing colleagues :)



IMPORTANT: This is NOT for:



Editors who’ve never made a VSL

General YouTube or vlog editors

Slow turnarounds or poor responsiveness



To apply kindly fill-up the application form thru the link below:







Speak soon!

title: AI video editor
description:
AI Video Editor — YouTube Senior Storytelling Channel



We produce a YouTube channel featuring real elderly people as AI avatars with custom cloned voices. Not stock avatars — real faces, real voices, fully produced into cinematic storytelling videos.



You must know how to:



Create talking avatars from real photos

Clone and sync custom voices to avatar footage

Generate consistent character images across multiple scenes

Edit 15-20 min videos (avatar segments + matched B-roll)

Add subtitles, warm color grade, soft background music

Create thumbnails

The job:



3-4 videos per week to start, scaling up

pay 5-10$ an hour or fixed per each video 

Long term position — multiple channels planned

Growth opportunity into production manager role

To apply: Send portfolio with at least one HeyGen avatar example preferably  using a real person's photo. No portfolio = no reply.



Starting immediately.

title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor
description:
Title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full-time | 40 hours/week | 1pm–9pm PH Time (aligned with Dubai working hours)

Salary: Based on experience and skillset + performance bonus + paid UK bank holidays + paid day off on your birthday.



The Role:



This is a creative-led design and video editing role for someone who wants to own the visual identity of a fast-growing wellness brand. You'll be our lead creative resource—ideating and executing concepts across
, social media (organic and paid), YouTube, campaigns, and digital channels. You'll bring briefs to life from concept to execution, edit compelling videos, design assets, and help shape our overall content strategy. If you live and breathe design and video, understand what makes content scroll-stopping, and want to build something that matters — this is it.



What You'll Do:



> Design assets and create content across all digital channels

> Edit video content for social media (short-form) and YouTube (long-form)

> Cut, splice, and assemble footage into engaging narratives

> Add music, sound effects, subtitles, text overlays, and motion graphics

> Source and integrate stock footage where needed

> Bring creative briefs to life—from ideation to concept development and final execution

> Develop and evolve the brand identity while acting as a brand guardian

> Deliver best-in-class visual assets that perform

> Ensure visual consistency and alignment with brand guidelines across all touch-points



Non-Negotiables:



> Excellent working knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite (especially Premiere Pro, After Effects) and Figma

> Strong video editing skills with a portfolio demonstrating your work

> Ability to edit both short-form social content and long-form YouTube videos

> Experience adding subtitles, text overlays, music, and sound design

> Strong portfolio demonstrating design, typography, layout, and video editing

> An eye for good design, branding, social media trends, and marketing

> Meticulous attention to detail and strong project management skills

> Team player who thrives in a collaborative environment



Strong Preference If You…



> Have a degree in Graphic Design, Video Editing, or similar

> Have experience with AI tools like Midjourney, Nano Banana, or similar for content creation

> Understand social media platforms deeply and what makes content perform

> Can demonstrate video content that's driven engagement or growth

> Have experience with motion graphics and animation



What Success Looks Like:



> Our visual identity feels distinctive, consistent, and evolving

> Video content performs—high watch time, engagement, shares, and saves

> Social videos and YouTube content come to life beautifully

> You're generating ideas the team gets excited about

> The brand feels cohesive and premium across every touchpoint



About Innermost:



We believe the path to better health lies in a balance of nature and science. Inspired by ancient wisdom and powered by modern evidence-based research, we've crafted a new approach to wellness — natural ingredients that have stood the test of time combined with cutting-edge science to create products that are as effective as they are authentic. We've experienced significant growth and have ambitious plans for the future. If you want to be part of a team that's changing an entire industry, we'd love to hear from you. Learn more at 



Application Process: 



Please send the following via the OnlineJobs portal:



> Your CV

> Your creative portfolio including video editing examples (essential — we need to see your work)

> A 60-second Loom video explaining why you'd be a great fit



And then please answer these questions in your application:



> Do you have excellent working knowledge across Adobe Creative Suite and Figma?

> Where do you live; city or village?

> How fast is your internet and do you have reliable electricity?



We get many applications from people who don't fulfil these requests or answer those questions, and who are not considered as a result. Don't let that be you. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a Zoom interview. Thank you.
salary: Around £700 based on experience and s...

title: Executive Virtual Assistant (Recruiting & Operations)
description:
I'm Hiring!



Setup: Fully Remote

Schedule: Graveyard shift





Looking for a Executive VA (Recruiting & Operations) to support scheduling, recruiting, and day-to-day coordination across the company. You’ll help keep hiring and internal operations running smoothly by managing calendars, organizing candidate pipelines, and maintaining systems with accuracy and care.



What you’ll do:

-Prepare agendas, take notes, and manage follow-ups

-Communicate with candidates and hiring managers for a smooth experience

-Maintain docs and trackers, improve processes, and proactively support operations



Requirements:

*3+ years of experience in administrative, recruiting, or operations support

*Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

*Proactive and resourceful with a **problem-solving mindset

*Experience using tools like Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, and an ATS (Ashby, Lever, Greenhouse, or similar)

*Experience supporting executives or founders in a startup or fast-growing team

*Familiarity with health-tech or SaaS environments



To apply:

-Send your updated resume

-Send a 1–2 minute Loom (or similar) introducing yourself and your EA experience



Applications without a introduction video will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Hi there!



We are looking for a virtual assistant for a faceless YouTube channel.



PRICING: $300 - $350 per month (depending on amount of videos).



JOB DESCRIPTION:

Using several AI tools you will create videos with the process being voice over narration, image/video generation, in addition to editing the videos.



We will provide SOPs on how to approach each step of the tasks required of you.



We are looking for someone who:

- Has a high standard of English language.

- Able to work to a tight deadline (MUST BE ON TIME).

- Reliable and hardworking.

- Pay attention to detail.

- Has good time management skills.

- Very good communication skills.



To Get HIRED it’s VERY SIMPLE:

1. Submit a short introduction video of yourself answering the following questions :

- Do you have experience of video editing? Please tell us what software you use.

- Have you ever made a video for a faceless YouTube channel (youtube link)?

- How much (rate of pay per video) are you available for?

- How much time availability (per day) do you have and do you currently work for anyone else?

- How do you stay organised when you have multiple tasks and deadlines to manage?

- Tell us your favourite animal and why.



2. Once you have successfully done this, we will send you some sample guidelines to create a 30-60 second sample video.

3. Submit the sample within 48 hours, and you’ll receive a response from us if you are hired.



We look forward to hopefully working with you!



Please make sure you only share google drive / youtube links

title: Executive Sales Assistant
description: I need a full time executive sales assistant. I am the CEO of a consulting company that assists multiple business in their business operations. Due to this we get a very high commission rate per sale per business. I am looking to bring on an individual that is educated, competent in sales, willing to learn and adapt to new businesses, and has a strong understanding of the English language. This individual needs to be able to get on Google Meetings or phone calls as well. The primary objective of this role is to do sales outreach on behalf of the businesses we work with. If this individual was to land a sale or set a meeting on my calendar for me to sell upon closing they would earn a very lucrative bonus on top of their monthly salary. This bonus could be hundreds to thousands of dollars depending on how lucrative the sale becomes. I need someone that is a self motivator and is eager/hungry to make money. I am slow to hire quick to fire and loyal to a fault. If you do good work I will take care of you extremely well.

 / C# development.

title: Conversion Rate Optimisation (CRO) Account Manager – E-commerce
description:
We are seeking a CRO Account Manager to own client relationships and lead delivery across CRO and web projects for ambitious eCommerce and Shopify brands. 



This is not a passive coordination role. You will drive outcomes, set direction, create clarity, remove blockers, and keep delivery moving at pace.



Key Responsibilities



1) Client Leadership

-Be the primary point of contact for key accounts.

-Lead calls confidently, with structure and clear outcomes.

-Translate business goals into CRO strategy, roadmaps, and execution plans.

-Proactively manage expectations, risks, and priorities.

-Build long-term trust through reliability, honesty, and strong communication.





2) Delivery & Project Execution

-Run delivery in ClickUp: scoping, prioritisation, timelines, and accountability.

-Write clear briefs that designers and developers can execute without confusion.

-QA design and development output to ensure accuracy, polish, and alignment with CRO goals.

-Keep work organised, time-bound, and commercially aligned—no drifting scope.





3) CRO Strategy, Audits & Roadmapping

-Conduct mini and full CRO audits (qualitative and quantitative) and turn insights into clear priorities.

-Build CRO roadmaps outlining what we’re doing, why, and how success is measured.

-Plan experiments and site improvements that drive CVR, AOV, LTV, and funnel performance.

-Spot and communicate upsell opportunities that genuinely align with client growth.



4) Pod Leadership (Design + Dev)

-Lead pods of designers and developers.

-Set expectations, push for standards, and drive accountability.

-Keep teams aligned, motivated, and moving quickly.

-Improve systems and SOPs as we scale.



This role is ideal for someone charismatic, sharp, and intensely organised. You thrive on responsibility, take ownership, and finish what you start. You can manage client relationships with confidence and run delivery with discipline.



Requirements

-3+ years experience in eCommerce, websites, or Shopify.

-2+ years experience in conversion rate optimization (CRO).

-2+ years experience as an account manager (agency or similar).

-Experience leading delivery with designers and developers.

title: Accountant (WFO - Pasig, Metro Manilla)
description:
About AlgoGroup



AlgoGroup operates a pet healthcare + e-commerce platform across Hong Kong and Asia. We run a fast-moving operation with tight cash discipline. We’re building internal workflows (procurement + approvals) and need a strong finance executor to keep the daily finance heartbeat accurate and on time. We have build a founding team in the Phillipines and are eagerly expanding our team with passionate individuals with a desire to be part of a start-up with global ambition.



What You’ll Own (Your Mission)



You will be the daily cash truth owner and payables/bookkeeping executor. Your job is to make sure:

- we always know cash position + what’s due

- payables are tracked properly

- QuickBooks stays accurate

- bank reconciliation is clean

- reporting outputs go out on time, every time

- you use AI/automation to reduce manual work and improve speed/accuracy



Responsibilities



Daily

- Update cash position (by a set time, e.g., 11:00am HK time)

- Maintain AP tracker (what’s due in 7/14/30 days, by entity + vendor)

- Prepare payment batches for approval (you do not approve payments)

- Post transactions into QuickBooks Online

- Organize invoices/receipts and maintain clean documentation



Weekly



- Bank reconciliation (all relevant accounts)

- Inputs to weekly finance pack (cash, AP due, key variances)

- Vendor statement checks + resolve discrepancies

- Support ops team with clean invoice coding / expense categorization



Monthly

- Support month-end close: ensure recs are complete and books are current



Tools & Skills Required

- QuickBooks Online

- Bank reconciliation experience (must have)

- Financial reporting basics (weekly cash/AP reporting)

- AI/automation mindset: you regularly use tools like ChatGPT, templates, automation, spreadsheets, checklists to improve accuracy and speed (share examples)

- Google Sheets



Experience Requirements

- 5–8 years experience in bookkeeping / AP / reconciliation

- E-commerce experience (Shopify / marketplaces / online orders) is strongly preferred

- Startup / fast-paced SME experience preferred

- Strong English written communication; Ability to use ChatGPT for translations in other languages



How to Apply - Please include:

- CV

- A short Loom video (3–5 mins): your QBO experience + reconciliation experience + how you use AI/automation

Answers:

- What time range can you work (HK time)?

- Describe the last bank reconciliation you handled (how many accounts, frequency).

- Describe your e-commerce accounting experience.

title: Millwork Estimator- Cebu
description:
This position is based in Cebu office. NO REMOTE WORK OFFERED. 



Complete Construction is a NZ locally owned company specialising in cabinetry and joinery manufacturing and interior renovations for hospitality, health care, retail, high end residential and commercial buildings.  Regardless of the scale, we take pride in every project we complete. Founded in 2003, today our team is made up of highly-skilled and specialist people who are all experts in their chosen field, down to earth, and great team players. It is our people and their talent that ensures the exceptional work we deliver for our clients.



We are seeking a detail-oriented and commercially minded Millwork Estimator to join our team. This role is responsible for preparing accurate cost estimates for custom cabinetry, joinery, and interior fit-out projects across commercial and residential sectors.



You will ensure all estimates are competitive, precise, and aligned with project requirements.



Key Responsibilities

• Review architectural drawings, specifications, and tender documents

• Prepare detailed cost estimates for millwork and cabinetry projects

• Perform material take-offs (e.g., MDF, plywood, hardware, finishes)

• Assess labour, machining, finishing, and installation costs

• Liaise with suppliers to obtain pricing for materials and hardware

• Identify risks, gaps, or inconsistencies in project documentation

• Collaborate with designers and production teams to ensure buildability

• Prepare and submit tender documentation within deadlines

• Track estimate accuracy and provide feedback for continuous improvement

• Support value engineering initiatives to optimise cost and efficiency



Skills & Experience

• Proven experience as a Millwork Estimator, Joinery Estimator, or similar role

• Strong understanding of cabinetry, joinery, and manufacturing processes

• Ability to read and interpret architectural and shop drawings

• Experience with material take-offs and cost planning

• Knowledge of CNC processes and production workflows (advantageous)

• Proficiency in estimating software and/or Excel

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Strong organisational and time management skills

• Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines

• Prior experience using Procore advantageous but not essential.

title: Full Time YouTube Video Editor
description:
We are a video marketing agency seeking a talented and innovative video editor to join our team. This role offers potential full-time employment within a few weeks for the right candidate should everything go well. The ideal applicant will have a keen eye for creating engaging long-form YouTube content, with a strong portfolio that demonstrates their experience.



Important:

**You must be able to start as soon as possible and have no other contracted work.**

**You must be an individual editor and not part of another agency or have other editors that work for you.**



Responsibilities:

- Edit a variety of video content, particularly focusing on engaging long-form YouTube videos.

- Proficient use of Adobe Premiere Pro video editing software (and After Effects as a bonus.)

- Manage multiple projects efficiently and meet tight deadlines where needed.

- Keep up to date with the latest trends and techniques in video editing and sound design.

- Utilise animation capabilities to elevate the visual appeal of videos.



Requirements:

- Demonstrable experience as a video editor, highlighted by a strong portfolio featuring engaging engaging long-form content.

- Capable of executing high-quality sound design.

- Skills in photo editing and graphic design are preferred.

- Excellent attention to detail with the ability to work efficiently under pressure.

- Superior communication and collaboration skills.

- Reliable with always meeting project deadlines.

- Passionate about video editing with a continual desire to learn and adopt new techniques.

- Self-sufficient and proactive, capable of taking full ownership of projects from conception to completion.

- BONUS: Experience editing fitness related content and VSLs.



Offer:

- Ideal candidate would be keen to showcase their skills in an initial trial period, with a strong prospect of transitioning to full-time hours within a few weeks.

- Competitive salary with top rates for exceptional talent, including potential performance bonuses and holiday/public holiday entitlements.



As part of your application, please include resume, portfolio and the word 'ECC' in your initial message to demonstrate your attention to detail.



We value talent and dedication and are eager to bring someone on board full-time who can contribute significantly to our team. We're happy to pay TOP rates for TOP talent so show us your best work and let us know how you can help take our content to the next level!

title: MSP Sales Development Representative (SDR) / Appointment Setter
description:
About Us

Proactive Data is a U.S.-based Managed Service Provider (MSP). We help small and mid-sized businesses improve IT reliability, cybersecurity, and responsiveness through proactive support and a personal, high?touch experience.



About This Role (Important)

This is not a closing role.

Your responsibility is to:

 • generate qualified conversations

 • book qualified appointments on our calendar

The owner / senior team handles discovery, proposals, and closing.



What You’ll Do

 • Cold call and follow up with targeted business lists (lists and starter scripts provided)

 • Send basic follow?up
s and LinkedIn messages

 • Qualify prospects using a clear checklist (size, fit, pain, decision maker)

 • Schedule qualified meetings on our calendar

 • Log calls, outcomes, and notes accurately in our CRM

 

Earning Potential (Read Carefully)

This role is designed for SDRs who care about quality over volume.

In addition to a base stipend, you’ll earn performance bonuses tied to:

 • qualified meetings that hold

 • meetings that become real sales opportunities

 • recurring revenue (MRR) that actually closes and stays

Because of this structure:

 • A single strong appointment can result in a four?figure payout

 • Top performers can earn $2,000–$3,000+ from one deal when it converts to retained MRR

 • There is no cap on upside — but bonuses are paid only for real outcomes, not activity

We do this intentionally to reward SDRs who book the right meetings — not the most meetings.

Low?quality meetings, no?shows, or misqualified appointments do not earn bonuses.



What Success Looks Like

 • Consistent outbound activity

 • Qualified meetings that actually happen

 • Meetings that convert into real sales opportunities and recurring revenue (MRR)

 

Required Skills & Experience

 

 • Clear, confident, neutral, easily understood English for phone sales

 • Prior cold calling or appointment?setting experience (B2B preferred)

 • Comfortable with rejection and feedback

 • Organized and process?driven

 • Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and headset

 

Nice to Have (Not Required)

 • Experience booking meetings for MSPs, IT services, or cybersecurity

 • Familiarity with CRMs and sales workflows

 

Schedule

 • Part?time to start, with opportunity for full?time

 • Must overlap with U.S. business hours (minimum 3–4 hours/day)

 

Compensation (Outcome?Based)

This role includes:

 • A base stipend

 • Bonuses for held and qualified meetings

 • Additional bonuses when meetings become real opportunities

 • MRR bonuses paid only after deals close and remain active

Low?quality meetings, no?shows, or unqualified appointments do not earn bonuses.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

Please include:

 1. A brief summary of your SDR / appointment?setting experience

 2. Tools you’ve used (dialers, CRM, etc.)

 3. Your typical working hours and internet reliability

 4. A 60–90 second voice recording pretending to cold call a business owner and ask for 30 seconds

 5. One paragraph answering:

“How do you avoid booking bad meetings just to hit a quota?”

 

Applications without the voice recording will not be reviewed.

 marketing and community building

 capture flows

s and tag leads correctly

title: FP&A Analyst
description:
I'm Hiring!



Setup: Fully Remote

Schedule: Graveyard shift





Looking for a FP&A Analyst to to serve as the financial architect of a growing private club organization. You will report directly to executive leadership and provide structured financial insights that support long-term sustainability, capital planning, and operational performance.



What you’ll do:

-Build monthly financial reports, budget vs actuals, and scenario models; deliver board-ready insights

-Partner with departments to standardize data collection and reporting workflows

-Manage capital budgets, project cash flows, vendor contracts, and a 13-week cash forecast

-Oversee financial integrity: audits, tax coordination, loan covenants, and systems (Jonas, A/P, A/R, billing, reporting)

-Handle risk & insurance: renewals, broker coordination, and cost impact analysis



Requirements:

*5+ years of experience in strategic finance or FP&A

*Experience in recurring revenue environments such as membership models, subscriptions, SaaS, or similar

*Advanced Excel proficiency including financial modeling, multi-tab reporting structures, and variance analysis

*Hands-on experience with Jonas Club Software or comparable club management and accounting platforms such as Clubessential, Northstar, or similar

*Experience building financial systems or reporting infrastructure from scratch



To apply:

-Send your updated resume

-Send a 1–2 minute Loom (or similar) introducing yourself and your FP&A experience



Applications without a introduction video will not be considered.

title: Business development representative (BDR) - 30 hours per week, UK time zone
description:
Business Development Representative (BDR) – (B2B Cold Calling &
 Outreach)



- Rate: $8 per hour + Commission

- Schedule: 30 hours per week (9am-4pm UK time, with 1 hour lunch)

- Remote / Freelance



We are Qeeper, a company on a mission to use technology to make property maintenance in the UK transparent, fast, and affordable.



We are looking for a remote Business Development Representative (BDR) to join our small, friendly team. Currently, our team consists of 10 remote staff across the Philippines, and we are looking for a long-term tea
mber to join our business development team and help drive our growth.



Role Overview:

We are seeking a proactive and results-driven Business Development Representative (BDR) to focus on B2B Cold Calling & Personalised
 Outreach. Your primary goal will be to engage potential business clients via cold calls, and convert them into paying customers. This role requires someone comfortable with both verbal & written communication to build rapport with clients.



This is a long-term freelance role, requiring a commitment of 30 hours per week. All work must be completed within UK business hours. All outreach activity will be managed and tracked using 
 CRM.



Key Responsibilities:

- Conduct cold calls to engage with potential clients, build rapport, and set up their account.

- Convert leads into paying customers by explaining the value of Qeeper’s services.

- Follow up strategically on both
 and phone outreach to nurture leads and increase conversion rates.

- Log all outreach activity in 
 CRM, ensuring accurate tracking of interactions and outcomes.

- Continuously refine call script to improve engagement and conversion rates.

- Monitor and report key outreach metrics, including response rates, account setups, and conversions to paying customers.



Skills & Experience Required:

- Proven experience in B2B business development

- Previous experience with cold calling, with the ability to confidently and persuasively engage clients over the phone.

- Strong copywriting skills to craft compelling and persuasive
s for business clients.

- Experience using 
 CRM or similar
 outreach and sales tracking tools.

- Ability to research and identify decision-makers within UK businesses.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English, with the ability to engage both in writing and over the phone.

- Confident and persuasive approach to guide prospects through the process of setting up their account and converting them into paying customers.

- Highly organised, self-motivated, and able to work independently for 30 hours per week (UK time zone).



Why Join Us?

- Earn competitive pay of $8 per hour with the opportunity to earn commission based on your success.

- 30 hours per week of stable, long-term freelance work with set hours from 9am-4pm UK time.

- Enjoy the flexibility of remote work while contributing directly to business growth through impactful B2B outreach and calls.

- An opportunity to develop and enhance your skills in business development, cold calling, and lead conversion, all while working with a growing and supportive team.



Please Apply Here:

title: Senior Accountant (FP&A / Reporting) - WFO Pasig Metro Manilla
description:
About AlgoGroup



AlgoGroup operates a pet healthcare + e-commerce platform across Hong Kong and Asia. We’re a fast-moving operator with tight cash discipline. Finance here is not “back office.” It’s a decision engine: cashflow, profitability, inventory discipline, and growth insights. This is a senior hire: we value people who can say - ‘here’s what changed, here’s why, and here’s what we should do next.’ If you prefer a role where you only post numbers and stay silent, this won’t fit.



If you enjoy being close to the business, building systems, and surfacing insights—not just closing books—this role will fit.



What Success Looks Like



Within 30–60 days, you can:

- Produce a weekly pack that leadership can act on immediately (not just raw numbers)

- Explain what changed, why it changed, and what to do about it

- Build simple dashboards and processes that reduce manual work

- Run month-end close with a clear checklist and clean reconciliations



Your Mission



You will own the weekly finance operating pack and help build a repeatable finance system:

- full-set accounting discipline (accurate books)

- FP&A-style analysis (variance, runway, unit economics, early warnings)

- reporting that creates decisions (not reports that sit unread)

- SOPs + automation so outputs don’t rely on heroics



Key Responsibilities

1) Weekly Finance Operating Pack (Decision-Grade)

- Produce a weekly pack covering: cash position, burn/runway trend, AP/AR aging, key expense movements, and business drivers

- Provide variance commentary (what moved, why, what action is needed, and owner)

- Flag risks early (e.g., runway compression, unusual spend, margin deterioration) with clear explanation and recommended actions



2) FP&A + Business Insights (Practical, not academic)

- Build and maintain a simple rolling cash forecast (e.g., 13-week view)

- Track key KPIs (gross margin, contribution margin, key cost buckets, marketing efficiency where relevant)

- Identify and quantify improvement levers (working capital, vendor terms, cost control, pricing/discount effects)



3) Full-Set Accounting + Close

- Own or co-own month-end close timeline and checklist

- Ensure reconciliations are completed consistently (bank, key balance sheet accounts)

- Maintain clean audit trail and documentation discipline



4) Systems, Dashboards, Automation

- Standardize chart of accounts, vendor coding, entity mapping

- Build dashboards and reporting views in Power BI and/or advanced Google Sheets (Looker Studio acceptable)

- Use AI/automation to reduce manual effort (examples: templated variance commentary, automated data pulls/cleanups, structured close checklists, reconciliations support)



Tools You’ll Use

- QuickBooks Online (must have)

- Google Sheets (packs, mapping, trackers)

- Power BI / Looker Studio (preferred)

- Drive/Slack/WhatsApp for coordination



Requirements (Must Have)

- 8–12+ years experience in accounting/finance (SME / multi-entity preferred)

- Full-set accounting capability (journal entries, reconciliations, close)

- Strong QuickBooks Online experience

- Comfortable building packs and explaining variances clearly (written + verbal)

- Strong ownership mindset: you raise issues early and propose actions

- Can work from office in Pasig, Metro Manila (WFO)



Strongly Preferred

- FP&A experience (forecasting, cash runway, variance analysis)

- E-commerce / startup experience (Shopify, marketplaces, inventory businesses)

- Dashboard/reporting skills (Power BI / Sheets)

- Experience improving processes and reducing manual work



How to Apply (Important)



Please include:

1. CV

2. A Loom video (4–6 mins) answering:

- Describe a weekly pack you built and what insights/actions it drove

- Describe a 13-week cash forecast you’ve managed (or similar)

- Show one dashboard/report you built (Power BI / Sheets)

- Share 1–2 examples of how you use AI/automation to work faster/cleaner

3. Answer:

- How many entities have you managed in one role?

- What’s your strongest “insight” example (a time you flagged a risk early and what happened)?

title: Scrum Master
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated Scrum Master / Agile Lead / Delivery Manager to guide and inspire our development teams, ensuring the successful delivery of projects while fostering a culture of continuous improvement. You will be responsible for coordinating multiple teams, implementing agile practices, and driving efficiency across the organization.



Key Objectives

-Champion the use of metrics and objective measures to track team performance.

-Inspire, organize, and support teams, identifying growth opportunities.

-Identify and resolve controversial issues in internal and external interactions, seeking win-win solutions.

-Guide teams to stay on track with agile techniques, fine-tuning approaches to align with overall strategy.

-Promote continuous improvement by setting goals, defining milestones, and assigning responsibilities.



Responsibilities

-Manage Agile procedures, including PIP planning, iterations, demos, and retrospectives.

-Conduct assessments of engineers and product team leads.

-Maintain a general development plan in Jira, monitoring deadlines and task completion.

-Coordinate 3 development teams, ensuring autonomy and operational efficiency.

-Propose effective methods and approaches to achieve business results in alignment with company priorities.

-Build and maintain realistic planning and execution processes with teams to ensure timely deliveries.

-Define and utilize key metrics to analyze and improve team performance.

-Effectively manage conflicts and train teams to handle challenges proactively.

-Act as facilitator, process manager, mentor, and change agent, contributing to organization-level process improvements.



Required Skills and Qualifications

-Minimum 3 years’ experience as a Scrum Master, Agile Leader, or similar role in development/testing teams.

-Proficiency with Agile tracking tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence).

-Ability to plan iterations, resolve conflicts, and remove bottlenecks.

-Skilled in facilitating meetings and interacting with multiple management levels.

-Experience conducting team assessments and evaluating effectiveness.

-Strong understanding of the software development lifecycle (SDLC).

-Systems thinker capable of seeing the big picture and identifying root causes.

-Practical knowledge of Scrum and Kanban methodologies.

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.



Preferred Skills and Qualifications

-Certifications in Leadership, Agile Leadership, Scrum Mastering, or People Management.

-Experience in e-commerce.

-Certification as Agile Coach or Scrum Master.

-Educational background in Computer Science or related field.

title: PRC-licensed Certified Public Accountant (CPA)
description:
Job Overview



We are seeking a PRC-licensed Certified Public Accountant (CPA) to support our growing U.S. tax services operation. This role focuses on consulting and supporting U.S. tax professionals (tax preparers and tax managers) with tax return preparation, review support, and technical tax assistance.



This is a non-signatory role intended for an experienced accounting professional who understands U.S. tax concepts and workflows and can collaborate with U.S.-based tax teams.



Licensing Requirement (Mandatory)



Must hold an active Certified Public Accountant (CPA) license issued by the Professional Regulation Commission (PRC), Philippines



Must be able to provide PRC license number for verification



PICPA membership is a plus but not required



Applications without an active PRC CPA license will not be considered.



Key Responsibilities



U.S. Tax Support & Consultation



Support U.S. tax professionals with preparation and review of tax returns



Assist with tax research and interpretation of U.S. tax rules



Prepare and review workpapers, schedules, and reconciliations



Provide technical input and guidance related to tax filings



Tax Return Support (Non-Signatory)



Support preparation of U.S. tax returns, including but not limited to:



Individual (Form 1040)



Business returns (Forms 1120, 1120-S, 1065)



Assist with identifying issues, inconsistencies, and compliance risks



Ensure accuracy and proper documentation



Collaboration & Communication



Consult with U.S. tax professionals regarding tax questions and scenarios



Participate in internal discussions related to tax filings and processes



Communicate clearly and professionally in English



Required Experience & Skills



PRC-licensed CPA (Philippines) – required



Experience supporting U.S. tax filings (direct or offshore)



Familiarity with U.S. tax concepts, terminology, and workflows



Strong accounting fundamentals and analytical skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Detail-oriented, organized, and professional



Comfortable working with U.S.-based teams



Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience working with U.S. CPA or EA firms



Familiarity with U.S. tax software (Drake, UltraTax, ProSeries, Lacerte, etc.)



Experience with bookkeeping or payroll for U.S. clients



Experience working EST or overlapping U.S. hours



Work Schedule & Availability



Availability during U.S. Eastern Standard Time (EST) preferred



Schedule flexibility may be available depending on workload



Long-term engagement preferred



Important Notes



This position does not involve signing U.S. tax returns



This role is designed to support and consult U.S. tax professionals



Compliance with U.S. and Philippine professional standards is required



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



Confirmation that you are a PRC-licensed CPA



Your PRC license number



Summary of your experience supporting U.S. tax filings



Types of U.S. tax returns you have worked on



Your availability (including EST overlap)

title: Onboarding Specialist (Accounting Systems)
description:
About Accountally

Accountally is a growing US-based bookkeeping and accounting firm that partners with small and mid-sized businesses to keep their finances clean, organized, and stress-free. We're a remote-first team built on strong systems, clear communication, and a high standard for clean work.



About the Role

The Onboarding Specialist plays a critical role in preparing new client accounts before they transition to the bookkeeping team.



Every client that joins Accountally requires their accounting systems to be reviewed, connected, cleaned, and configured before ongoing bookkeeping work begins. This role owns that process from start to finish.



You will evaluate incoming accounting files, connect financial systems, identify bookkeeping issues, perform cleanup work within scope, and deliver a fully prepared accounting file to the assigned bookkeeping team.



This position requires strong technical accounting knowledge, exceptional organization, and the ability to independently diagnose and resolve issues in messy or incomplete accounting files.



Success in this role means consistently delivering clean, properly configured client files with clear documentation, enabling the bookkeeping team to immediately begin accurate month-to-month financial work.



Core Responsibilities

**Client Onboarding & System Setup

- Configure and provision client accounting environments before cleanup begins.

- Establish accountant access and user permissions across accounting platforms.

- Connect bank feeds, credit cards, and financial data sources.

- Integrate third-party platforms such as Amazon, Shopify, payroll systems, and financial applications.

- Configure the client file within internal workflow and practice management systems.

- Ensure all financial integrations are properly connected and functioning before proceeding with cleanup.



**Accounting File Review & Diagnosis

- Evaluate the current condition of incoming client accounting files.

- Identify key issues, including miscoded transactions, unreconciled accounts, incomplete records, broken chart of accounts structures, or historical backlogs.

- Assess cleanup complexity and communicate findings to the internal team.

- Document observations clearly and flag potential risks or scope concerns before beginning remediation work.



**Cleanup & Accounting Configuration

- Perform accounting cleanup work within the defined project scope.

- Reclassify and recode transactions to correct accounts.

- Reconcile bank, credit card, and balance sheet accounts.

- Restructure or standardize the client’s chart of accounts to align with internal standards.

- Clear historical backlogs and prepare books for ongoing monthly close processes.

- Configure accounting platform settings and integrations to support long-term bookkeeping workflows.



**Documentation & Handoff

- Deliver a clean, fully prepared accounting file to the assigned bookkeeping team.

- Provide detailed documentation outlining:

- Issues identified during diagnosis

- Cleanup work performed

- Structural changes made

- Outstanding items requiring future monitoring

- Ensure the receiving bookkeeper has full clarity on the client’s accounting setup and any potential risks or complexities.



Qualifications

- 3+ years of bookkeeping or accounting experience, preferably supporting multiple clients.

- Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online, including:

* Chart of accounts structure

* Reconciliations

* Journal entries

* Platform configuration

- Experience performing accounting cleanups or file migrations.

- Familiarity with e-commerce accounting environments and integrations.

- Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple onboarding projects simultaneously.

- Excellent written communication and documentation skills.

- Ability to work independently and diagnose accounting issues with minimal supervision.

- Experience provisioning and managing access across accounting platforms, financial institutions, payroll systems, and integrations.



Nice to Have

- Experience working with Xero or other accounting platforms

- Familiarity with practice management tools such as Double HQ, Karbon, or similar systems

- Previous experience at a bookkeeping firm or BPO supporting U.S. clients

- Exposure to multi-entity accounting environments or inventory-heavy businesses

- Experience working with Amazon, Shopify, A2X, or similar e-commerce integrations



Why Join Accountally?

- $13/hr USD, consistent and reliable pay

- Fully remote, long-term role

- Work with a growing U.S. accounting firm serving ambitious SMB clients

- Structured systems and processes designed for efficiency

- Opportunity to grow into more senior accounting or operational roles as the firm scales

- Collaborative team focused on quality, ownership, and continuous improvement

We are Honest Pathology (
), a patient-focused telehealth service founded by a U.S. board-certified pathologist. We empower people to truly understand their pathology reports (cancerous or non-cancerous) through clear explanations, virtual consultations, and educational content. Our mission is to cut through medical jargon and give patients clarity, confidence, and control over their health decisions.



We are looking for a skilled, reliable Ad Manager, Ad Creator, and Marketing Strategist who can also handle **video editing**. This role focuses on growing our online presence through high-performing ads and short-form video content on **TikTok** and **Meta** 
/Instagram) platforms.



**Key Responsibilities:**

- Manage and optimize TikTok Business and Meta Business Suite accounts (campaign setup, targeting, budgeting, A/B testing, scaling winners, and daily monitoring).

- Create and execute marketing strategies to drive traffic, leads, and bookings for our pathology review services.

- Produce, edit, and optimize short-form videos (15-60 seconds) for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Meta ads — turning educational content, testimonials, explainer scripts, and raw footage into engaging, high-conversion creatives.

- Add captions, effects, music, transitions, text overlays, and branding consistently.

- Analyze ad performance (ROAS, CTR, conversions) and provide weekly reports with recommendations.

- Collaborate on content ideas that align with our honest, empathetic, and educational brand voice in the healthcare space.

- Handle basic ad creative production (graphics, thumbnails if needed).



Requirements

- Proven track record managing TikTok Business accounts and Meta Business Suite (please share links to accounts you've managed or performance screenshots/metrics from past campaigns when applying).

- Experience creating and editing short-form videos specifically for paid ads on TikTok and Meta (Reels, vertical format).

- Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Sora Pro 2, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar — must be fast and produce polished, trend-aligned edits).

- Understanding of digital marketing best practices for healthcare/medical/educational content (compliance-aware is a plus).

- Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.



Schedule & Compensation:

- Part-time: 4 hours per day, Monday–Friday (approximately 20 hours/week).

- Must work during **US morning hours** (aligned with Mountain Time / Pacific Time zones — e.g., 8 AM–12 PM MT or similar; flexible within reason but consistency required).

- Probationary period (first 1 month): $4 USD per hour

- After successful probation: $5 USD per hour.

- If you consistently add value (e.g., strong ad performance, creative ideas, or scaling results), we offer potential for **additional hours** and/or **performance-based bonuses/compensation increases**.

- Paid via PayPal, Wise, or similar (weekly or bi-weekly).



How to Apply – MUST READ:

To be considered, you must submit a short video introduction (1–2 minutes max, vertical format preferred). In your video:

- Introduce yourself and your location/time zone.

- Briefly explain your background and experience with TikTok/Meta ads management and video editing.

- Share 1–2 specific examples of campaigns or videos you've created (mention metrics if possible).

- Tell us why you're excited about working with a healthcare/education brand like Honest Pathology.



**Applications without a video intro will NOT be considered** — this helps us see your communication style, editing skills, and personality fit.



Apply through this platform with your resume/portfolio links + the required video (upload to YouTube unlisted, Vimeo, Google Drive, or similar and share the link in your message/cover letter).



We're excited to find someone who can help us reach more patients who need clear answers about their health. Looking forward to your application!



- Charlie

title: Direct Response Copywriter – Video Ads for Facebook
description:
Are you the kind of writer who thinks in hooks, punchy one-liners, and story-driven 
nts that stop someone mid-scroll? Then keep reading — we want to hear from you.



About Us

We're a 5-year-old e-commerce beauty brand that runs almost entirely on the power of great video ads. With a team where 14 out of 20 people work in creative, we take content seriously. Our paid video ads are the engine behind our $10M/year business and we need a talented scriptwriter to keep fueling it.



The Role

As our Direct Response Copywriter, you'll be the voice behind our ads. You'll write scroll-stopping scripts for short-form video content that runs on Meta 
/Instagram) and Snapchat. From punchy 15-second hooks to longer narrative-driven formats, you'll craft copy that converts — working hand-in-hand with our experienced video editing team to bring every script to life.



What You'll Do

Write high-converting video ad scripts across a range of formats, styles, and trends

Research our target customers — their pain points, desires, and language — to write copy that truly resonates

Study competitor ads to identify what's working and adapt winning angles for our brand

Collaborate closely with our video editors to ensure scripts translate effectively on screen

Analyze ad performance data and iterate your scripts based on what's converting

Document winning script formulas and contribute to our growing creative knowledge base



What We're Looking For

3–5 years of experience in copywriting, scriptwriting, or a related creative role

Proven ability to write video scripts for paid social (Meta experience is a big plus)

A strong sense of storytelling, pacing, and what makes someone stop scrolling

Comfortable working with performance data to inform your writing

Eager to learn, test new formats, and embrace feedback

Detail-oriented, reliable, and creatively driven



As a Person, You Are

A natural storyteller with a punchy, engaging writing style

Accountable — you deliver quality work on time, every time

Curious and open to trying new formats, tools, and AI-assisted workflows



What We Offer

A full-time, long-term remote position with a stable, fast-growing brand

A collaborative creative team of experienced video editors and strategists

Real opportunities to grow as the brand scales really fast these days

Your scripts will actually run — and you'll see the results every day



What We Expect

Full-time commitment (40 hours/week, Monday–Friday)

Consistent delivery of polished, ready-to-produce scripts every week

A growth mindset — you're open to feedback and always looking to improve

The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, dependable, and solutions-driven—comfortable managing structured operational responsibilities while also supporting creative, client-facing initiatives. This position is well-suited for someone who enjoys building systems, improving workflows, and helping leadership stay focused on strategic priorities.

 snippets

Short-form social posts

Website or landing page copy

Audience Growth & Engagement

Client Operations

s and follow-up workflows

Work Style & Personality Fit

title: Project Manager/Dispatcher
description:
About ElasticIT



At ElasticIT, we're building a world where healthcare workers never wait for technology. We're not just another IT support company; we're the team that rescues healthcare providers when technology threatens patient care, turning chaos into clarity and empowering ordinary teams to achieve extraordinary results through the right technology.



We specialise in healthcare IT, providing managed services, custom software development, and HIPAA-compliant solutions that ensure medical professionals can focus on what matters most: their patients, not their systems. Our North Star is audacious yet simple: by 2050, we will eliminate repetitive IT tasks for 1 million healthcare workers, proving that the right technology makes ordinary people extraordinary.



Our Values: The DNA of How We Operate



Our values aren't just words on a wall; they're the blueprint for every interaction, every solution, and every relationship we build:

•SIMPLIFY THE OVERWHELMING: Cut through confusion with clarity and convert half-hour tasks into one-click wins

•RESCUE WHEN OTHERS PANIC: Respond when others would panic and deliver the impossible under pressure

•BUILD LASTING CAPABILITY: Create tools that spread like wildfire and teams that work without micromanaging

•PERSIST THROUGH CHAOS: Adapt when goalposts keep moving and turn disasters into relationships

•ENABLE HUMAN PURPOSE: Remove barriers so the focus can be on patients, not systems



The Problem We're Solving



Whether it's a client transformation project, an internal ElasticIT initiative, or managing the daily flow of incoming support requests, the same coordination challenges have led to real-world problems:

•Helpdesk teams not informed of go-live dates until the morning of deployment

•Missed deadlines due to lack of structured project planning

•Leadership stretched between strategic client work and operational coordination

•No clear ownership for project tracking and execution accountability

•Internal improvement projects losing 
ntum without dedicated coordination

•Tickets flooding in with no clear priority, leaving critical issues buried amongst routine requests

•Healthcare practices waiting whilst technicians figure out who should handle what

•Urgent issues escalating because initial triage missed the severity



The Role

You'll be the person who turns vague briefs into bulletproof plans and ensures nothing falls through the cracks. When leadership identifies an opportunity, whether that's a client transformation or an internal initiative, you're the one who evaluates what's actually needed, spots the gaps others miss, and uses your judgement to assess risks before they become problems. You'll convert ideas into proper project plans with scheduled tasks, clear ownership, and timely communication to all stakeholders.



This role also carries a secondary responsibility: providing backup and cover for our dispatcher function, managing the flow of incoming tickets when needed. This isn't just about covering holidays, it's about understanding the full lifecycle of our client journey, from the 
nt a ticket arrives through to project completion. By bridging both worlds, you'll develop an invaluable perspective on how our service delivery truly works, seeing the immediate client needs alongside the strategic improvements that prevent those same issues from recurring.



This isn't about being the person who comes up with the big ideas or the technical expert who fixes the problems, it's about being the thoughtful evaluator who instinctively knows what's going to work and the dependable force who ensures nothing falls through the cracks. You're the person who prevents the "four hours late" scenarios because you spotted the gap in the plan early, who follows up when others forget, and who takes genuine satisfaction in crossing tasks off the list. When you say something will be done right, it gets done right.



For client projects, you'll support our vCIO function and technical teams to ensure seamless delivery. For internal projects, you'll work alongside leadership and department heads to drive ElasticIT's own improvements forward. For dispatcher cover, you'll be the calm voice that reassures a panicking practice manager that help is on the way, the eyes that spot a P1 hiding in a sea of password resets, and the hands that keep our ticket queue flowing smoothly. In all cases, you're the person who instinctively knows what's going to work and what isn't, evaluating plans, providing steady coordination, and removing blockers so everyone else can do their best work.



What You'll Do

Primary Function: Project Management

•Translate strategy to execution: Receive strategic briefs from vCIO conversations (for client projects) or leadership discussions (for internal initiatives) and break them down into actionable project phases and milestones

•Create comprehensive project plans: Document objectives, scope, stakeholders, milestones, tasks, dependencies, risks, and communication plans for every project

•Coordinate across teams: Brief technical teams before go-lives, consult with TAM on technical considerations, ensure clients and internal stakeholders receive proactive updates

•Drive accountability: Follow up on tasks, remove blockers, escalate issues early, and ensure deadlines are met or communicated in advance

•Maintain documentation: Keep project records, capture lessons learned, and drive process improvements

•Drive internal initiatives: Coordinate ElasticIT's own improvement projects, from process automation to strategic business development activities, ensuring internal work gets the same rigour as client projects

•Enable leadership focus: Free vCIO and leadership to focus on strategic work without operational distractions



Secondary Function: Dispatcher/Triage Backup

•Triage incoming tickets: Rapidly assess, categorise, and prioritise all incoming requests during cover periods, ensuring nothing critical gets lost in the noise

•Provide first response: Acknowledge every ticket promptly, gather essential information, and set client expectations clearly

•Route intelligently: Match tickets to the right technician based on skill, availability, and urgency – not just whoever's next

•Escalate appropriately: Recognise P1 and P2 situations immediately and trigger the right response protocols

•Monitor queue health: Keep an eye on ticket age, SLA breaches, and workload distribution, flagging issues before they become problems

•Support client communication: Keep clients informed of progress, especially during high-priority i



About You

Essential:

•Strong project management fundamentals, planning, scheduling, tracking

•Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal

•Highly organised with exceptional attention to detail

•Ability to ask the right questions and drive clarity

•Ability to stay calm under pressure and maintain clarity when things get busy

•Basic technical understanding, enough to distinguish a network outage from a forgotten password

•Empathy and patience, healthcare workers calling us are often stressed and need reassurance



Nice to Have:

•Experience with PSA tools (we use Halo but experience with any PSA is helpful)

•Healthcare IT background

•Technical certifications

•Understanding of MSP landscape and terminology (can be taught)

•Background in IT support or helpdesk environments



Not Essential:

Deep technical skills. This role doesn't fix tickets; it coordinates people who do. A non-technical person with great organisational skills and a calm demeanour is often better than a technician trying to be organised.



Who you are:

•Someone with a natural instinct for what's going to work, you can look at a plan and immediately sense what's missing or what's about to go wrong

•Able to take a vague brief and quickly evaluate what actually needs to happen, you turn ambiguity into clarity without needing everything spelled out

•Finds genuine satisfaction in completing what you start, an unfinished task list keeps you up at night, and you get real energy from crossing things off as done

•Takes pride in being the person others trust for good judgement, when you say something will work, people believe you because you're usually right

•Gets energy from helping others succeed, whether that's spotting a problem before it derails the team, providing support when someone's stuck, or being the reassuring voice when a client is stressed

•Thrives with clear direction, you don't need to invent the strategy or ask "why are we doing this?", you need to know what success looks like so you can evaluate the best path to get there

•Committed to follow-through, once you've assessed what needs doing and said yes, you're determined to deliver, no matter how tedious the final 10?comes

•Someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, you don't freeze when the pace picks up, you focus

•Naturally empathetic, when a stressed practice manager calls, you genuinely want to help them feel better



What We Offer

•Work that matters: Every project you see through to completion and every ticket you triage correctly directly impacts healthcare delivery and patient care, your follow-through makes a real difference

•Clear direction and support: Leadership who sets clear objectives and then trusts you to deliver, with documented procedures and systematic approaches that reward thorough, careful work

Growth potential: Develop into senior project management, operations leadership, or client success roles

•Recognition for reliability: Work alongside people who genuinely value dependability and follow-through, where being the person who gets things done is celebrated, not taken for granted

•Purpose you can commit to: Contribute directly to our North Star of liberating 1 million healthcare workers from repetitive IT tasks, a mission worth seeing through



THE PRACTICAL STUFF

POSITION: Full-time (40 hours/week), remote

HOURS: Mostly U.S. Eastern Time (8 AM - 5 PM EST) with some flexibility

- Full professional attention must be dedicated to EIT during scheduled working hours — no freelance, consulting, or secondary employment during shift.



READY TO APPLY?

Complete our application form:

WHAT WE WANT TO SEE:

A short video introducing yourself - (1-2 minutes)

Filled out form -
