Cover letter containing:

Your experience with examples of managing competing priorities

Why you think you'd be good at this type of controlled chaos

title: Data Analyst & Marketing VA (Full-Time)
description:
We are looking for a highly analytical and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support the Marketing Executive of a fast-growing global business.



This is a data-first role. Your primary focus will be working with large datasets to uncover insights, support decision-making, and improve how the business leverages its data—particularly within search and customer behavior.



You will also support marketing execution tasks, helping free up the Marketing Executive to focus on high-level strategy and growth.



Key Responsibilities

1. Data Analysis & Insights (Primary Focus)

- Analyze large datasets to identify trends, patterns, and actionable insights

- Work with search and behavioral data (e.g., Algolia) to improve user experience and personalization

- Identify opportunities to improve product visibility and customer engagement

- Present findings in a clear and structured way to support decision-making



2.
 Marketing Execution (Klaviyo)

- Build and manage
 campaigns using Klaviyo

- Segment customer lists based on data and behavior

- Assist with short-form copy (product descriptions,
 content)

- Track and report campaign performance



3. CMS & Content Management

- Update and manage content on a bespoke CMS (with migration to Shopify planned)

- Ensure accuracy across a large product catalog

- Perform bulk updates while maintaining strong attention to detail



4. Additional Support (Secondary)

- Assist with SEO-related tasks and data mining

- Support ad-hoc marketing and operational tasks



Core Skills (Must-Have)

- Strong data analysis and data manipulation skills

- Excellent attention to detail, especially when handling large datasets

- Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Ability to interpret data and think critically—not just execute tasks



Mindset & Work Style

- Inquisitive – naturally curious and asks thoughtful questions

- Proactive – identifies opportunities and suggests improvements

- Reliable & structured – maintains accuracy and consistency

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced and evolving environment



Nice to Have (Not Required)

- Experience with Klaviyo

- Familiarity with Algolia

- Experience with Shopify or custom CMS platforms

- Basic understanding of SEO or e-commerce workflows



Working Setup

- Schedule: Full-time



Training:

- Direct guidance from the Marketing Executive

- SOPs will be developed during onboarding

- Access to tool-specific learning resources (e.g., Klaviyo Academy)

?

Why This Role Matters

- This is a high-impact role where your work will directly influence how the business uses data to drive decisions, improve customer experience, and increase performance.



This is also a pilot hire, with strong potential for growth and future opportunities as the business expands.

title: Estimator
description:
About the Role

We are seeking detail-oriented and analytical Estimators to join our team and support our operations from the Philippines. You will play a crucial role in preparing accurate estimates, bills of materials, and quotations for our acoustic products used in workspaces. This role demands a strong mathematical aptitude, spatial awareness, the ability to interpret architectural drawings and technical plans and the ability to think creatively to problem-solve and come up with cost-effective solutions for product implementation. 



Key Responsibilities

Review and interpret architectural and construction drawings, specifications, and marked-up plans for acoustic products.

Perform take-offs and calculate quantities of materials required for each project.

Prepare Bills of Materials (BOMs) and ensure all quantities and specifications are accurate.

Input project data into NetSuite or other company systems to generate quotations and proposals.

Create Deals in Pipedrive to enable sales team to track and close the deals.

Apply analytical thinking to optimize sheet utilisation, ensuring the most efficient material use (e.g., determining how to achieve product sizes like 2.5m baffles from 2.4m x 1.2m sheets).

Liaise with internal teams and customers to clarify requirements and resolve discrepancies in drawings or estimates.

Maintain up-to-date costing databases and pricing structures.

Collaborate with design and production teams to verify feasibility and propose value-engineered solutions when needed.

Support continuous improvement initiatives to enhance accuracy and efficiency in the estimating process.

title: Project Management (Shopify ++)
description:
Project Manager | Shopify-Focused | Digital Commerce & Brand Operations



We’re looking for a project manager who thrives at the intersection of structure and creativity. Someone who can see the big picture, orchestrate moving parts, and still care deeply about the small details that make a Shopify experience feel effortless.



This role sits at the center of our digital ecosystem. You’ll be responsible for guiding projects from idea to execution across Shopify stores, marketing initiatives, operational workflows, and cross-functional teams. The objective is simple in words but ambitious in practice: build, maintain, and evolve high-performing Shopify environments while keeping teams aligned, timelines realistic, and 
ntum alive.



What You’ll Be Driving



At the core, you’ll own Shopify-related projects end to end. That includes new store builds, redesigns, feature launches, app integrations, performance optimizations, and ongoing enhancements. But this role goes far beyond managing tasks in a board.



You’ll act as the connective tissue between strategy, design, development, marketing, and operations. You’ll translate business goals into clear project plans. You’ll turn creative ideas into executable roadmaps. You’ll anticipate friction before it shows up and guide teams through it calmly and confidently.



You’ll manage timelines, budgets, scope, and resources, but just as importantly, you’ll manage expectations, communication, and clarity.



Scope & Responsibilities



You will:



Lead Shopify projects from concept through launch and post-launch optimization



Coordinate cross-functional teams including developers, designers, marketers, and external partners



Own project planning, documentation, milestones, dependencies, and risk mitigation



Oversee Shopify theme development, customization, and UX improvements



Manage integrations with apps, APIs, payment providers, inventory systems, analytics, and marketing tools



Ensure projects align with brand standards, conversion best practices, and performance goals



Monitor site performance, usability, and operational health, translating insights into actionable improvements



Act as a central point of communication, keeping stakeholders informed and aligned



Improve internal workflows, SOPs, and delivery processes over time



This role requires comfort with both technical conversations and creative collaboration. You don’t need to code, but you should understand how Shopify works well enough to ask smart questions, catch red flags early, and guide decisions with confidence.



How You’ll Work



You’ll operate in an environment that values ownership, clarity, and forward motion. We care about thoughtful planning, but we also value 
ntum. You’ll be trusted to make decisions, propose improvements, and shape how work gets done.



This is not a passive coordination role. It’s an active leadership position where your ability to bring order, vision, and calm to complex projects will directly impact outcomes.



You’ll be expected to:



Think systemically about how projects connect to broader business goals



Balance speed with quality, and ambition with feasibility



Communicate clearly, proactively, and with intention



Adapt as priorities evolve without losing sight of the objective



What Success Looks Like



Success in this role looks like Shopify projects launching on time, teams feeling supported and aligned, and the platform continuously improving rather than reacting. It looks like fewer surprises, smoother handoffs, and clearer decision-making. It looks like a Shopify presence that feels polished, scalable, and ready for what’s next.



Who This Role Is For



This role is ideal for someone who:



Has strong experience managing Shopify-based projects or eCommerce platforms



Is naturally organized but not rigid



Enjoys translating ideas into execution



Is comfortable leading without micromanaging



Sees project management as both a discipline and a craft



If you enjoy building systems, guiding people, and shaping digital experiences that actually work in the real world, this role will feel energizing rather than exhausting.



Why This Role Matters



Shopify isn’t just a storefront. It’s the heartbeat of digital commerce, brand storytelling, and operational flow. This role ensures that heartbeat stays strong, intentional, and evolving.



If you’re excited by the idea of being at the center of meaningful digital projects and helping teams turn vision into reality, I would definately love to hear from you

title: Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED AS AN APPLICANT, PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR MOST UP-TO-DATE RESUME AND A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TAILORED TO THIS JOB POSTING!******



Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Sunday to Thursday, 2:00 PM-10:30 PM PST (30-minute unpaid break) - Subject to client requirements

Salary: $1,200 per month



Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly skilled Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler to join our team. This role focuses on designing and detailing multi-level storage buildings, which require a unique structural approach due to their heavy load-bearing systems and specialized construction methods.

The ideal candidate is not only a strong structural engineer but also a super expert in Revit modeling, capable of creating precise, complex models with minimal supervision.



Key Responsibilities:

Design and model heavy, multi-level storage buildings using Revit.

Perform structural analysis and detailing specific to high-load industrial and storage facilities.

Develop accurate construction documents and shop drawings.

Collaborate with the engineering and design team to ensure models meet structural and architectural requirements.

Identify and solve design challenges with a focus on constructability and safety.

Maintain accuracy and consistency across all Revit models and related documentation.

Coordinate with project managers and other disciplines to ensure seamless project delivery.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, or related field.

Industrial and commercial engineering experience preferred, particularly with heavy load-bearing structures.

Proven expertise as a Revit Modeler, with advanced knowledge of large-scale modeling.

Strong understanding of structural systems, especially for multi-level and heavy storage buildings.

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and collaboration abilities in a remote team environment.



Preferred Skills:

Experience with Steel Structures, Concrete Structures, Masonry Construction, Light and Gauge Steel Structures

Familiarity with BIM coordination and clash detection.

Knowledge of U.S. building codes and standards is a plus.

Knowledge of ETABS and SAFE is a plus.



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Sales Executive (Closer)
description:
Sales Executive (Closers)



A fantastic opportunity to join us as a full-time Sales Executive.



Join a high-performing sales team where you’ll speak with motivated leads, close high-value deals, and earn strong performance-based commissions in a structured, supportive environment.



Pay Rates



$2,000+ per month (base salary + OTE).



Hours Per Week

Minimum 40 hours for base salary.



Working Hours

8 hours per day on a set 5 out of 7 days per week.



Payment

Salary and commissions paid monthly directly into your bank account.



Other Incentives

Performance and other bonus incentives.



About the Company



Swoosh English is an online English exam academy founded in 2013. We help healthcare professionals and other international students pass their OET, IELTS, and PTE exams through online courses, lessons, and expert support.



We have over 500 reviews and a 4.8 Trustpilot rating.



About the Role



We are looking for a confident, persuasive, commission-driven Sales Executive who is comfortable asking for the sale and working in a target-driven environment.



You will be closing warm leads who have already gone through a vetted and filtered process. By the time leads speak with you, they are typically much closer to buying our services.



You must be able to build trust quickly, communicate naturally, handle objections with confidence, and move conversations towards a decision.



This role suits someone who is highly driven by performance, enjoys targets, thrives on commission, and knows how to turn interest into sales.



Who This Role Is For



You are confident asking for the sale.

You are motivated by targets, commissions, and performance.

You are persuasive, energetic, and comfortable speaking with people from around the world.

You know how to handle objections and move conversations forward.

You want to work in a fast-moving, ambitious online business.



Who This Role Is Not For



You are uncomfortable asking for the sale.

You are looking for a passive support-based role.

You do not enjoy sales targets or commission-based incentives.

You struggle with spoken English or persuasive communication.

You prefer a slow-paced or highly structured corporate environment.



Daily Responsibilities



Conduct professional video sales calls with high-quality audio, video, and lighting.

Follow established sales processes and frameworks.

Handle leads and follow-ups via
, WhatsApp, SMS, and phone.

Organise, track, and nurture leads using CRM systems.

Monitor your own sales performance, closing ratios, and KPIs.

Attend weekly sales meetings and in-house sales training.

Provide sales updates and reporting.

Work closely with the Sales Manager and senior management team.



Requirements



At least 2 years of relevant and demonstrable sales experience in a similar closing role.

Proven experience meeting and exceeding sales KPIs and targets.

Professional or business English level of C1 or above.

Strong ability to build rapport and carry natural conversations with international customers.

A natural salesperson who is self-motivated, proactive, and hungry to maximise commissions.

Strong objection-handling and closing ability.

Comfortable speaking with prospective clients over video, phone,
, and chat.

Technically competent and able to use CRM systems and online tools.

Able to work effectively in an ambitious and fast-paced small business.

Able to work under pressure with strong attention to detail.

Proactive, organised, and able to plan ahead.

Fast and stable internet connection.

Access to a sufficiently powerful laptop or PC (16GB RAM, i5 or equivalent processor, at least 3.5 GHz).

Access to a tidy and professional workspace with good lighting, video, and audio.

Enthusiastic, optimistic, and dependable.

Professional, approachable, and a strong listener.

Team player with strong written and verbal communication skills.

Sense of humour and positive attitude.

Genuine interest in helping students improve their English and pass their exam.



Software and Tools Used



Training will be provided where needed.

Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Docs, Google Sheets).

GoHighLevel CRM.

Google Meet.

Website navigation.

Phone, SMS, and WhatsApp.



Perks



Regular sales training and workshops.

Remote work-from-home role.

Flexible working opportunities.

Uncapped commission potential.

Performance bonuses.

Friendly, multicultural, dynamic online company.

Free English test-prep course (IELTS, OET, or PTE), or a credit for a friend or family member of your choosing.



How to Apply



To apply, please complete the application form.







If you are eligible, we will contact you with the next steps in the application process.

title: Executive Assistant / Expert Network Manager
description:
About the Role:

I am a corporate lawyer and business owner with extensive experience in the chemical manufacturing industry. I am launching a new consulting business specifically targeting expert networks (GLG, AlphaSights, Guidepoint, Dialectica, etc.).



I do not need a standard data-entry VA. I need a highly analytical, independent Expert Network Manager with flawless written English who can act as my gatekeeper and pitch my expertise to high-level associates.



Your Daily Responsibilities:



Inbound Filtering: Monitor my inbox, filter out irrelevant project briefs, and flag the exact projects that match my dual background in corporate law and chemical supply chains.



Screener Execution: Read complex technical briefs and draft compelling 3-5 sentence pitches proving my expertise for specific consulting calls.



Profile Expansion: Build and continuously optimize my consultant profiles across 15+ secondary expert networks to maximize inbound requests.



Calendar Management: Handle complex time zone conversions, send availability, and lock confirmed consulting calls onto my schedule without double-booking.



Requirements:



Flawless written English (You will be communicating directly with Ivy League-educated account managers).



Exceptional reading comprehension and analytical skills.



Prior experience as a paralegal, legal assistant, B2B lead generator, or high-level executive assistant is strongly preferred.



Ability to think on your feet and work independently.



How to Apply:

I ignore all automated and copy-pasted cover letters. To prove you have the attention to detail required for this role, you must follow these exact instructions:



Make the subject line of your application: "Chemical Consulting VA"



In the first paragraph of your cover letter, write a 3-sentence pitch on why a lawyer with supply chain experience is the perfect expert for a consulting call regarding "raw material shortages in chemical manufacturing."

title: Remote Reservation Agent (Calls, Texts, Email – Hospitality Company)
description:
PodShare is a shared living company with locations across California. Guests book flexible stays in private sleeping pods within a community environment.



We are hiring 2 remote reservation assistants to handle calls, messages, and guest check-ins, as this schedule seems exhaustive for one person:



Schedule



Position 1 (Part-Time – 20 hrs/week)



8:00 AM – 10:00 AM PST (daily)

4:00 PM – 7:00 PM PST (Sunday & Monday)



Position 2 (Part-Time – 30 hrs/week)



6:00 PM – 12:00 AM PST (Tuesday–Saturday)



Responsibilities



Answer incoming calls using Google Voice then send follow-up texts to every caller



Reply to:

• text messages

•
s

• live chat

• OTA guest messages



Assist with remote check-ins, including:

• sending & reviewing Jotform ID verification, adding those details to Cloudbeds Guest Details

• sending door codes, WIFI self checkin details

- Communicate all actions on Quip channels

• assigning beds once they select it (virtual assistance via text)

• answering guest questions with a focus on new bookings and extensions



Update reservations in Cloudbeds PMS:

• check-in / checkout messages texted or
ed to each guest who is coming or going

• ETA messages, and Quip answer to staff at different locations in the channels

• updating guest details in Cloudbeds 



During Slow Periods (Important)



When there are no calls or messages, you will complete tasks such as:



• sending follow-up messages to past guests to return

- Newsletter writing, socila media text posts, video editing is a plus

• responding to inquiries on craigslist,
, and other forums to get sales

• light marketing tasks (scripts/templates provided) for cold calls to schools and clubs for group travel

• organizing reservation data



You must stay active and productive during your shift.

title: Paid Ads Manager
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Paid Ads Manager / Agency Manager to oversee our law firm’s paid marketing efforts. This role is responsible for managing relationships with external advertising agencies, monitoring performance metrics, and ensuring all paid campaigns align with ethical standards and business objectives. The ideal candidate has strong experience in paid digital advertising, agency coordination, and KPI-driven performance management.



Key Responsibilities



Agency Oversight:

Supervise all paid advertising agencies (Google Ads,
/Meta, LinkedIn, etc.)

Conduct regular check-ins and strategy sessions with agency partners

Ensure agencies have the resources, assets, and information they need to succeed

Performance Monitoring:

Track and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs), including:

Cost per Lead (CPL)

Cost per Opportunity (CPO)

Cost per Deal (CPD)

Evaluate campaign effectiveness and ensure metrics are meeting targets or trending positively

Prepare performance reports and present key findings to the Director of Marketing

Creative Review and Compliance:

Review and approve all ad creatives and copy before launch

Ensure all advertising materials comply with legal marketing ethics and internal protocols

Collaborate with legal and compliance teams when necessary

Strategic Input:

Provide insights and recommendations to improve ad performance and ROI

Stay up-to-date with platform changes, advertising trends, and regulatory requirements

Contribute to the overall growth strategy of the firm’s marketing department

Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications, or related field

3+ years of experience managing paid ad campaigns (law firm or professional services experience preferred)

Experience working with or managing marketing agencies

Proficient in paid media platforms (Google Ads, Meta Business Suite, LinkedIn Ads, etc.)

Strong analytical skills with experience using reporting tools (Google Analytics, Looker Studio, etc.)

Excellent communication and project management skills

Familiarity with legal advertising rules and ethical guidelines is a plus

Preferred Skills



Experience with CRM and lead tracking tools (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce)

Ability to manage budgets and allocate spend for maximum ROI

Knowledge of A/B testing, landing page optimization, and retargeting strategies

WHY JOIN ASHOORI LAW



Work for one of the top-rated U.S. immigration law firms



Fully remote work environment



Be part of a mission-driven, diverse, and supportive team



Opportunities for growth and professional development

title: Sales Executive
description:
About Us



CR Movers Inc. is a fast-growing professional moving company based in Toronto, Canada. We handle residential and commercial moves across the Greater Toronto Area and all over Canada. We are looking to expand our sales operations to support increasing demand.



We are looking for a results-driven Virtual Sales Executive who can confidently convert inbound/outbound leads into booked moves.



Role Overview



This is not a passive customer service role. We are looking for someone with 5 to 10 years of sales with a proven track record of closing deals and exceeding targets. 



You will be responsible for closing deals, overcoming objections, and turning leads into confirmed bookings. We are looking for someone who does not accept “no” without a valid reason, understands urgency, and knows how to guide clients toward a decision.



Key Responsibilities



Contact inbound leads via phone, SMS, WhatsApp, and

Qualify leads and close bookings for moving services

Handle objections confidently (price, timing, competition, hesitation)

Follow up persistently until a clear yes or no is received

Book confirmed jobs directly into our system

Maintain accurate notes and updates in CRM

Meet or exceed weekly booking targets

Communicate professionally with Canadian clients



What We’re Looking For



? Proven sales closing experience (services preferred)

? Strong English communication (spoken & written)

? Confident, persuasive, and assertive — not afraid to push for the close

? Can handle objections without sounding aggressive

? Organized and reliable with follow-ups

? Comfortable working with scripts but knows how to adapt

? Strong internet connection and quiet work environment

? Willingness to work according to Eastern Standard Time.

? Open to working on weekends. 



Sales Mindset Required:



You ask for the sale

You don’t ghost leads

You don’t accept “maybe”

You understand urgency and booking psychology

You can explain value, not just price



Tools You’ll Use:



CRM system (training provided)

VoIP / Calling software



Why Join CR Movers?



Stable monthly pay

Clear expectations and structure

Performance incentives for strong closers

Long-term opportunity with a growing company

Direct impact on company revenue



How to Apply:



Please
 your resume and cover letter to 
 include:



A brief summary of your sales closing experience

Examples of objections you’ve handled and how you closed

Your availability and internet speed (weekend availability preferred, we are based in Toronto so schedule will be EST)

title: Paid Media Specialist (Facebook Ads) - US Marketing Agency Hiring Full-Time
description:
We're looking for a Paid Media Specialist who lives and breathes
/Meta ads to join our team full-time.



ABOUT US:

MedSpa Marketing Masters is a done-for-you marketing agency serving medspa clinics across the United States. We handle everything - Meta ads, landing pages, automations, and we even have our own call center booking appointments for clients. We currently manage over $250,000/month in Meta ad spend across multiple client accounts, and we're growing fast.



THE OPPORTUNITY:

We need a dedicated paid media specialist who wants to be part of something bigger than just running ads. You'll be embedded in our team, working closely with the founder, and mastering a system that's already generating incredible results for our clients.



This is perfect for someone who:

- Currently works at an agency and wants a better team with a clearer growth path

- Has been freelancing but is tired of the instability and wants a committed, full-time role

- Wants to specialize in ONE niche and ONE platform (Meta) and become the best at it



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Launch, manage, and optimize Meta ad campaigns for medspa clients

- Analyze campaign performance and make daily optimization decisions

- Test new ad creatives, audiences, and funnels within our proven framework

- Report performance insights directly to the founder

- Help improve and scale our existing client results



REQUIREMENTS:

- Minimum 1 year of hands-on
/Meta ads experience

- Understanding of key metrics: ROAS, CPL, CPA, CTR, and how to move them

- Experience managing multiple ad accounts simultaneously

- Strong communication skills - you'll work directly with the founder

- Agency experience is a strong plus

- Must be available full-time (40 hrs/week) - this is NOT a part-time or freelance position

- No side projects or additional clients allowed - we need 100% of your focus



WHAT WE OFFER:

- $1,000 - $1,500/month salary

- Fully remote - work from anywhere in the world

- Work with a proven, results-driven system (not a startup figuring things out)

- Direct access to and mentorship from the founder

- Real growth path: top performers can advance to Fulfillment Manager, owning the entire marketing strategy across all clients

DO NOT APPLY IF:

HOW TO APPLY:

Complete our application form here: 



We personally review every application. If you're ready to go all-in on a team that's already winning, we want to hear from you.

title: Loan Processor - Real Estate
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Loan Processor to join our growing financial services team. In this role, you will be the backbone of our lending operations — reviewing, verifying, and processing loan applications from submission through closing. You will collaborate closely with loan officers, underwriters, and clients to ensure accurate, timely, and compliant loan packages.



Key Responsibilities:

01 Review and verify loan applications for completeness, accuracy, and compliance with lending policies and regulatory requirements.

02 Collect and organize required documentation including income verification, credit reports, tax returns, employment records, and appraisals.

03 Order and track third-party services such as appraisals, title searches, flood certifications, and credit supplements.

04 Communicate with borrowers, real estate agents, and loan officers to obtain outstanding conditions and ensure timely loan closings.

05 Identify and resolve discrepancies or red flags in loan documentation, escalating issues to underwriters or supervisors as needed.

06 Coordinate loan closing activities including preparation of closing disclosures, settlement statements, and final loan packages.



Minimum Qualifications:

- Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field

- Minimum 2 years of loan processing, banking, or credit-related experience

- Proficiency in Loan Origination Systems (LOS) and MS Office Suite

- Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills

- Effective written and verbal communication in Filipino and English

- Ability to manage multiple loan files and meet tight deadlines



Benefits:

* Fixed Salary

* Unlimited Incentives

title: Senior eCommerce Accountant (PHP 120–150K | Work with US Clients | Long-Term Role)
description:
Work directly with North American eCommerce brands.

Own real client financials. No micromanagement.



We’re a fast-growing accounting firm looking for a high-performing Senior Accountant who wants long-term stability, growth, and meaningful work.



This is not a basic bookkeeping role.

You will own the monthly close and financials for real businesses.



About Firm Five



Firm Five is a modern accounting firm supporting eCommerce and service businesses ($2M–$50M revenue) across the U.S. and Canada.



We don’t do tax work.

We focus on clean financials, strong systems, and helping clients make better decisions.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



You will fully own the accounting for multiple eCommerce clients.



This includes:



Monthly close in QBO or Xero



Reconciling Shopify, Stripe, PayPal, Amazon, and other platforms



Investigating discrepancies in payouts, fees, returns



Recording accruals, COGS, and inventory adjustments



Preparing clean monthly financial statements



Supporting onboarding and clean-up of messy books



Communicating clearly with clients and internal team



This Role Is NOT For You If:



You need constant supervision



You only have basic bookkeeping experience



You struggle with English communication



You are not comfortable working with international clients



This Role IS For You If:



You can own a full month-end close independently



You have worked with US/Canadian clients



You understand eCommerce accounting (or can learn quickly)



You take pride in clean, accurate financials



You communicate clearly and professionally



Requirements



CPA (Philippines)



3–5+ years of accounting experience



Strong QBO or Xero experience



Experience with eCommerce or inventory accounting



Strong English communication (written + spoken)



Reliable internet, backup power, and dedicated workspace



Nice to Have



Shopify / Amazon / A2X / Webgility experience



Experience with multi-entity or multi-currency accounting



Compensation & Benefits



- PHP 120,000 – 150,000 per month



- Paid bi-weekly via Wise



- Paid holidays + vacation + sick days



- Long-term, stable role



- No time tracking or micromanagement



- Clear expectations and growth path



Working Hours



- Flexible schedule



- Must overlap with EST (9 AM – 1 PM EST)



- Remaining hours flexible



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, please include:



1. A short Loom video (3–5 minutes):



Answer this:



A client’s Shopify payouts do not match the revenue in QBO.

Walk us through how you would investigate and fix this.



2. Your resume



Applications without Loom videos will not be considered.



Final Note



We are building a high-performance team.



If you are looking for a long-term role where you can grow, take ownership, and work with serious clients — we’d love to meet you.

title: Marketing & Business Development Executive
description:
JOB TYPE: Full-Time



JOB SUMMARY:

We are seeking a client-focused Marketing Executive with strong expertise in AI-based marketing tools and CRM platforms to support lead generation, client communication, and campaign execution for the US market. The ideal candidate will be comfortable working directly with clients, generating qualified leads, preparing presentations, making cold calls and managing professional
 outreach and follow-ups. This role requires a balance of strategic thinking, hands-on execution, and client engagement, aligned with US business and communication standards. 



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

Serve as a client-facing marketing professional, understanding client goals and aligning marketing strategies accordingly. 

Leverage AI-powered marketing tools to generate, qualify, and nurture leads across digital channels. 

Prepare and deliver professional presentations, proposals, and marketing decks for client meetings and internal reviews. 

Manage end-to-end lead generation activities, including prospecting, outreach, and follow-up. 

Draft, send, and track professional
 campaigns and follow-up communications with prospects and clients. 

Utilize CRM tools (such as Salesforce, Zoho CRM, HubSpot, or similar) to manage leads, track interactions, and maintain accurate client records. 

Monitor campaign performance and generate insights using analytics and AI-driven reporting tools. 

Collaborate with internal teams to ensure timely execution of marketing initiatives and client deliverables. 

Maintain clear documentation of leads, communications, and campaign outcomes. 



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:

Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or a related field. 

2–5 years of experience in marketing, lead generation, or client-facing roles, preferably supporting the US market. 

Excellent knowledge and hands-on experience with AI-based marketing and lead generation tools. 

Strong experience using CRM platforms such as Salesforce, Zoho CRM, HubSpot, or similar tools. 

Proven ability to generate and manage leads, including follow-ups and pipeline tracking. 

Strong experience in writing professional
s and follow-up messages aligned with US business communication standards. 

Proficiency in preparing presentations and reports (PowerPoint, Google Slides, or similar). 

Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English. 

Strong organizational, time-management, and client-handling skills. 



PREFERRED SKILLS:

Experience working with US-based clients or US marketing campaigns 

Familiarity with marketing automation and
 marketing platforms 

Data-driven mindset with the ability to interpret insights and optimize strategies 



WHY JOIN US:

Opportunity to work on US-focused marketing initiatives 

Hands-on exposure to advanced AI marketing and CRM tools 

Collaborative, growth-oriented work environment 

Direct client interaction and ownership of marketing outcomes



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (Important):

Attach your updated resume

Subject line must be formatted exactly as: Last Name, First Name – Marketing Executive

Only 10 application points will be accepted

Applications that do not follow these instructions will be disregarded

title: Amazon Help
description:
I am in the Amazon Influencer Program. I am looking for someone to cross post my storefront product listings in the US to my other existing storefronts in the UK, CA, and AU. I have a software that can help with this. I have roughly 300 products that need cross posted. I continue to produce videos, so there will continually be videos that need cross posted. 



After the products have been cross posted, I would like to start posting my influencer videos to a brand new youtube channel. 



I am open to someone working any type of employment. I am flexible with the number of hours worked per week.
